14.21: Ɩrʊ́ Biyaalʊ́ wɛ́nɖɛɛ́ ńŋɩnáa baaŋmáa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Tɔ́m Tákaraɖá-daá ɩrɔ nɛ́. Amá, nbusú ɖamáa na weení sɩ ɩyá yɩ nɛ́. A bátalʊ́rʊ bʊdʊ́ʊ, bɩraalá yɩ sóńcí.» Ɖádʊ́ʊ-dɛ́ɛ kíɖíím kɛdɛɛzɩya ńbɩ ɖíi-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 26.26-30; Lúk 22.14-20; 1Ko 11.23-25 ɖʊɖɔ)
14.22: Bɔwɛ bénɖíi kíɖíím nɛ́, Yeésu wɔɔgbɔ́ɔ kpɔ́nɔ́. Waazá Ɩsɔ́ɔ kɩrɔ bɩtɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ wɛɛbɛlɩ́ kɩ icéle ɩwanbaaráa ɩtɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ɩmʊ ɩtɔ́ɔ, mɔ́dɔ́nʊʊ́ nbɩlɛ́.»
14.23: Bɩlɛ́ bʊwɔ́rɔ́ nɛ́, ngɛ wɔɔgbɔ́ɔ sʊlʊ́m na kagbɔ́ɔ, waazá Ɩsɔ́ɔ bʊrɔ bɩtɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ weejéle wɛ bɩ. Ngɛ barɩ́ŋa bɔɔnyɔ́ɔ.
14.24: Ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Mɛ́dɛ́ɛ azimá nbɩlɛ́, bɩnáábɩ́lɛ́ keɖiyá azimá bɩɩbɩ́rɩ ɩráa tuutúúma-rɔ nɛ́.
14.25: Ménveerím mɩ́ɩ toovonúm sɩsɩ mɔ́dɔ́ndɔnyɔɔ sʊlʊ́m bɩḿ hálɩ wɩ́rɛ wenɖé sɩ mɔgɔ́nyɔ́ɔ sʊlʊ́m kɩ́fabɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ kowúrɔ́ɔ-daá nɛ́.»
14.26: Beedée jíńgáárɩ́ yéńdiwá basá Ɩsɔ́ɔ bɩtɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ baalɩ́ɩ bɛɖɛ́ɛ Olivíyée tɩ́ɩ́nɩ bʊ́ʊ-daá. Yeésu wénveerím Pétro sɩsɩ wɔ́ngɔnɩ́ ikízi yɩ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 26.31-35; Lúk 22.31-34; Yʊh 13.36-38 ɖʊɖɔ)
14.27: Ńna gɛ Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Mɩ́rɩ́ŋa mínzée iyéle ma, káma, baaŋmáa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Tɔ́m Tákaraɖá-daá sɩsɩ: “Mángʊ́ʊ ketirú na fééni ɩya ɖamá.”
14.28: Amá, a méévé malɩ́ɩ ɩsɩɖáa-daá, mɛ́ndɛ́ɛ mɩ́ɩ nɩ́bááwʊ mobó Galilée laadɔ́ɔ-daá.»
14.29: Ngɛ Pétro sɩsɩ: «Báa barɩ́ŋa bénzée beyéle nya, mɔ́ɔ́ médénzée kɛtɛngɛrɛ meyéle nya.»
14.30: Ńna gɛ Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Ménveerím nya toovonúm sɩsɩ sinje nuvoowú kɩna kɩdɩtɩŋa, naanɩ́ na kalɩńbaawʊ́ ɩbɔ́ɔ nabʊ́lɛ nɛ́, nyɔ́njɔɔlɩ́ bʊrɔ nabúdoozo sɩsɩ nyáásɩ ma.»
14.31: Ńna gɛ Pétro waazɩ́ŋ bɩcáárɩ sɩsɩ: «Báa bɩ́nbɔɔzɩ́ sɩsɩ mána nya ɖɩsɩ́, mɔ́dɔ́ndɔḿ sɩsɩ máásɩ nya.» Ngɛ wanbaaráa baaganáa rɩ́ŋa ɖʊɖɔ wɔɔdɔ́ bɩlɛ́. Yeésu wɛ wánzʊlʊ́ʊ Gɛtɩsemanée kárɔɔ́-daá (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 26.36-46 na Lúk 22.39-46 ɖʊɖɔ)
14.32: Yeésu na ɩwanbaaráa boobó bɩlɛ́ hálɩ batála ɖɩdáarɛ bánÿaá ɖɛ sɩsɩ Gɛtɩsemanée nɛ́ ɖɩdaá. Ńna gɛ Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ɩjɔ́ɔ cé, na mobó magázʊlʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ.»
14.33: Ngɛ wɛɛgbɛdɩ́na Pétro na Yaakúbu na Yʊháánɩ. Bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ gɛ waabá ɩsʊ́ʊ kaanɩŋá bɩka ɩlaakáarɩ ɩbá bɩkʊrʊ́.
14.34: Ńna gɛ wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Málaakáarɩ waazʊ́ʊ kaanɩŋá páá hálɩ bínÿelíi mazɩ́. Ɩjɔ́ɔ cé ɩcɔɔná mɩ́ɩ́zá.»
14.35: Ngɛ woodorí ɩdɩ ɩlɩ́ɩ bolíni cʊ́kɔ, ɩcɛ́ ɩsála adɛ ɩsʊ́lʊ sɩsɩ a bɩ́nlám Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɩlaná yɩ alɩwáátɩ kɩḿ bolíni.
14.36: Ngɛ sɩsɩ: « Áába !» Bugutoluú sɩsɩ Baabá. «Nyánbɩɩzɩ́ báa wé, laná ma bolíni na wahála kagbɔ́ɔ kana. Amá, bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ wenbí mɔ́zɔɔlɛ́ɛ nɛ́ ɩ́la ná, wenbí nyɔ́zɔɔlɛ́ɛ nɛ́ ɩ́la ná.»
14.37: Yeésu wɔɔlɔ́ɔ ɩkábɩsɩ ɩwanbaaráa toozóóní-jɔ́ nɛ́, ngɛ wɔɔmɔɔná wɛ bónɖóm. Ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ Pétro sɩsɩ: «Simɔ́ɔnɩ, nyɔ́wɛ nyónɖóm! A bɩlɛ́ ńdábɩ́ɩ́zɩ njɔɔná nyáázá báa áwa kʊ́ɖʊmʊ́ʊ?
14.38: Ɩjɔɔná mɩ́ɩ́zá bɩka ɩsʊ́lʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ na ɩ́kasála Sitáánɩ-dɛ́ɛ kɔdɔ́sɩ-daá. Ɩrʊ́ wɛná sɔɔlɩ́m sɩ ɩlá, amá, tɔnʊʊ́ tafɩ́ya.»
14.39: Ngɛ woodótorí ɩdɩ ɩlɩ́ɩ bolíni cʊ́kɔ ɩsʊ́lʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ na tɔ́m bíya kʊ́ɖʊmáa bɛḿ.
14.40: Waadákabɩsɩ ɩwanbaaráa-jɔ́ nɛ́, wɔɔdɔ́mɔɔná wɛ bónɖóm, káma, ɖóm caarɛ́ɛ wɛ, ngɛ bodoyuú kʊ́tɔḿtɩ.
14.41: Toozo-dɛ́ɛ waagábɩsɩ nɛ́, ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Mɩ́bamáa ɖóm mɩ́nvɛɛzɩ́! Tɔ́ɔ bɩɩdála! Alɩwáátɩ wenkí sɩ bakpa Ɩrʊ́ Biyaalʊ́ bayaná alaháácɩ́-dɩnáa nɛ́ waadála.
14.42: Ɩgʊrʊ́ ɖɩɖɛ́ɛ! Ɩbɛ́ɛ, weení wánÿám ma nɛ́ waadála.» Baagba Yeésu nɛ́-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 26.47-56; Lúk 22.47-53; Yʊh 18.3-12 ɖʊɖɔ)
14.43: Ɩbamáa ŋmatɩrɛ gɛ wanbaaráa fuú na nɔɔ́lɛ-daá kʊ́ɖʊḿ bánÿaá yɩ sɩsɩ Yudásɩ nɛ́ waadála, ɩ́gana ɩráa fuúre bágána tókobíwá na ɖáázɩ. Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa kʊ́bɔnáa na Mará wɩlɩɖáa na Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnáa weegédíri ná wɛ.
14.44: Yudásɩ, weení wánÿám yɩ nɛ́, waavʊ́ńgéveeri wɛ sɩsɩ: «Weení sɩ megbíríki yɩ mɛzɛ́ɛ yɩ nɛ́, Yeésu nbɩlɛ́. Ɩgba yɩ ɩɖɛɛná bɩka ifére ɩrɔ kazɔ́ɔ.»
14.45: Ńna‑ńna gɛ waanʊ́ŋ ɩkɛ́ɖɛɛ Yeésu-jɔ́ ɩtɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Kʊ́bɔnɩ́». Ngɛ weegbíríki Yeésu.
14.46: Ńna gɛ baaganáa woogóduu bakpa Yeésu.
14.47: Bɩnáábɩ́lɛ́ Yeésu na wenbá nɛ́ badaá kʊ́ɖʊḿ wɛɛgbɛ́ɛ ɩdɛ́ɛ tókobí ɩcɛ́sɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa rɩ́ŋa-dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnɩ́-dɛ́ɛ bɔwʊtá-dʊ́ʊ, ngɛ bɩɩjɛ́ ɩlɛ́ ɩnɩgbamʊʊ́.
14.48: Alɩwáátɩ kɩḿ gɛ Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ zamɔ́ɔ sɩsɩ: «Mɩ́ɩgálɩ́ɩ ɩkɔ́nɩ sɩ ɩkpa ma na tókobíwá na ɖáázɩ nyazɩ mɛ́gɛ́ɛ ɩrángʊ́ʊ́rʊ?
14.49: Báa wɩ́rɛ wenɖé, mɔ́jɔɔ́ɔ mɩ́lɔ́wʊ́táá Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-daá gɛ mánwɩlɩ́ɩ ɩráa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m, mɩ́dákpá ma. Amá, bɩlɛ́ bɩrɩ́ŋa bɩɩlá gɛ na wentí anɖébiwá waaŋmáa nɛ́ ikóódi.»
14.50: Yeésu wanbaaráa waaya ɖamá bese beyéle yɩ.
14.51: Ngɛ bú afobú naárʊ ivóóna bɩsaawʊ́ nɛ́ woovu yɩ. Ngɛ baagba yɩ.
14.52: Amá, ɩlɛ́ weeyéle bɩsaawʊ́ ise ɩɖɛ́ɛ tunbóóló. Booboná Yeésu Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ tɔmvʊʊráa kʊ́bɔnáa-jɔ́ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 26.57-68; Lúk 22.54-55, 63-71; Yʊh 18.13-14, 19-24 ɖʊɖɔ)
14.53: Wenbá baagba Yeésu nɛ́, bɛɛɖɛɛná yɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa rɩ́ŋa-dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnɩ́ weení Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa kʊ́bɔnáa rɩ́ŋa, na Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnáa na Mará wɩlɩɖáa tuuzée ɩdɛ́ɛ nɛ́-jɔ́.
14.54: Pétro ɩlɛ́ woovu Yeésu ɩjɔɔ́na yɩ bolíni hálɩ sarásɩ lanɖʊ́ kʊ́bɔnɩ́-dɛ́ɛ ɖaána-daá, ɩsʊ́ʊ ɩcɔ́ɔ ɩ́na ɩlɛ́ ɩdɛ́ɛ bɔwʊtá-dɩnáa wénweríi nimíni.
14.55: Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa kʊ́bɔnáa na Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ tɔmvʊʊráa kʊ́bɔnáa baaganáa wánjáádɩ seríya sɩ bakʊná Yeésu-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m na bakʊ yɩ nɛ́, ngʊ́ bodoyuú kúbuunátɩ.
14.56: Káma, ɩráa ɖabata waalɩzɩ́ seríyawá bʊbɔ́tɩ ńdɩ, amá, tɩdasáa.
14.57: Ngɛ ɩráa nɛbɛ́rɛ waagʊrʊ́ balɩzɩ́ seríya bʊbɔ́tɩ ńgɩ sɩsɩ:
14.58: «Ɖáánɩ́ɩ ɩrʊ́ ceení wɔɔdɔ́ sɩsɩ wánbɩɩzɩ́ ɩyɔ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga kana ɩráa waama kɛ nɛ́, na wɛ́ náádoozo, ɩbɩ́sɩ ɩma nɛkɛ́rɛ wenká ɩráa tama kɛ nɛ́.»
14.59: Amá, na bɩrɩ́ŋa bɩlɛ́, bɔnɔ́ɔ́zɩ tasáa bɛdɛ́ɛ seríya lɩzɩ́ɩ-daá.
14.60: Ńna gɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa rɩ́ŋa-dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnɩ́ waagʊrʊ́ zamɔ́ɔ lɔwʊtáá ɩtɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Nyɛ́vɛ́yɩ́na natɩ́rɩ sɩ nbúsi wentí ɩráa bana bónbuunáa nya nɛ́?»
14.61: Amá, Yeésu sumáa gɛ. Bɩnáábɩ́lɛ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa rɩ́ŋa-dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnɩ́ wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Nyɔ́ɔ́ gɛ Lɛɛrʊ́, Ɩsɔ́ɔ weení ɖónguú yɩ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ nɛ́ Ibiyaalʊ́?»
14.62: Yeésu woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Bɩlɛ́ gɛ mɛ́gɛ́ɛ, ngɛ mɩ́nnáa Ɩrʊ́ Biyaalʊ́ ɩjɔɔ́ɔ Ɩsɔ́ɔ Wúro Kʊ́bɔnɩ́-dɛ́ɛ nʊ́ʊ́nɩ kíɖiiwú-rɔ. Mɩ́ndanáa yɩ wángalɩɩnáa ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá wéngedím ŋmɩ́ńdɩ-rɔ.»
14.63: Ńna gɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa rɩ́ŋa-dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnɩ́ wɛɛlɛrɩ́ igúsúúdi ɩtɔ́ sɩsɩ: «Wɛɛgbɛɛná Ɩsɔ́ɔ. Bidokúti bɩbɔ́ɔ́zɩ seríya-dʊ́ʊ ɖʊɖɔ.
14.64: Mɩ́ɩ́nɩ́ɩ waaŋmátɩ ɩkpɛɛná Ɩsɔ́ɔ nɛ́. Mɩ́nmaazɩ́ sɩsɩ wé.» Ngɛ barɩ́ŋa baagʊ ɩdɔ́m bɔtɔ́ sɩsɩ ɩmɔɔ́na bakʊ yɩ gɛ.
14.65: Ngɛ badaá nɛbɛ́rɛ wɔɔdɔ ndɔɔlɩmá waazá-daá, bamá yɩ cɔɖɩ́wá, bɩka bɔ́ndɔ́m sɩsɩ: «Lɛɛrʊ́ tɩrɩkɩ, weení waama ná nya.» Ngɛ sɔ́ɔ́jawá fereɖáa wɔɔgbɔ́ɔ Yeésu bɛcɛ́ yɩ kadáázɩ. Pétro wɔɔjɔ́ɔ́lɩ sɩsɩ waasɩ Yeésu (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 26.69-75; Lúk 22.56-62; Yʊh 18.15-18, 25-27 ɖʊɖɔ)
14.66: Bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ, Pétro cɔɔ́ɔ bɩdɛ tɔ́ɔ-rɔɔzɩ́. Ngɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa rɩ́ŋa-dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnɩ́-dɛ́ɛ aláa bɔwʊtá-dɩnáa-daá naárʊ waadála.
14.67: Waana Pétro wénweríi nimíni nɛ́, ngɛ waabá ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ yɩ tíḿḿ; ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Nyɔ́ɔ́ ɖʊɖɔ nyágána Yeésu Nazarɛ́ɛtɩ ńnɩ́ gɛ.»
14.68: Amá, wɔɔjɔ́ɔ́lɩ ɩtɔ́ sɩsɩ: «Máásɩ wentí nyɔ́ndɔ́m nɛ́, ngʊ́ mádánnɩɩ wentí nyánŋmatɩ́ nɛ́ tugutoluú.» Ngɛ wɛɛɖɛ́ɛ ɩlɩ́ɩ asʊ ɖugoré-daá. [Ńna gɛ kalɩńbaawʊ́ wɔɔbɔ́ɔ.]
14.69: Amá, alʊ́ bɔwʊtá-dʊ́ʊ waadánáa yɩ ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́tɔḿ ɩ́na wenbá nɛ́ ɩzá-daá sɩsɩ: «Ceení ɖʊɖɔ na wɛ gɛ.»
14.70: Ngɛ Pétro wɔɔdɔ́cɔɔlɩ. Bɩɩdásɩ nɛ́, wenbá bɔwɛ ńna nɛ́, bɔɔdɔ́tɔḿ Pétro sɩsɩ: «Toovonúm gɛ, nyɔ́ɔ́ ɖʊɖɔ nyɛ́gɛ́ɛ bɛdɛ́ɛ ɩrʊ́ gɛ, Galilée ńnɩ́ gɛ nyɛ́gɛ́ɛ.»
14.71: Ńna gɛ waaŋmátɩ sɩsɩ: «A ɖé bʊbɔ́tɩ gɛ mɛ́nbɛlɩ́ɩ, Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɩ́fɔ mánɩgbamʊʊ́. Máámʊ́ná sɩsɩ máásɩ ɩrʊ́ weení mɩ́nŋmatɩ́ ɩdɔ́m nɛ́.»
14.72: Ngɛ kalɩńbaawʊ́ waajáŋ kɩbɔ́ɔ sɩɩlɛ-dɛ́ɛ. Ńna gɛ Pétro wɔɔdɔ́ɔ́zɩ tɔ́m wentí Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ yɩ nɛ́; tɩlɛ́ gɛ sɩsɩ: «Naanɩ́ na kalɩńbaawʊ́ ɩbɔ́ɔ nabʊ́lɛ nɛ́, nyɔ́njɔɔlɩ́ bʊrɔ nabúdoozo sɩsɩ nyáásɩ ma.» Ngɛ waalɩ́ɩ ɩbá iwíi.

15.1: Kiivé tɛ́ɛrɛ́‑tɛ́ɛrɛ́ nɛ́, Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa kʊ́bɔnáa na Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnáa na Mará wɩlɩɖáa na Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ tɔmvʊʊráa kʊ́bɔnáa bɔɔjɔ́ɔ bacáa lomaazɛ́. Ngɛ bɔɔvɔ́kɩ Yeésu nibé boboná yɩ becéle laadɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ nɩ́baadɛɛrʊ́ Piláatɩ.
15.2: Ngɛ ɩlɛ́ wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Nyɔ́ɔ́ gɛ Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ wúro?» Ngɛ Yeésu woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Nyɔ́ɔ́dɔ́ ná.»
15.3: Ngɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa kʊ́bɔnáa woobuuná Yeésu tɔ́mwá ɖabata.
15.4: Ńna gɛ Piláatɩ wɔɔdɔ́bɔɔzɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Ńdónbusi natɩ́rɩ? Ńdánnɩɩ wentí tɩrɩ́ŋa bónbuunáa nya nɛ́?»
15.5: Amá, Yeésu tobúsi yɩ natɩ́rɩ hálɩ bɩbá bɩlá Piláatɩ bítí. Baagʊ Yeésu tɔ́m basɩ́ŋ sɩsɩ bákʊ́ yɩ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 27.15-26; Lúk 23.13-25; Yʊh 18.39–19.16 ɖʊɖɔ)
15.6: Fɛlɛ nɖɛ́ɛ-dɛ́ɛ jíńgáárɩ́ báa wenkí, laadɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ nɩ́baadɛɛrʊ́ wɛ́ndɛ́rɛ́jɛ́m sáráka-dʊ́ʊ kʊ́ɖʊḿ weení zamɔ́ɔ wɔɔzɔ́ɔ́lɩ sɩsɩ ɩ́cɛ nɛ́.
15.7: Abaalʊ́ naárʊ wɔɔjɔɔ ná bánÿaá yɩ sɩsɩ Barabáasɩ. Baagba ɩ́na ɩɖɔndɩnáa nɛbɛ́rɛ bɔtɔ sáráka, káma, baagʊ ɩrʊ́ naárʊ wɩ́rɛ wenɖé ɩráa zamɔ́ɔ waagʊrʊ́na gómínantɩ nɛ́.
15.8: Ngɛ zamɔ́ɔ woobó Piláatɩ-dɛ́ɛ kɩ́nbɔɔzɩ́ yɩ sɩsɩ ɩ́la bɛḿ ńŋɩnáa wándárálám bɩ nɛ́.
15.9: Ńna gɛ Piláatɩ wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Mɩ́zɔɔlɛ́ɛ mɛjɛ́ mɩ́ɩ Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ wúro?»
15.10: Káma, Piláatɩ nyɩ bɩlɛ́ sɩsɩ sʊ́ʊ́zɩ weeyele ná Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa ɩkpa Yeésu becéle yɩ.
15.11: Amá, Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa kʊ́bɔnáa waajáárɩ zamɔ́ɔ sɩsɩ kɩ́bɔɔzɩ Barabáasɩ-dɛ́ɛ cɛ́m.
15.12: Bɩnáábɩ́lɛ́ Piláatɩ wɔɔdɔ́bɔɔzɩ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Nɛ́, we gɛ máláná weení mɩ́nÿaá yɩ sɩsɩ Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ wúro nɛ́.»
15.13: Boodóbusi yɩ bɩcáárɩ sɩsɩ: «Ka yɩ ɖɛ́nɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ-rɔ.»
15.14: Ngɛ Piláatɩ wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Taalɩ́ wenkí gɛ waalá.» Amá, bɛlɛ́ baabá gɛ babamáa kóódi bɩ́njaarɩ́ sɩsɩ: «Ka yɩ ɖɛ́nɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ-rɔ.»
15.15: Piláatɩ sɩ ɩlá bɩlá zamɔ́ɔ niíni nɛ́, ngɛ wɛɛjɛ́ kɩ Barabáasɩ. Bɩɩga Yeésu ɩlɛ́ nɛ́, wɔɔgbɔ́ɔ yɩ icéle wɛ sɩsɩ bósuti yɩ agbáázá bɩka baká yɩ ɖɛ́nɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ-rɔ. Sɔ́ɔ́jawá wánmʊŋɛ́ Yeésu (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 27.27-31 na Yʊh 19.2-3 ɖʊɖɔ)
15.16: Ngɛ sɔ́ɔ́jawá wooboná Yeésu laadɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ nɩ́baadɛɛrʊ́ Piláatɩ-dɛ́ɛ kowuro-ɖugoré-daá. Ngɛ boodúúzi sɔ́ɔ́jawá baaganáa rɩ́ŋa.
15.17: Boozúu yɩ tóko kɩ́sɛɛmʊ́ʊ. Ngɛ baalʊ́ʊ wʊláázɩ sɩjɔɔ́ɔ sɔwá‑sɔwá nɛ́ nyazɩ kowuro-vulɔɔ́ bofu ɩgʊjʊʊ́;
15.18: bɩka bɛ́nzɛɛ́ yɩ bɔ́ndɔ́m sɩsɩ: «Ɖɛ́ɛ́zɛ́ɛ nya Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ wúro.»
15.19: Bɩka bɔ́ngbɔwʊ́ʊ ɖɩgɛrɛ́ ɖeníka bánmám ɩgʊjʊʊ́-daá. Bɔ́ndɔnáa yɩ ndɔɔlɩmá. Bɩka boozóm waazá-daá hálɩ babá bolúúzi badɩ adɛ.
15.20: Baamʊ́ŋ yɩ bɩtɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ baalɩzɩ́ yɩ tóko kɩ́sɛɛmʊ́ʊ, babɩsɩná ɩdɛ́ɛ ńdɩ bosúu yɩ. Ngɛ bɛɛɖɛɛná yɩ sɩ bakága ɖɛ́nɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ-rɔ. Baagá Yeésu ɖɛ́nɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ-rɔ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 27.32-44; Lúk 23.26-43; Yʊh 19.17-27 ɖʊɖɔ)
15.21: Baalɩ́ɩ bɛ́nɖɛɛ́ nɛ́, baana abaalʊ́ naárʊ wáńgálɩɩná fɔɔ́ wɛ́nɖɛɛ́, bánÿaá yɩ sɩsɩ Simɔ́ɔnɩ. Ɩgɛ́ɛ Sirɛ́ɛnɩ laadɔ́ɔ-daá ńnɩ́ gɛ. Ibiyaalɩnáa gɛ Alɛkɩsándɩrɩ na Rufúusi. Ngɛ baagba yɩ ɖóóle ɩsʊ́ʊ Yeésu-dɛ́ɛ ɖɛ́nɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ.
15.22: Booboná Yeésu ɖɩdáarɛ wenɖé bánÿaá ɖɛ sɩsɩ Gɔlɩgóóta nɛ́. Gɔlɩgóóta kutoluú gɛ sɩsɩ Kʊjʊʊ́ Bɔɔrɔɔ́ ɖɩdáarɛ.
15.23: Bɔɔzɔ́ɔ́lɩ sɩsɩ bafa yɩ sʊlʊ́m baaja ná faadɩ́nɩ nyɛ́nɩ ńdɩ nɛ́ sɩsɩ ɩ́nyɔ́ɔ. Amá, Yeésu tɔnyɔ́ɔ.
15.24: Ngɛ baagá yɩ ɖɛ́nɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ-rɔ. Bɛɛdɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ bɔɔdɔ tɛ́tɛ́ ɩgbɩná-rɔ na batɩlɩ́ wenbí báa weení wɔ́ngbɔwʊ́ʊ nɛ́.
15.25: Tɛ́ɛrɛ́ kéréfu kééníré gɛ baagá yɩ ɖɛ́nɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ-rɔ.
15.26: Wenbí baaŋmáa kpálɩfɔ́ɔ-rɔ bosúsi ɩgʊjʊʊ́-rɔ bɩ́nwɩlɩ́ɩ wenbí bʊrɔ baagʊ yɩ nɛ́ gɛ sɩsɩ: «Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ wúro.»
15.27: Ngɛ baagá ɩráńgʊ́ʊ́ráa nɔɔ́lɛ batasɩná yɩ. Kʊ́ɖʊḿ igíɖiiwú-rɔ, waaganáa ɩnɩbɩɩwʊ́-rɔ. [
15.28: Bɩlɛ́ gɛ bɩɩlá gɛ wentí baaŋmáa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Tɔ́m Tákaraɖá-daá nɛ́ woogóódi. Tɩlɛ́ gɛ sɩsɩ: «Bɔɔgbɔ́ɔ yɩ baɖʊ ɩráa badaavé nɛ́ bɔlɔwʊtáá.»]
15.29: Nɩ́baaɖɛɛráa wándʊ́ʊ́dɩ yɩ bɩka bɔ́nbɔtɩ́ bagʊjʊ́nɩ, bɩka bɔ́ndɔ́m sɩsɩ: «Nyɔ́ɔ́ weení nyɔ́nÿɔ́m Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga nbɩ́sɩ nma kɛ wɛ́ náádoozo nɛ́,
15.30: nyádɩtɩŋa lɛɛ nyádɩ, bɩka ngédi ɖɛ́nɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ-rɔ.»
15.31: Bɩlɛ́ ɖʊɖɔ gɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa kʊ́bɔnáa na Mará wɩlɩɖáa wánmʊŋɛ́ yɩ bɔ́ndɔ́m yɩ sɩsɩ: «Wɛɛlɛ́ɛ baaganáa, amá, ɩ́dánbɩɩzɩ ɩlɛ́ɛ ɩdɩ.
15.32: A ɩnáábɩ́lɛ́ Lɛɛrʊ́, íkedi lɛlɛɛɖɔ́ ɖɛ́nɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ-rɔ ɖɩna na ɖɩfa yɩ toovonúm!» Bɩlɛ́ nɔ́ɔ́ gɛ bɩkpɛdɩ́na ɩráńgʊ́ʊ́ráa wenbá baagá ɩ́na wɛ ɖɛ́nɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ-rɔ nɛ́ bándʊ́ʊ́dɩ yɩ. Yeésu-dɛ́ɛ sɩ́m-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 27.45-56; Lúk 23.44-49; Yʊh 19.28-30 ɖʊɖɔ)
15.33: Kpɔɔ ɩdaawʊ́ kéréfu fuú na natɩ́lɛ nbó ɖaanɩ́ŋa kéréfu natúdoozo, bɩɩlá temenuú laadɔ́ɔ rɩ́ŋa-rɔ.
15.34: Ɖaanɩ́ŋa kéréfu natúdoozo bɩlɛ́ gɛ Yeésu woogóo bɩcáárɩ sɩsɩ: « Elíi, Elíi, lemá sabakɩtááni. » Bugutoluú sɩsɩ: «Mɛ́dɛ́ɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ, mɛ́dɛ́ɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ, ngbaalá gɛ nyɛ́ɛ́jɛ́ ma ndálɩ.»
15.35: Wenbá bɔwɛ ńna gɛ baanɩ́ɩ nɛ́, badaá nɛbɛ́rɛ sɩsɩ Elíya gɛ wánÿaá.
15.36: Ngɛ badaá naárʊ waajáŋ ise ɩkɔ́gbɔ́ɔ kɩcɛ́ ilíi sʊlʊ́m nyɩ́gáázɩ ńbɩ-daá ɩkpɔ́ɔ isúu ɖɩgɛrɛ́ nɔɔ́-daá ɩkpáázɩ Yeésu nɔɔ́-jɔ́ sɩsɩ ɩ́nyɔ́ɔ. Ngɛ sɩsɩ: «Ɩzɩ́ŋ ɖɩbɛ́ɛ sɩsɩ Elíya wɔ́ngɔnɩ́ ikédisi yɩ ɖɛ́nɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ-rɔ?»
15.37: Amá, Yeésu woogóo bɩcáárɩ, ngɛ weedísi weezuú.
15.38: Ngɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-daá láámílé waadára nabʊ́lɛ kɔgbɔɔ ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá ngɔ́nɩ adɛ.
15.39: Róóma sɔ́ɔ́ja kʊ́bɔnɩ́ waana iweezuú waalɩ́ɩ nɛ́, ngɛ sɩsɩ: «Toovonúm, ɩrʊ́ ceení ɩbá ɩgɛ́ɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ Biyaalʊ́ gɛ.»
15.40: Aláa ɖabata wɛ ńna bagazɩ́ŋɛ́ɛ bolíni bɛgɛbɛɛ́na. Badaá: bɛɛ Marɩyáma Magɩdaláa alʊ́, na Marɩyáma Yaakúbu kúmuú na Yoozée bɔgɔɔ, na Salomée.
15.41: Ɖoo Galilée laadɔ́ɔ-daá gɛ bogovóo Yeésu bángalám yɩ bɔwʊtá. Aláa ɖabata wɛ ńna ɖʊɖɔ, boogóvú Yeésu bɔkɔ́nɩ Yerusalɛ́ɛm nɛ́. Yeésu-dɛ́ɛ bím-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 27.57-61; Lúk 23.50-56; Yʊh 19.38-42 ɖʊɖɔ)
15.42: Kɩ́ńjáŋ kɩɖáánɩ; ngɛ bɩgɛ́ɛ na wɩ́rɛ wenɖé bángbɩɩrɩ́ nɛ́. Bugutoluú sɩsɩ sɩ kifé na beɖi Fɛɛzɩrɛ wɩ́rɛ nɛ́.
15.43: Ngɛ Ísifu ɩgɛ́ɛ Arɩmatée tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá ńnɩ́ nɛ́ waadála. Ɩrʊ́ ɩmʊ́ ɩgɛ́ɛ Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ tɔmvʊʊráa kʊ́bɔnáa-daá ɩrʊ́ fɩ́ya ńnɩ́ naárʊ gɛ, bɩka ɩvʊnɖamáa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ kowúrɔ́ɔ. Ngɛ wooyuú wenbiré ibó ɩmɔɔná Piláatɩ ɩbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ Yeésu tɔnʊʊ́.
15.44: Bɩɩlá Piláatɩ bítí sɩsɩ Yeésu wáńzɩ́ḿ. Ngɛ weeyéle bakáyáa Róóma sɔ́ɔ́ja kʊ́bɔnɩ́ ɩbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ Yeésu waavʊ́ńzɩḿ gɛ?
15.45: Waanɩ́ɩ ɩnɔɔ́-daá nɛ́, ngɛ waava nɩ́bááwʊ sɩsɩ bécéle yɩ kɩ.
15.46: Ísifu woobó ɩkámʊ́ kásáŋá, ngɛ wɔɔgɔ́nɩ ikédisi ɩsɩɖʊ́ ikoodi ná yɩ kásáŋá. Ngɛ wɔɔgbɔ́ɔ yɩ ɩɖʊ bɔɔlááwʊ baabáa kɩ bʊ́tangbalʊʊ́-daá nɛ́ kɩdaá. Ngɛ weebiláázɩ bʊ́ʊ́rɛ kʊ́bɔńɖɛ ɩtɔ bɔɔlááwʊ nɔɔ́.
15.47: Bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ kɩḿ, Marɩyáma Magɩdaláa alʊ́ na Marɩyáma Yoozée ɩgɔɔ bɛbɛɛ́na lé bánɖʊ́ʊ Yeésu nɛ́.

16.1: Fɛɛzɩrɛ wɩ́rɛ wɛɛɖɛ́ɛ bɩtɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ Marɩyáma Magɩdaláa alʊ́ na Marɩyáma Yaakúbu ɩgɔɔ na Salomée baamʊ núm bínvoorí nɛ́ sɩ bobó basaárɩ Yeésu tɔnʊʊ́.
16.2: Beeɖi Fɛɛzɩrɛ wɩ́rɛ kifé aláháɖɩ tɛ́ɛrɛ́‑tɛ́ɛrɛ́ nɛ́, wɩ́sɩ wángalɩɩ́ nɛ́, ngɛ bɛɛɖɛ́ɛ bɔɔlááwʊ-jɔ́.
16.3: Bɔwɛ bɔ́nbɔɔzɩ́ badɩ sɩsɩ weení sɩ ibiláázɩ ná bɛḿ bʊ́ʊ́rɛ kʊ́bɔńɖɛ bɔɔdɔ ɖɛ bɔɔlááwʊ nɔɔ́ nɛ́.
16.4: Baagʊ́sɩ ɩzá nɛ́, na bɩrɩ́ŋa bʊ́ʊ́rɛ waabá ɖikíi nɛ́, baana sɩsɩ ɖilewáa fɔɔlʊʊ́.
16.5: Baazʊ́ʊ bɔɔlááwʊ-daá nɛ́, ngɛ baana afobú naárʊ ɩjɔɔ́ɔ kíɖiiwú-rɔ, izóóna jaba kʊ́fʊlʊmʊ́ʊ. Ngɛ nɩdáárɛ waazʊ́ʊ wɛ.
16.6: Amá, ɩlɛ́ wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Mɩ́nyɔ́ɔ́ ɩ́kanɩ́ɩ nɩdáárɛ. Mányɩ sɩsɩ Yeésu Nazarɛ́ɛtɩ ńnɩ́ baagá yɩ ɖɛ́nɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ-rɔ nɛ́ gɛ mɩ́njáádɩ. Ɩvɛ́yɩ́ cé, káma, weevé ɩlɩ́ɩ ɩsɩɖáa-daá. Ɩgɔ́nɩ ɩbɛ́ɛ lénlé baavʊ́ńvɩɩzɩ yɩ nɛ́.
16.7: Amá, ibó ifééri ɩwanbaaráa na Pétro sɩsɩ: “Wɛɛdɛ mɩ́ɩ nɩ́bááwʊ ɩɖɛ́ɛ Galilée. Ńna gɛ mɩ́ngɔmɔɔnáa yɩ ńŋɩnáa waavʊ́ńdɔḿ mɩ́ɩ nɛ́.”»
16.8: Aláa bɛḿ baalɩ́ɩ bɔɔlááwʊ-daá na sewɔ́ɔ bɛɖɛ́ɛ bolíni, káma, balaakáarɩ waagʊrʊ́ bɩka bénzelíi, ngʊ́ bedefééri naárʊ natɩ́rɩ, káma, nɩdáárɛ waazʊ́ʊ wɛ. Yeésu waalɩzɩ́ ɩdɩ ɩwɩ́lɩ Marɩyáma Magɩdaláa alʊ́ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 28.9-10 na Yʊh 20.11-18 ɖʊɖɔ) [
16.9: Aláháɖɩ wɩ́rɛ tɛ́ɛrɛ́ Yeésu weevé ɩlɩ́ɩ ɩsɩɖáa-daá nɛ́, Marɩyáma Magɩdaláa alʊ́ weení ɩrɔ wɔɔɖɔ́ɔ zííniwá lʊbɛ nɛ́ gɛ waaɖáa ɩdɩ lɩzɩ́ɩ ɩwɩ́lɩ.
16.10: Ngɛ ɩlɛ́ wɛɛɖɛ́ɛ ikéveeri tɩ Yeésu-dɛ́ɛ wanbaaráa bɔwɛ lííya na wíídi-daá nɛ́.
16.11: Amá, bɛlɛ́ baanɩ́ɩ wɔ́ndɔ́m sɩsɩ Yeésu wɛ weezuú-daá hálɩ waana yɩ nɛ́, badalá yɩ yaraɖá.
16.12: Bɩlɛ́ bʊwɔ́rɔ́, waalɩzɩ́ ɩdɩ ɩwɩ́lɩ ɩwanbaaráa nɔɔ́lɛ bɛ́nɖɛɛ́ fɔɔ́ nɛ́ yáásɩ́ nakɩ́rɩ-daá.
16.13: Ngɛ bɛlɛ́ baagábɩ́sɩ befééri tɩ wanbaaráa baaganáa, bɛlɛ́ ɖʊɖɔ badalá wɛ yaraɖá. Yeésu waalɩzɩ́ ɩdɩ ɩwɩ́lɩ tɩndɩnáa fuú na naárʊ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 28.16-20; Lúk 24.36-49; Yʊh 20.19-23; Tɩm 1.6-8 ɖʊɖɔ)
16.14: Bɩlɛ́ bʊwɔ́rɔ́, waalɩzɩ́ ɩdɩ ɩwɩ́lɩ ɩwanbaaráa fuú na naárʊ bɔwɛ bénɖíi kíɖíím nɛ́. Wooyooná wɛ bɛdɛ́ɛ badafa toovonúm nɛ́ na bɛdɛ́ɛ wenbi-ɖóni-rɔ. Káma, weevé ɩlɩ́ɩ ɩsɩɖáa-daá wɔ́rɔ́ nɛ́, badalá wenbá baana yɩ nɛ́ yaraɖá.
16.15: Ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ibó ɖúúlínya rɩ́ŋa-daá ifééri ɩráa rɩ́ŋa Laabáárʊ Kífeńgi.
16.16: Weení waava toovonúm ngɛ beelíri yɩ lɩ́m-daá nɛ́, Ɩsɔ́ɔ wɛ́nlɛɛ́ yɩ. Weení ɩdafa toovonúm nɛ́, Ɩsɔ́ɔ wángʊ́ʊ ɩdɔ́m.
16.17: Maamááciwá wentí wenbá baava ma toovonúm nɛ́ sɩ balá nɛ́ nɖɔ́: na máyɩ́ɖɛ-daá, bɔ́nɖɔwʊ́ʊ zííniwá, bánŋmatɩ́ kʊnʊmɩ́nɩ kɩ́fatɩ,
16.18: bɛ́nzɛlɩ́ɩ ɖomáa banʊ́ʊ́zɩ-daá, ngɛ a bɔɔnyɔ́ɔ sɔ́ɔ́dɩ, bɩ́dánlaḿ wɛ nabʊ́rʊ. Bándɩnɩ́ nʊ́ʊ́zɩ kʊdɔndɩnáa-rɔ, bɛlɛ́ bawáa.» Yeésu waabɩ́sɩ ɩkpa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-jɔ́ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Lúk 24.50-53 na Tɩm 1.9-11 ɖʊɖɔ)
16.19: Ɖádʊ́ʊ Yeésu waaŋmatɩná wɛ bɩtɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ waagba ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá ɩcɔ́ɔ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ nʊ́ʊ́nɩ kíɖiiwú-rɔ.
16.20: Bɩɩga wanbaaráa nɛ́, bɛlɛ́ bɛɛɖɛ́ɛ báa lé bénveerím ɩráa Laabáárʊ Kífeńgi. Ɖádʊ́ʊ wánzɩnáa wɛ badɩmɛ́rɛ-daá bɩka wénÿelíi maamááciwá wánlám tínɖeezi bɛdɛ́ɛ waázu.]

1.1: Kʊ́bɔnɩ́ Tewofíili, wenbí bɩrɩ́ŋa bɩɩlá ɖɛ́dɛ́ɛ cé nɛ́, ɩráa ɖabata waaŋmáa bɩdɛ́ɛ tɔ́m.
1.2: Wenbá baana ná tɩ na baazá ɖoo bɩgabaazɩya ngɛ bɛɛgɛ́ɛ́zɩ ɖáa nɛ́, bɛlɛ́ baabɩ́sɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m feeriɖáa. Wenbí bɛɛgɛ́ɛ́zɩ nɛ́, bɩlɛ́ nɔ́ɔ́ gɛ ɩráa bɛḿ baaŋmáa.
1.3: Bɩnáábɩ́lɛ́ mɔ́ɔ́ ɖʊɖɔ mɔ́ɔ́bɔ́ɔ́zɩ bɩbɩ́ɩ madɩlɩ́ wenbí bɩrɩ́ŋa bɩɩlá ɖoo bɩgabaazɩya nɛ́, ngɛ mááná sɩsɩ bɩmɔɔ́na maŋmáa nya nŋɩ́nɩ́ biibó nɛ́,
1.4: na ndɩlɩ́ sɩsɩ wentí baawɩ́lɩ nya nɛ́ kɛ́ɛ toovonúm. Malááyɩ́ka weevééri Sákarɩ sɩsɩ wánlʊrʊ́ʊ Yaayá
1.5: Sáátɩ wenkí Eróodi wénɖíi kowúrátɩ Yudée laadɔ́ɔ-rɔ nɛ́, Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ sarásɩ lanɖʊ́ naárʊ fʊnwɛ, bánÿaá yɩ sɩsɩ Sákarɩ. Sarásɩ lanɖáa-dɛ́ɛ bɔwá-daá, bɔwʊ́ɖɛ wenɖé-daá Abíya kɛ́ɛ kʊjʊ-dʊ́ʊ nɛ́ ɖɩdaá gɛ ɩwɛ, bɩka ɩɖɛɛlʊ́ kɛ́ɛ sarásɩ lanɖʊ́ kʊ́bɔnɩ́ Árʊ́ʊ́na bíya‑bíya-daá alíya, bánÿaá ɩlɛ́ sɩsɩ Elizabɛ́ɛtɩ.
1.6: Sákarɩ ɩmʊ́ na ɩɖɛɛlʊ́, bɛlɛ́ɛ́nɩ́ bɔjɔwʊrɛ sɩɩzɛ́ɛ gɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɩzá-daá, bɩka bovóo Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Mará na wenbí bɩrɩ́ŋa waazɩ́ɩ́zɩ bɩ nɛ́ na toovonúm.
1.7: Amá, bɛvɛ́yɩ́na bú, káma, Elizabɛ́ɛtɩ kɛ́ɛ kaalʊrʊya, bɩka bɛlɛ́ɛ́nɩ́ báńbá babɩ́ɩ ábɔ́náa.
1.8: Wɩ́rɛ neɖére gɛ Sákarɩ wɛ wánlám sarɔ́ɔ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-daá, káma, bɔwʊ́ɖɛ wenɖé ɩwɛ ɖɩdaá nɛ́ gɛ bɩɩdála sɩsɩ ɖɩlá Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ.
1.9: Sarásɩ lanɖáa tɔ́rɔ́wɛná ɖɔ́ɔ́ná bɔ́ndɔ́ɔ tɛ́tɛ́ na bana weení sɩ ɩfʊ́ʊ́dɩ tulaarɩ́ nɛ́. Bɩdɛ́ɛ wɩ́rɛ bɔɔdɔ nɛ́, Sákarɩ gɛ bɩɩgba sɩsɩ ɩ́sʊʊ Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-daá ɩfʊ́ʊ́dɩ tulaarɩ́ ɖɩdáarɛ ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ ńɖɛ-daá.
1.10: Sáátɩ wenkí ɩwɛ wánvʊʊdɩ́ tulaarɩ́ nɛ́, zamɔ́ɔ tuutúúma wɛ ná asʊ kɩ́nzʊlʊ́ʊ.
1.11: Ńna gɛ Ɖádʊ́ʊ-dɛ́ɛ malááyɩ́ka naárʊ waaɖʊ ɩlɩ́ɩ Sákarɩ-rɔ ɩgazɩ́ŋɛ́ɛ ná sarásɩ ɖaalanɖɛ́ wenɖé ɖɩrɔ bánvʊʊdɩ́ tulaarɩ́ nɛ́ ɖɩdɛ́ɛ fúu kíɖiiwú-rɔ.
1.12: Sákarɩ waagʊ́sɩ gɛ waana yɩ nɛ́, ɩdaá lɩ́m wɛɛjɛ́, ngɛ nɩdáárɛ kʊ́bɔnbɔńɖɛ waagba yɩ.
1.13: Amá, malááyɩ́ka wɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Sákarɩ, nkanɩ́ɩ nɩdáárɛ, Ɩsɔ́ɔ waamʊ nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ sʊlʊ́ńdɩ. Nɖɛɛlʊ́ Elizabɛ́ɛtɩ wánlʊrʊ́ʊ nya bú abaalʊ́, na nva yɩ yɩ́ɖɛ sɩsɩ Yaayá.
1.14: Wɛ́nvɛɛzɩ́ nyéwenbiré bɩlá nya niíni, bɩka ɩráa ɖabata ɩfaarɩná ɩdɛ́ɛ lʊrʊ́ʊ.
1.15: Wɔ́ngɔnɩ́ ɩlá ɩrʊ́ kʊ́bɔnɩ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɩzá-daá; ɩ́dɔ́nnyɔɔ víinyi bíya sʊlʊ́m, cáńfáná sʊlʊ́m ɖóni ńbɩ nabɩ́rɩ, ngɛ Kezeŋa Ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ ńga wóngozunáa yɩ ɖoo ɩgɔɔ lóódi-daá.
1.16: Wɔ́ngɔnɩ́ ɩkábɩsɩná Israyɛ́ɛlɩ bíya ɖabata-dɛ́ɛ laakáarɩ Badʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-rɔ.
1.17: Wɛ́ndɛ́ɛ yɩ nɩ́bááwʊ; Kezeŋa na yíko Anɖébi Elíya wooyuú kɩ nɛ́ gɛ sɩ iyuú na ɩnyɔ́ɔ́zɩ caanáa na bebíya bɔlɔwʊtáá. Bɩka wenbá bédénzée Ɩsɔ́ɔ nɛ́, babɩ́sɩ áséńsí-dɩnáa ńŋɩnáa ɩráa bɔjɔwʊrɛ sɩɩzɛ́ɛ nɛ́. Bɩlɛ́ gɛ sɩ ɩlá na ɩkpɩ́ɩ́rɩ Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ zamɔ́ɔ wenkí kɩɖamáa yɩ nɛ́.»
1.18: Ngɛ Sákarɩ wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ malááyɩ́ka sɩsɩ: «Wé gɛ sɩ madɩlɩ́na sɩsɩ bɩgɛ́ɛ toovonúm. Káma, mána mɛɖɛɛlʊ́ ɖáńbɩ́ɩ́ ábɔ́náa.»
1.19: Ngɛ malááyɩ́ka woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Mɔ́ɔ́ gɛ Jibiríílu, mɔ́wɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɩzá-daá gɛ mánlám yɩ bɔwʊtá. Weegédíri ma gɛ sɩsɩ mɔ́gɔnɩ mevééri nya Laabáárʊ Kífeńgi kɩna.
1.20: Amá, ńŋɩnáa ńdáfá wentí méévééri nya tɩ nɛ́ toovonúm ngʊ́ tɩwɛ sɩ tɩlá a tɩdɛ́ɛ alɩwáátɩ waadála nɛ́, bʊrɔɔzɩ́, nyánbɩsɩ́ komóomúŋa hálɩ wɩ́rɛ wenɖé bɩdɛ́ɛ yáásɩ́wá sɩ tɩlá nɛ́.»
1.21: Bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ kɩḿ nɛ́, zamɔ́ɔ wɛ kɩɖamáa Sákarɩ bɩka kɩ́nlám bítí sɩsɩ weegéleeri ɖɩdáarɛ ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ ńɖɛ-daá.
1.22: Sáátɩ wenkí waagálɩɩ nɛ́, ɩdabɩ́ɩ́zɩ ɩŋmatɩná wɛ; ńna gɛ bɛlɛ́ baadɩlɩ́ sɩsɩ bɩɩlɩzɩ́ nabʊ́rʊ bɩkáwɩlɩ yɩ ɖɩdáarɛ ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ ńɖɛ-daá. Níízi gɛ waaŋmatɩná wɛ bɩka ɩwalɩ́ bɩlɛ́ ɩbɩ́sɩ komóomúŋa.
1.23: Sáátɩ wenkí Sákarɩ-dɛ́ɛ sarásɩ lám-dɛ́ɛ wɛ́-bíya wɛɛdɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ wɔɔlɔ́ɔ ɩbɩ́sɩ ikpé ɩdɛ́ɛ.
1.24: Bɩɩgɔ́nɩ bɩlá wɛ́ náálɛ nɛ́, ɩɖɛɛlʊ́ Elizabɛ́ɛtɩ wɛɛyɛ́ɛ fuwá, ngɛ ɩlɛ́ wɔɔjɔ́ɔ ɖaána hálɩ irodunáa nɔɔ́nʊ́wá ɩdalɩ́ɩ asʊ. Bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ kɩḿ nɛ́ ɩwɛ wɔ́ndɔ́m ɩdɩ sɩsɩ:
1.25: «Wenbí Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ waalá ma nɛ́ nbɩlɛ́; alɩwáátɩ wenkí bɩɩmɔ́ɔ yɩ nɛ́, weewíi mɔ́rɔ́ ɩlɩzɩ́ ma fɛɛrɛ́ ɩráa-daá.» Malááyɩ́ka weevééri Marɩyáma sɩsɩ wánlʊrʊ́ʊ Yeésu
1.26: Elizabɛ́ɛtɩ-dɛ́ɛ fuwá-dɛ́ɛ irodúu loɖo ńnɩ́-daá gɛ Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ weegédíri malááyɩ́ka Jibiríílu Nazarɛ́ɛtɩ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ tɩwɛ Galilée laadɔ́ɔ-rɔ nɛ́ tɩdaá.
1.27: Weegédíri yɩ bú aléeré naárʊ ɩdatɩlɩ́ ta abaalʊ́ nɛ́ ɩjɔ́. Bú aléeré ɩmʊ́, wúro Ɖáwʊɖa-dɛ́ɛ ɖugoré-daá ɩrʊ́ bánÿaá yɩ sɩsɩ Ísifu nɛ́ gɛ baava yɩ, ɩdɛ́ɛ yɩ́ɖɛ gɛ Marɩyáma.
1.28: Malááyɩ́ka waazʊ́ʊ ɩjɔ́ ɩtɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Mɛ́ɛ́zɛ́ɛ nya. Nyóóyúú kʊjʊʊ́ niíni Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-jɔ́, Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ sɩ́ŋɛ́ɛ nyɔ́wɔ́rɔ́.»
1.29: Marɩyáma waanɩ́ɩ tɔ́m bíya bɛḿ nɛ́, ngɛ waazʊ́ʊ bítí, ngɛ wɔ́nbɔɔzɩ́ ɩdɩ sɩsɩ: «Sɛ́ɛ́dɩ tɩna tugutoluú gɛ sɩsɩ wé.»
1.30: Ńna gɛ malááyɩ́ka wɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Nkanɩ́ɩ nɩdáárɛ, Marɩyáma, nyóóyúú kʊjʊʊ́ niíni Ɩsɔ́ɔ-jɔ́.
1.31: Bɛɛ́ɛ, nyɛ́nÿɛɛ́ fuwá nlʊ́rʊ bú abaalʊ́, na nva yɩ yɩ́ɖɛ sɩsɩ Yeésu.
1.32: Wɔ́ngɔnɩ́ ɩbɩ́sɩ ɩrʊ́ kʊ́bɔnɩ́, bɩka bayáa yɩ sɩsɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ bílí-bílí-dʊ́ʊ Biyaalʊ́. Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ wánzɩɩ́ yɩ ɩjaájaa wúro Ɖáwʊɖa-dɛ́ɛ kowuro-gbelé-rɔ.
1.33: Wénɖíi kowúrɔ́ɔ kɛvɛ́yɩ́na tɛ́m nɛ́ Yaakúbu-dɛ́ɛ ɖaána-rɔ ngɛ ɩdɛ́ɛ kowúrɔ́ɔ fɛ́yɩ́na kánzɩɩ́ tɩ́ŋa kɛtɛngɛrɛ.»
1.34: Ngɛ Marɩyáma wɔɔdɔ́ malááyɩ́ka sɩsɩ: «Tɔ́ɔ, nɛ́, nŋɩ́nɩ́ gɛ bɩ́nbɩɩzɩ́ bɩlá bɩlɛ́. Káma, máásɩ abaalʊ́.»
1.35: Ngɛ malááyɩ́ka woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Kezeŋa Ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ ńga wɔ́ngɔnɩ́ nyɔ́rɔ́, na Ɩsɔ́ɔ bílí‑bílí-dʊ́ʊ iyéle ɩdɛ́ɛ yíko ɩbála kifu nyɔ́rɔ́ nyazɩ izotuu. Bɩlɛ́ bʊrɔ gɛ bú weení sɩ nlʊ́rʊ yɩ nɛ́ kɛ́ɛ ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ ɩrʊ́, sɩ bayáa yɩ gɛ sɩsɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ Biyaalʊ́.
1.36: Hálɩ bɛɛ́ɛ, ngoobú Elizabɛ́ɛtɩ ɖʊɖɔ yɛ́ɛ́na fuwá sɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ bú abaalʊ́ ɩdɛ́ɛ ábɔńdɩ-daá. Ɩdɛ́ɛ irodúu loɖo ńnɩ́-daá gɛ ɩwɛ ɖɔ́, ɩmʊ́ weení bánvʊnÿaá yɩ sɩsɩ kaalʊrʊya nɛ́.
1.37: Káma, nabʊ́rʊ fɛ́yɩ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ tánbɩɩzɩ ɩlá nɛ́.»
1.38: Ngɛ Marɩyáma woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ bɔwʊtá-dʊ́ʊ gɛ mɛ́gɛ́ɛ, bɩ́la ma ńŋɩnáa nyɔ́ɔ́dɔ́ nɛ́.» Ngɛ malááyɩ́ka wɛɛɖɛ́ɛ iyéle yɩ. Marɩyáma woobó ɩkɛ́zɛɛ igoobú Elizabɛ́ɛtɩ
1.39: Wɛ́ amʊ́ adaá nɛ́, Marɩyáma waagʊrʊ́ ɩkpɔ́ɔ nɩ́bááwʊ itoózi ɩɖɛ́ɛ bʊ́ʊ́nɩ fáráńdɩ́ Yudée laadɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ natɩ́rɩ-daá.
1.40: Waadála nɛ́, waazʊ́ʊ Sákarɩ-dɛ́ɛ ɖaána, ngɛ wɛɛzɛ́ɛ Elizabɛ́ɛtɩ.
1.41: Sáátɩ wenkí Elizabɛ́ɛtɩ waanɩ́ɩ Marɩyáma-dɛ́ɛ sɛ́ɛ́dɩ nɛ́, bú waalʊwɔ́ɔ ilóódi-daá. Ngɛ Kezeŋa Ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ ńga woozuná Elizabɛ́ɛtɩ.
1.42: Ńna gɛ woogóo na ɖóni ɩtɔ́ sɩsɩ: «Ɩsɔ́ɔ waaɖʊ nya alɩbáráka aláa-daá, ɩɖʊ bú weení nyɛ́yɛ́ɛ́na ivuwá nɛ́ ɖʊɖɔ alɩbáráka.
1.43: Kʊjʊʊ́ niíni wenkí gɛ móóyúú bɩlɛ́ ngɛ hálɩ Mádʊ́ʊ ɩgɔɔ wɔɔgɔ́nɩ mɔ́jɔ́.
1.44: Káma, bɛɛ́ɛ, sáátɩ wenkí máánɩ́ɩ nyɛ́zɛ́ɛ́dɩ nɛ́, bú waalʊwɔ́ɔ na avaara mádáá.
1.45: Wenbi‑niíni-dʊ́ʊ gɛ nyɛ́gɛ́ɛ, káma, nyáává toovonúm sɩsɩ wentí Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ weegédíri befééri nya nɛ́ tɩ́nlám.» Yéńdi Marɩyáma weedée ɩsá Ɩsɔ́ɔ nɛ́
1.46: Waaŋmátɩ bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ Marɩyáma wɔɔjɔ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Mɔ́nɖɔɔzɩ́ Mádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ!
1.47: Bɩɩbá bɩjɔɔ́ɔ ma niíni ɖabata Ɩsɔ́ɔ Mɛ́lɛ́ɛ́rʊ́-rɔɔzɩ́.
1.48: Káma, waabɩsɩná ɩlaakáarɩ mɔ́ɔ́ ɩdɛ́ɛ bɔwʊtá-dʊ́ʊ mɔ́rɔ́, mɔ́ɔ́ weení mɛ́dɛkɛ́ɛ nabʊ́rʊ nɛ́. Ɩɩ́n, kpɔɔ lɛlɛɛɖɔ́ hálɩ nbó bíya-bíya-jɔ́ nɛ́, sɩ bayáa ma gɛ sɩsɩ wenbi‑niíni-dʊ́ʊ.
1.49: Káma, Ɖóni-rɩ́ŋa-dʊ́ʊ waalá ma wenbí nɛ́, bɩɩbá bɩɖɔ́ɔ. Ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ-dʊ́ʊ gɛ ɩgɛ́ɛ.
1.50: Wánnɩɩ́ wenbá bɛ́nnyɛ́m yɩ nɛ́ bagʊnyɔmɩ́nɩ báa ngbeére.
1.51: Waawɩ́lɩ ɩdɛ́ɛ ɖóni rɩ́ŋa ɩɖɔ́ɔ wenbá bángbaazɩ́ badɩ nɛ́.
1.52: Wɛɛvɛdɩ́ ɖóni-dɩnáa bɛdɛ́ɛ kowuro-gbelásɩ-rɔ, bɩka ɩkpáázɩ wenbá baavʊ́ʊ́zɩ badɩ nɛ́.
1.53: Waava nyɔɔ-dɩnáa ɖɔ́ɔ́lɛ kʊ́bɔńɖɛ, bɩka ɩɖɔ́ɔ liideé-dɩnáa bɛɖɛ́ɛ banʊ́ʊ́zɩ riké.
1.54: Wɔɔdɔ́ɔ́zɩ ɩdɛ́ɛ kʊnyɔnnɩɩrɛ́-rɔɔzɩ́, ngɛ wɔɔɖɔ́kɩ Israyɛ́ɛlɩ ɩzamɔ́ɔ kɩ́nlám yɩ bɔwʊtá nɛ́,
1.55: ńŋɩnáa wenbí waavʊ́ńɖuuná ɖájaájaanáa sɩsɩ wánbanáa Ibrahím na ibíya-bíya ɩlá bʊrɔ báa ngbeére hálɩ bɩ́dɛ́ndɛŋ́ nɛ́.»
1.56: Marɩyáma wɔɔjɔ́ɔ Elizabɛ́ɛtɩ-jɔ́ nyazɩ irodunáa noódoozo bɩlɛ́ naanɩ́ ɩlɔ́ɔ ɩbɩ́sɩ ɩdɛ́ɛ. Yaayá-dɛ́ɛ lʊrʊ́ʊ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m
1.57: Sáátɩ wenkí Elizabɛ́ɛtɩ-dɛ́ɛ lʊrʊ́ʊ waadála nɛ́, waalʊ́rʊ bú abaalʊ́.
1.58: Igoobíya na ɩdɛ́ɛ fáráńdɩ́-daá ńba waanɩ́ɩ bɩlɛ́ sɩsɩ Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ waabá ɩnɩ́ɩ ɩgʊnyɔḿ nɛ́, bɩɩlá wɛ niíni bána yɩ bánvaarɩ́.
1.59: Bú waalá wɛ́ lutoozo sɩ bɛbɛlɩ́ yɩ nɛ́, ngɛ bɔɔgɔ́nɩ. Bɔɔzɔ́ɔ́lɩ sɩsɩ bafa yɩ yɩ́ɖɛ sɩsɩ Sákarɩ, ńŋɩnáa bánÿaá ɩjaa nɛ́.
1.60: Amá, kɔɔ́wʊ wɔɔjɔ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Aayɩ́, sɩ bayáa yɩ gɛ sɩsɩ Yaayá.»
1.61: Ńna gɛ bɛlɛ́ boobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Naárʊ fɛ́yɩ́ nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ koobíre-daá bánÿaá yɩ bɩlɛ́!»
1.62: Ngɛ baavaná caáwʊ ɩzá bɔ́nbɔɔzɩnáa yɩ na níízi na batɩlɩ́ sɩsɩ wé gɛ ɩzɔɔlɛ́ɛ bayáa bú.
1.63: Ńna gɛ wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ becéle yɩ kpálɩfɔ́ɔ, ngɛ waaŋmáa kɔrɔ sɩsɩ: «Ɩdɛ́ɛ yɩ́ɖɛ gɛ Yaayá.» Ngɛ bɩɩlá barɩ́ŋa bítí.
1.64: Nɔɔ́ kʊ́ɖʊḿ nɛ́, wanzʊlʊmʊ́ʊ woobóɖi ɩbáázɩ ŋmatɩrɛ wánzám Ɩsɔ́ɔ.
1.65: Ńna gɛ bɩɩlá fáráńdɩ́-daá ńba rɩ́ŋa nɩdáárɛ, bɩka Yudée laadɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɛ́ɛ́dɩwá tɩwɛ bʊ́ʊ́nɩ-daá nɛ́ tɩdaá ɩráa wɛ́ngɛɛzɩ́ wenbí bɩrɩ́ŋa bɩɩlá nɛ́.
1.66: Ngɛ wenbá barɩ́ŋa bánnɩɩ́ tɩ nɛ́ bánmaazɩ́ tɩrɔ bɩka bɔ́nbɔɔzɩ́ badɩ sɩsɩ: «We gɛ bú ceení sɩ ɩkɔ́nɩ ɩbɩ́sɩ bɩlɛ́.» Káma, Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ sɩ́ŋɛ́ɛ ɩwɔ́rɔ́ gɛ na toovonúm. Yéńdi Sákarɩ weedée ɩsá Ɩsɔ́ɔ nɛ́
1.67: Kezeŋa Ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ ńga woozuná bú ɩjaa Sákarɩ, ngɛ waabáázɩ ŋmatɩrɛ na Ɩsɔ́ɔ nɔɔ́ wɔ́ndɔ́m sɩsɩ:
1.68: «Sám mɔɔ́na Ɖádʊ́ʊ, Israyɛ́ɛlɩ-dɛ́ɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ, káma, waagábɩ́sɩ́ná ɩlaakáarɩ ɩzamɔ́ɔ-rɔ ɩlɛ́ɛ kɩ.
1.69: Weegédíri ɖáa Lɛɛrʊ́ yíko-dʊ́ʊ ɩdɛ́ɛ bɔwʊtá-dʊ́ʊ wúro Ɖáwʊɖa-dɛ́ɛ kutoluú-dɛ bíya-daá.
1.70: Bɩlɛ́ gɛ waavʊ́ńbaná ɩdɛ́ɛ anɖébiwá ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ ńba ɖoo nɛ́ ɩŋmátɩ.
1.71: Waabaná wɛ ɩŋmátɩ sɩsɩ wɛ́nlɛɛ́ ɖáa ɖábáɖaanáa ndɛ́, bɩka ɩlɩzɩ́ ɖáa wenbá bádánjaa ɖɛ́dɛ́ɛ kazɔ́ɔ nɛ́ banʊ́ʊ́zɩ-daá.
1.72: Bɩlɛ́ gɛ waalá ɩwɩ́lɩ ɖájaájaanáa ɩdɛ́ɛ kʊnyɔnnɩɩrɛ́, bɩka ɩtɔ́ɔ́zɩ ɩdɛ́ɛ keɖiyá ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ ńga-rɔɔzɩ́.
1.73: Wɔɔdɔ́ɔ́zɩ wentí waavʊ́ńɖuuná ɖájaájaa Ibrahím nɛ́ bʊrɔ.
1.74: Tɩlɛ́ gɛ sɩsɩ ɩmʊ́ wánlɩzɩ́ɩ ɖáa ɖábáɖaanáa nʊ́ʊ́zɩ-daá, na iyéle ɖɩlá yɩ bɔwʊtá nɩdáárɛ fɛ́yɩ́,
1.75: bɩka ɖɩbɩ́sɩ ɩráa ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ ńba na wenbá bɔjɔwʊrɛ sɩɩzɛ́ɛ ɩmʊ́ waazá-daá ɖéweezuú rɩ́ŋa-daá nɛ́.
1.76: Bɩɩga nyɔ́ɔ́ móbú nɛ́, sɩ bɔkɔ́nɩ gɛ bayáa nya sɩsɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ bílí‑bílí-dʊ́ʊ-dɛ́ɛ anɖébi. Káma, nyɛ́ndɛ́ɛ Ɖádʊ́ʊ nɩ́bááwʊ ngbɩ́ɩ́rɩ ɩnɩ́báánɩ,
1.77: bɩka nÿéle ɩdɛ́ɛ zamɔ́ɔ ɩtɩlɩ́ sɩsɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ wɔ́ngɔnɩ́ sɩ ɩlɛ́ɛ kɩ, ngɛ na kɩdɛ́ɛ alaháácɩ́wá cɛ́m gɛ sɩ ɩlɛɛná kɩ.
1.78: Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ kʊnyɔnnɩɩrɛ́ kʊ́bɔńɖɛ wánlʊrʊ́ʊ wenbí nɛ́ nbɩlɛ́. Kɩdɩɩná gɛ weeyéle ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá ɖɛnyɛm ikédi ɖɔ́rɔ́ ńŋɩnáa wɩ́sɩ wángayáa nɛ́,
1.79: na ɖɛnyɛm kɩḿ kɩna wenbá bɔwɛ temenuú na sɩ́m nɩ́bááwʊ-daá nɛ́, bɩka kikéti ɖáa ɖɩnʊ́ŋ fɛɛzɩrɛ-dɛ́ɛ nɩ́bááwʊ-daá.»
1.80: Bú ɩlɛ́ ɩwɛ ɩbamáa bɩɩ́, bɩka ɩdɛ́ɛ áséńsí bamáa ɖɔɔmɩ́nɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ nɩ́bááwʊ-daá. Fáráńdɩ́wá lé ɩráa fɛ́yɩ́ nɛ́ tɩdaá gɛ wɔ́njɔwʊ́ʊ hálɩ bɩkɔ́nɩ bɩtála ɩlɩzɩ́ ɩdɩ ɩwɩ́lɩ Israyɛ́ɛlɩ zamɔ́ɔ.

2.1: Bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ kɩḿ, Róóma wúro kʊ́bɔnɩ́ Ogúsuto waava wɛ́ɖɛ sɩsɩ bákala ɩráa bɔwɛ laadásɩ wensí sɩrɩ́ŋa wénɖíi kʊ́bɔńdɩ sɩrɔ nɛ́.
2.2: Kaɖaa-dɛ́ɛ nbɩlɛ́ bángalɩ́ɩ ɩráa ńŋɩnáa bɩlɛ́ nɛ́. Bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ kɩḿ nɛ́, Kiriniwúusi kɛ́ɛ na Siríi laadɔ́ɔ-rɔ bɛɛŋɩrʊ́.
2.3: Báa weení wɛ́nɖɛɛ́ ɩdɛɛvʊ́lɔɔ́-daá gɛ bakáŋmáa ɩyɩ́ɖɛ.
2.4: Bɩnáábɩ́lɛ́ Ísifu ɖʊɖɔ waagʊrʊ́ Nazarɛ́ɛtɩ, tɛ́ɛ́dɩ tɩwɛ Galilée laadɔ́ɔ-rɔ nɛ́ tɩdaá ɩkpa Yudée laadɔ́ɔ-daá, wúro Ɖáwʊɖa-dɛ́ɛ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ bánÿaá tɩ sɩsɩ Bɛtɩlɛhɛ́ɛm nɛ́ tɩdaá, káma, igutoluú kɛgɛ́ɛ wúro Ɖáwʊɖa-dɛ́ɛ ɖugoré gɛ.
2.5: Woobó ɩ́na ɩdɛ́ɛ ábɔɔzɔɔ́ Marɩyáma sɩsɩ bakáŋmáa bayɩrá. Bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ, Marɩyáma na fuwá.
2.6: Bɔwɛ Bɛtɩlɛhɛ́ɛm ńna gɛ Marɩyáma-dɛ́ɛ lʊrʊ́ʊ waadála.
2.7: Ngɛ waalʊ́rʊ ɩdɛ́ɛ aléebú, bú abaalʊ́. Waamɩlɩná yɩ ɖidéére, bɩka ɩkpɔ́ɔ yɩ ɩfɩ́ɩ́zɩ fʊ́ńdɩ kpɩná kíɖíím ɖaaɖʊ́ʊ́ɖɛ-daá. Káma, bodoyuú ɖɩdáarɛ ɩgɔma ɖaazʊʊɖɛ́. Malááyɩ́ka waaɖʊ ɩlɩ́ɩ fʊ́ńdɩ kpɩná ketiráa-rɔ
2.8: Ketiráa nɛbɛ́rɛ wɛ fásɩ sɩwɛ fáráńdɩ́wá tɩḿ tɩdaá nɛ́ bénveríi bavʊ́ńdɩ kpɩná-rɔ nuvoowú.
2.9: Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ malááyɩ́ka waaɖʊ ɩlɩ́ɩ bɔrɔ, ngɛ Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ ásícé-dɛ́ɛ ɖɛnyɛm waalára kɩmɩlɩná wɛ́, ngɛ bɩɩbá bɩlá wɛ nɩdáárɛ.
2.10: Ńna gɛ malááyɩ́ka wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Nɩdáárɛ ɩ́kalá mɩ́ɩ, káma, mɔ́ɔ́gɔ́ná mɩ́ɩ Laabáárʊ Kífeńgi kɩ́ngɔnáa zamɔ́ɔ rɩ́ŋa wenbi‑niíni kʊ́bɔńbɩ nɛ́ gɛ.
2.11: Sinje baalʊ́rʊ mɩ́ɩ Lɛɛrʊ́ wúro Ɖáwʊɖa-dɛ́ɛ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá, ɩnáábɩ́lɛ́ Krísto Ɖádʊ́ʊ.
2.12: Ngɛ wenbí sɩ ɩtɩlɩ́ na yɩ nɛ́ nɖɔ́: mɩ́nnáa bú áfʊ́lʊḿ baamɩlɩná yɩ ɖidéére bɩka bafɩ́ɩ́zɩ yɩ fʊ́ńdɩ kpɩná kíɖíím ɖaaɖʊ́ʊ́ɖɛ-daá.»
2.13: Ngɛ malááyɩ́kawá tuutúúma waaɖʊ balɩ́ɩ nɔɔ́ kʊ́ɖʊḿ batasɩná malááyɩ́ka lí ńnɩ́ béndéédi yéńdi bánzám Ɩsɔ́ɔ sɩsɩ:
2.14: «Bása Ɩsɔ́ɔ weení ɩwɛ bílí‑bílí nɛ́, bɩka fɛɛzɩrɛ ɩcɔɔ ná wenbá ɩzɔɔlɛ́ɛ wɛ nɛ́ adɛ laadɔ́ɔ-rɔ.» Fʊ́ńdɩ kpɩná ketiráa wɛ́nɖɛɛ́ Bɛtɩlɛhɛ́ɛm
2.15: Sáátɩ wenkí malááyɩ́kawá waagʊrʊ́ babɩ́sɩ ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá nɛ́, ngɛ ketiráa wɔɔdɔ́ ɖamá sɩsɩ: «Bɩlɛ́ nɛ́ ɖíbo Bɛtɩlɛhɛ́ɛm, ɖɩkáná wenbí bɩɩlá gɛ Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ wɔɔzɔ́ɔ́lɩ sɩsɩ ɖɩ́tɩ́lɩ́ nɛ́.»
2.16: Ngɛ boodoózi bobó ńna. Baadála nɛ́, bɔɔmɔɔná Marɩyáma na Ísifu na bú áfʊ́lʊḿ ɩlɛ́ ɩvɩ́nɛ́ɛ fʊ́ńdɩ kpɩná kíɖíím ɖaaɖʊ́ʊ́ɖɛ-daá.
2.17: Baana yɩ nɛ́, ngɛ baadɩ́ wentí tɩrɩ́ŋa beevééri wɛ bú ɩmʊ́ ɩrɔ nɛ́ befééri wɛ.
2.18: Bɩɩlá wenbá barɩ́ŋa bénwelesí fééni ketiráa nɛ́ bítí wentí bándɩ́m nɛ́ tɩrɔ.
2.19: Bɩka Marɩyáma ɩlɛ́ ɩɖɔ́kɩná tɔ́m tɩḿ tɩrɩ́ŋa iwenbiré-daá wánmaazɩ́ tɩrɔ.
2.20: Ngɛ fʊ́ńdɩ kpɩná ketiráa wɔɔlɔ́ɔ babɩ́sɩ bekpé bɛdɛ́ɛ, bɩka bɔ́nɖɔɔzɩ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ bánzám yɩ wentí tɩrɩ́ŋa baanɩ́ɩ na baana nɛ́ tɩrɔɔzɩ́, ńŋɩnáa wenbí nɔ́ɔ́ malááyɩ́ka waavʊ́ńgéveeri wɛ nɛ́. Booboná Yeésu Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-daá
2.21: Biizúlu wɛ́ lutoozo sɩ bɛbɛlɩ́ bú nɛ́, ngɛ baava yɩ yɩ́ɖɛ sɩsɩ Yeésu, ńŋɩnáa malááyɩ́ka waavʊ́ńdɔḿ sɩsɩ báyaa yɩ naanɩ́ bɛyɛ́ɛ ivuwá nɛ́.
2.22: Bɩlɛ́ bʊwɔ́rɔ́ nɛ́, wɩ́rɛ wenɖé Múúsá-dɛ́ɛ Mará waazɩ́ɩ́zɩ sɩsɩ bú ɩgɔɔ na ɩjaa bála badɩ ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ nɛ́ ɖɩɩdála nɛ́, Ísifu na Marɩyáma booboná Yeésu Yerusalɛ́ɛm Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-daá sɩ bakáwɩlɩ yɩ Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ.
2.23: Káma, baaŋmáa Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Mará tákaraɖá-daá sɩsɩ: «Bú abaalʊ́ kaɖaa ńnɩ́ báa weení, Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ tɩɩná yɩ.»
2.24: Bibaasí nɛ́, bɔwɛná sɩ balá sarɔ́ɔ wenká Mará amʊ́ aazɩ́ɩ́zɩ sɩsɩ bála nɛ́, kɛlɛ́ gɛ avówa kʊ́fʊlʊmá náálɛ, yáá avówa báa weená-dɛ́ɛ kúmuwé náálɛ.
2.25: Bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ kɩḿ nɛ́, abaalʊ́ naárʊ wɛ Yerusalɛ́ɛm bánÿaá yɩ sɩsɩ Simeyɔ́ɔnɩ. Ɩrʊ́ ɩmʊ ɩgɛ́ɛ ɩrʊ́ weení ɩjɔwʊrɛ sɩɩzɛ́ɛ nɛ́ gɛ, bɩka ɩbá wénzewɔ́ɔ Ɩsɔ́ɔ. Ɩɖamáa weení sɩ ɩkɔ́nɩ ɩlɛ́ɛ Israyɛ́ɛlɩ nɛ́, bɩka Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Kezeŋa wɛ ɩrɔ.
2.26: Simeyɔ́ɔnɩ ɩmʊ́ nɛ́, Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Kezeŋa waavʊ́ńveeri yɩ sɩsɩ wánnáa Lɛɛrʊ́ weení Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ sɩ ikédiri yɩ nɛ́ naanɩ́ ɩsɩ́.
2.27: Bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ kɩḿ gɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Kezeŋa wooboná yɩ ibó Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-daá. Sáátɩ wenkí Yeésu ɩgɔɔ na ɩjaa bɔɔgɔná yɩ sɩ balá yɩ wenbí Mará-daá, baaɖʊ sɩsɩ bála nɛ́,
2.28: Simeyɔ́ɔnɩ waamʊ yɩ ɩkpɛ́kɩ ɩnʊ́ʊ́zɩ-daá ɩsá Ɩsɔ́ɔ wɔ́ndɔ́m sɩsɩ:
2.29: «Lɛlɛɛɖɔ́ nɛ́ Ɖádʊ́ʊ, nyánbɩɩzɩ́ nÿéle mɔ́ɔ́ nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ bɔwʊtá-dʊ́ʊ mazɩ́ fɛɛzɩrɛ-daá ńŋɩnáa nyɔ́ɔ́dɔ́ nɛ́.
2.30: Káma, mádɩtɩŋa mááná nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ lɛ́ɛ́dɩ na máázá.
2.31: Lɛ́ɛ́dɩ wentí nyáágbɩ́ɩ́rɩ tɩ nzɩ́ɩ yíriwá rɩ́ŋa nɛ́.
2.32: Tɩgɛ́ɛ na ɖɛnyɛm wenkí sɩ kiyéle na ɖúúlínya-daá yíriwá rɩ́ŋa ɩtɩlɩ́ nya nɛ́. Kɩ́nɖɔɔzɩ kʊ nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ zamɔ́ɔ Israyɛ́ɛlɩ.» Simeyɔ́ɔnɩ wánŋmatɩ́ wentí Yeésu-rɔ nɛ́
2.33: Wentí Simeyɔ́ɔnɩ wánŋmatɩ́ Yeésu-rɔ nɛ́ waalá Yeésu ɩgɔɔ na ɩjaa bítí.
2.34: Simeyɔ́ɔnɩ waaɖʊ wɛ alɩbáráka, ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ bú ɩgɔɔ Marɩyáma sɩsɩ: «Bɛɛ́ɛ, bú ceení-rɔɔzɩ́, Israyɛ́ɛlɩ-daá ɩráa ɖabata wánzalɩ́ɩ, bɩka nɛbɛ́rɛ ɩkʊrʊ́. Wánbɩsɩ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ seríya, amá, ɩráa wéngizíi yɩ.
2.35: Bɩlɛ́ gɛ sɩ bɩlá na ɩráa ɖabata-dɛ́ɛ lomaazɛ́ amʊ́sɛ́ɛ bewenbé-daá nɛ́ ɩlɩ́ɩ bayáána. Bɩɩga nyɔ́ɔ́ nyádɩtɩŋa nɛ́, nyánba nÿɛlɛ́m nyazɩ bɔɔzɔ́ nya tókobí bɩlɛ́.» Alʊ́ anɖébi Áanɩ wánŋmatɩ́ wentí Yeésu-rɔ nɛ́
2.36: Alʊ́ anɖébi naárʊ fʊnwɛ ńna ɖʊɖɔ, bánÿaá yɩ sɩsɩ Áanɩ. Fanʊwɛ́ɛlɩ wɛɛlɛ́ɛ nbɩlɛ́, bɩka Fanʊwɛ́ɛlɩ ɩlɛ́ ɩdɛ́ɛ gɛ Azɛ́ɛrɩ-dɛ́ɛ ɖugoré-daá. Áanɩ ɩmʊ́ wáńbá ɩbɩ́ɩ páá; bɩ́ɩ́zɩ lʊbɛ gɛ wɔɔjɔ́ɔ abaaladɔ́ɔ-rɔ
2.37: naanɩ́ ɩbɩ́sɩ leelú. Wáńdálɩ́ bɩ́ɩ́zɩ nɩɩ́náázá na nasɩ́náázá. Ɩ́dɛ́njɛḿ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-daá, ɩwɛ ńna gɛ nuvoowú na ɩdaawʊ́ wánlám yɩ bɔwʊtá, wɛ́nzɛɛ́ yɩ bɩka wɔ́nvɔkɩ́ nɔɔ́.
2.38: Bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ kɩḿ ɖʊɖɔ nɛ́, alʊ́ ɩmʊ́ waajáŋ ɩtála, ngɛ waabáázɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ sám bɩka wénveerím wenbá barɩ́ŋa baɖamáa Yerusalɛ́ɛm-dɛ́ɛ lɛ́ɛ́dɩ nɛ́ bú ɩmʊ́ ɩdɛ́ɛ tɔ́m. Yeésu na ɩgɔɔ na ɩjaa baagábɩ́sɩ Nazarɛ́ɛtɩ
2.39: Sáátɩ wenkí Yeésu ɩgɔɔ na ɩjaa baalá wenbí bɩrɩ́ŋa Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Mará waazɩ́ɩ́zɩ sɩsɩ bála nɛ́, bána yɩ bɔɔlɔ́ɔ babɩ́sɩ Nazarɛ́ɛtɩ bɛdɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá, Galilée laadɔ́ɔ-rɔ.
2.40: Bɩɩga bú nɛ́, ɩlɛ́ ɩwɛ ɩbamáa bɩɩ́, tɔnʊʊ́ wángbáa ɖóni, áséńsí bamáa yɩ ɖɔɔmɩ́nɩ bɩka Ɩsɔ́ɔ sɩ́ŋɛ́ɛ ɩwɔ́rɔ́. Yeésu wooyuú bɩ́ɩ́zɩ fuú na nasɩ́lɛ nɛ́
2.41: Báa bɩ́nɩ weení, Yeésu ɩgɔɔ na ɩjaa bɛ́ndɛ́rɛ́ɖɛ́ɛ Yerusalɛ́ɛm Fɛlɛ nɖɛ́ɛ-dɛ́ɛ jíńgáárɩ́ ɖíi.
2.42: Sáátɩ wenkí wooyuú bɩ́ɩ́zɩ fuú na nasɩ́lɛ nɛ́, bána yɩ bɛɛɖɛ́ɛ ńŋɩnáa bɩgɛ́ɛ bɛdɛ́ɛ jíńgáárɩ́-dɛ́ɛ ɖɔ́ɔ́ná nɛ́.
2.43: Beeɖi jíńgáárɩ́ bɩtɛ́ nɛ́, baabɩ́sɩ bekpé. Amá, Yeésuyɔ́ɔ waawalɩ́ Yerusalɛ́ɛm bɩka ɩgɔɔ na ɩjaa badatɩlɩ́.
2.44: Bɔjɔɔ́ɔ sɩsɩ ɩwɛ bogoobíya bána wɛ bɔgɔwɛ nɩ́bááwʊ-daá nɛ́ bɔlɔwʊtáá, ngɛ baanʊ́ŋ hálɩ wɩ́rɛ ɖebilibili. Bɩlɛ́ bʊwɔ́rɔ́ gɛ baabáázɩ yɩ cáádɩ bogoobíya na bɔɖɔndɩnáa lɔwʊtáá,
2.45: amá, badana yɩ. Ngɛ bɔɔlɔ́ɔ babɩ́sɩ Yerusalɛ́ɛm babamáa yɩ cáádɩ.
2.46: Wɛ́ náádoozo wɩ́rɛ gɛ baana yɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-daá. Ɩjɔɔ́ɔ Mará wɩlɩɖáa lɔwʊtáá wénwelesí wɛ, bɩka wɔ́nbɔɔzɩ́ wɛ tɔ́m.
2.47: Ɩdɛ́ɛ tɩlɩ́ɩ na wentí wónbusí nɛ́ waabá bɩjɔɔ́ɔ wenbá bénwelesí yɩ nɛ́ bítí.
2.48: Ɩgɔɔ na ɩjaa baana yɩ nɛ́, bɩɩbá bɩlá wɛ bítí. Ńna gɛ ɩgɔɔ wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Móbú, ngbaalá gɛ nyáálá ɖáa bɩlɛ́. Bɛɛ mána njaa ɖálaakáarɩ wáńgʊ́rʊ́ nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ cáádɩ-daá.»
2.49: Ngɛ Yeésu woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ngbaalá gɛ mɩ́njáádɩ ma. Mɩ́ɩ́fʊnzɩ sɩsɩ máta mɔ́wɛ Majaa-dɛ́ɛ ɖaána-daá?»
2.50: Amá, bɛlɛ́ badanɩ́ɩ wentí waaŋmátɩ wɛ nɛ́ tugutoluú.
2.51: Ngɛ waagʊrʊ́ ifu wɛ bekpé Nazarɛ́ɛtɩ bɩka wánnɩɩnáa wɛ. Ɩgɔɔ ɩlɛ́ ɩɖɔ́kɩná tɔ́mwá tɩḿ tɩrɩ́ŋa iwenbiré-daá.
2.52: Bɩɩga Yeésu ɩlɛ́ ɩwɛ ɩbamáa bɩɩ́ bɩka ɩdɛ́ɛ áséńsí bamáa ɖɔɔmɩ́nɩ. Ɩsɔ́ɔ sɩ́ŋɛ́ɛ ɩwɔ́rɔ́ bɩka ɩdɔ́m mɔɔ́ɔ ɩráa.

3.1: Róóma wúro kʊ́bɔnɩ́ Tibɛ́ɛrɩ-dɛ́ɛ kowúrɔ́ɔ ɖíi-dɛ́ɛ bɩ́nɩ ákɩzaalʊʊ́ ńnɩ́-daá nɛ́, Pɔ́nsɩ Piláatɩ kɛ́ɛ na Yudée laadɔ́ɔ-rɔ bɛɛŋɩrʊ́, Eróodi ɩlɛ́ wénɖíi kowúrɔ́ɔ Galilée laadɔ́ɔ-rɔ bɩka igoobú Filíipu ɩlɛ́ wénɖíi Iturée na Tirakonitíidi laadásɩ-rɔ, bɩka Lizaniyáasɩ ɩlɛ́ wénɖíi Abilɛ́ɛnɩ laadɔ́ɔ-rɔ.
3.2: Áanɩ na Kayífu gɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa kʊ́bɔnáa. Bɩdɛ́ɛ bɩ́nɩ ɩmʊ́ gɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ waaŋmatɩná Yaayá Sákarɩ biyaalʊ́ tɛɛwʊ́lɔ́ɔ́-daá.
3.3: Ngɛ ɩlɛ́ waalɩ́ɩ ikíli laadɔ́ɔ kɔwɛ ná Yɔrɔdáanɩ buwá fáráńdɩ́ nɛ́ karɩ́ŋa kadaá wánlám waázu sɩsɩ: «Ɩgɛ́ɛ mɩ́lakásɩ bɩka iyéle belíri mɩ́ɩ lɩ́m-daá bɔsɔ mɩ́ɩ túúbá lɩ́m, na Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɩcɛ́ mɩ́dɛ́ɛ alaháácɩ́wá.»
3.4: Bɩɩlá bɩlɛ́ gɛ na wentí baaŋmáa anɖébi Esáya-dɛ́ɛ tákaraɖá-daá nɛ́ ikóódi, tɩlɛ́ gɛ sɩsɩ: «Lowú nakɩ́rɩ wɔɔvɔ tɛɛwʊ́lɔ́ɔ́-daá sɩsɩ: “Ɩgbɩ́ɩ́rɩ Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ nɩ́bááwʊ, ɩzɩ́ɩ́zɩ ɩdɛ́ɛ níbeyísi.
3.5: Bónzuurí kazalɩ́sɩ bɩlá ɖɛtɛrɛ‑tɛrɛ bɩka bɔyɔ́ bʊ́ʊ́nɩ rɩ́ŋa na buurásɩ rɩ́ŋa bɩlá ɖɛtɛrɛ‑tɛrɛ. Nɩ́báánɩ tɩmɩláa nɛ́, bɔ́nnyɔɔzɩ́ tɩ tɩsɩ́ɩ́zɩ; níbeyísi bɩ́ńdɔ́wʊ́ sɩ nɛ́, bɔ́nnyɔɔzɩ́ sɩ sɩlá ɖɛtɛrɛ‑tɛrɛ,
3.6: na báa weení ɩna nŋɩ́nɩ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ wɛ́nlɛɛ́ ɩrʊ́ nɛ́.”»
3.7: Yaayá wɔɔdɔ́ ɩráa tuutúúma bɔɔgɔ́nɩ ɩjɔ́ sɩsɩ ílíri wɛ lɩ́m-daá ɩsɔ wɛ túúbá lɩ́m nɛ́ sɩsɩ: «Mɩ́ɩ bɔɔzá ana ɖɔ́! Weení waawɩlɩ ná mɩ́ɩ sɩsɩ ísé ɩlɩ́ɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m fʊʊnáa tɩɩjʊ́ʊ nɛ́ tɩdaá.
3.8: Ɩlá lakásɩ sɩ́nwɩlɩ́ɩ sɩsɩ mɩ́ɩ́lá túúbá ɩkɛ́ɛ nɛ́. Ɩ́kamáázɩ mɩ́dáá sɩsɩ mɩ́jaájaa gɛ Ibrahím nɛ́ bɩɩdɛ́. Káma, ménveerím mɩ́ɩ sɩsɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ wánbɩɩzɩ́ ɩkpɔ́ɔ bɔ́ ana ɖɔ́ ɩbɩsɩná Ibrahím kutoluú-dɛ bíya.
3.9: Báńgbɩɩrɩ kpenbiiyá sɩ bɛbɛlɩ́ na tɩ́ɩ́nɩ tigutolíni-dɛ nɛ́. Tɩɩwʊ́ wenkí rɩ́ŋa kɩ́dánɖʊ́ʊ bíya kazɔ́ɔ ńba nɛ́, bɛ́nbɛlɩ́ɩ kɩ baɖʊ nimíni-daá.»
3.10: Ńna gɛ zamɔ́ɔ wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, wé gɛ bɩmɔɔ́na ɖɩlá ɖɔ́.»
3.11: Ngɛ woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Weení ɩwɛná ɖaazíkiwá natɩ́lɛ nɛ́, ɩ́fá weení ɩvɛ́yɩ́na nɛ́ kʊ́ɖʊmʊ́ʊ, bɩka weení ɩwɛná kíɖíím nɛ́, ɩlá bɩlɛ́ ɖʊɖɔ.»
3.12: Tikée mʊʊráa ɖʊɖɔ wɔɔgɔ́nɩ sɩ belíri wɛ lɩ́m-daá bɔsɔ wɛ túúbá lɩ́m, ngɛ bɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Kʊ́bɔnɩ́, wé gɛ bɩmɔɔ́na ɖɔ́ɔ́ ɖɩlá.»
3.13: Ngɛ woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ɩ́kɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ naárʊ bɩcɛzɩ́ wenbí baazɩ́ɩ mɩ́ɩ nɛ́.»
3.14: Sɔ́ɔ́jawá ɖʊɖɔ wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Nɛ́ ɖɔ́ɔ́ ní, wé gɛ bɩmɔɔ́na ɖɩlá.» Ngɛ woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ɩ́kɛlɛ́ɛ liideé na ɖóni naárʊ-jɔ́, ngʊ́ íkomúúli naárʊ ɩbɛlɩ́ bʊbɔ́tɩ ɩrɔ. Ɩzɩŋná mɩ́vɛrɩ́tɩ.»
3.15: Ńŋɩnáa zamɔ́ɔ fʊnɖamáa na tamɔ́ɔ kʊ́bɔńga nɛ́, báa weení wɔ́nbɔɔzɩ́ ɩdɩ tɔ́m Yaayá-rɔ sɩsɩ bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ ɩmʊ́ gɛ Lɛɛrʊ́?
3.16: Ńna gɛ Yaayá woobúsi barɩ́ŋa sɩsɩ: «Lɩ́m-daá gɛ mɔ́ɔ́ ménliríi mɩ́ɩ mɔ́nzɔ́ɔ mɩ́ɩ túúbá lɩ́m. Amá, weení ɩgɛrɛŋɛ mɔ́wɔ́rɔ́ nɛ́, waagɩ́lɩ ma, mádatála malɩzɩ́ yɩ ɩdakaḿwá. Ɩlɛ́ sɩ ilíri mɩ́ɩ Kezeŋa Ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ ńga-daá gɛ na nimíni.
3.17: Ɩɖɔ́kɩná kɩ́falanákʊ ɩnʊ́ʊ́zɩ-daá sɩ ɩlɩzɩ́ tolá fɔɔlʊʊ́ bɩka ɩkpɔ́ɔ mɩlá ɩbɩ́rɩ igbeewú-daá, na ɩkpɔ́ɔ tolá ɩbɩ́rɩ nimíni ɩ́dánɖɩḿ nɛ́ ɩdaá biɖe.»
3.18: Na tɔndasɩrɛwá ndɩ‑ndɩ ɖabata-daá gɛ Yaayá weeveeri ná wɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Laabáárʊ Kífeńgi.
3.19: Amá, Yaayá wooyooná Eróodi weení wénɖíi kowúrɔ́ɔ Galilée laadɔ́ɔ-rɔ nɛ́. Káma, wɔɔgbɔ́ɔ igoobú ɖɛɛlʊ́ Erodiyáadɩ, bɩka waalá lakásɩ sɩdakazɔ́ɔ nɛ́ ɖʊɖɔ bʊɖɔ́ɔ.
3.20: Ńna gɛ woogúti ɩlá lakásɩ nasɩ́rɩ sɩdakazɔ́ɔ nɛ́ ɩtásɩ. Sɩlɛ́ gɛ sɩsɩ weeyéle bakpa Yaayá bɔtɔ sáráka. Yaayá waalá Yeésu lɩ́m-daá liríi-dɛ́ɛ sɔ́ɔ́zɩ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 3.13-17 na Mrk 1.9-11 ɖʊɖɔ)
3.21: Sáátɩ wenkí bɔɔzɔ zamɔ́ɔ rɩ́ŋa túúbá lɩ́m bɩtɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ bɔɔzɔ Yeésu ɖʊɖɔ. Sáátɩ wenkí ɩwɛ ɩbamáa sʊlʊ́ʊ nɛ́, ngɛ ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá waadʊlʊ́,
3.22: ngɛ Kezeŋa Ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ ńga weegédi nyazɩ ɖuvóóre kʊ́fʊlʊńɖɛ bɩlɛ́ kosóm ɩrɔ. Ńna gɛ baanɩ́ɩ lowú nakɩ́rɩ ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá sɩsɩ: «Nyɔ́ɔ́ gɛ Mebiyaalʊ́ máábá mɔ́zɔɔlɛ́ɛ yɩ nɛ́, nyɔ́rɔ́ gɛ mááɖʊ́ mɛ́dɛ́ɛ sɔɔlɩ́m rɩ́ŋa.» Yeésu ɩjaájaanáa (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 1.1-17 ɖʊɖɔ)
3.23: Yeésu wɛná bɩ́ɩ́zɩ ákoosaaláa bɩlɛ́ gɛ waabáázɩ ɩdɩmɛ́rɛ. Ɩráa wánvʊnmaazɩ́ gɛ sɩsɩ Ísifu biyaalʊ́ gɛ ɩgɛ́ɛ. Elíi waalʊrʊ ná Ísifu,
3.24: Matáatɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Elíi, Léévi ɩlʊ́rʊ Matáatɩ, Mɛlɩkíi ɩlʊ́rʊ Léévi, Iyanayíi ɩlʊ́rʊ Mɛlɩkíi, bɩka Ísifu ɩlʊ́rʊ Iyanayíi.
3.25: Matatiyáasɩ waalʊ́rʊ Ísifu, Amɔ́ɔsɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Matatiyáasɩ, Nawumíi ɩlʊ́rʊ Amɔ́ɔsɩ, Ɛsɩlíi ɩlʊ́rʊ Nawumíi, Nagayíi ɩlʊ́rʊ Ɛsɩlíi.
3.26: Máatɩ waalʊ́rʊ Nagayíi, Matatiyáasɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Máatɩ, Semɛ́ɛnɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Matatiyáasɩ, Iyoosɛ́ɛkɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Semɛ́ɛnɩ, Iyodáa ɩlʊ́rʊ Iyoosɛ́ɛkɩ,
3.27: Iyoyanáanɩ waalʊ́rʊ Iyodáa, Réeza ɩlʊ́rʊ Iyoyanáanɩ, Zorobabɛ́ɛlɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Réeza, Salatɩyɛ́ɛlɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Zorobabɛ́ɛlɩ, bɩka Neríi ɩlʊ́rʊ Salatɩyɛ́ɛlɩ.
3.28: Mɛlɩkíi waalʊ́rʊ Neríi, Adíi ɩlʊ́rʊ Mɛlɩkíi, Kazáamɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Adíi, Ɛlɩmadáamɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Kazáamɩ, bɩka Ɛ́ɛrɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Ɛlɩmadáamɩ.
3.29: Yeésu waalʊ́rʊ Ɛ́ɛrɩ, Eliyezɛ́ɛrɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Yeésu, Iyorimíi ɩlʊ́rʊ Eliyezɛ́ɛrɩ, Matáatɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Iyorimíi, bɩka Léévi ɩlʊ́rʊ Matáatɩ.
3.30: Simeyɔ́ɔnɩ waalʊ́rʊ Léévi, Yudáa ɩlʊ́rʊ Simeyɔ́ɔnɩ, Ísifu ɩlʊ́rʊ Yudáa, Iyonáamɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Ísifu, bɩka Eliyakíimi ɩlʊ́rʊ Iyonáamɩ.
3.31: Meleyáa waalʊ́rʊ Eliyakíimi, Menáa ɩlʊ́rʊ Meleyáa, Matatáa ɩlʊ́rʊ Menáa, Natáanɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Matatáa, bɩka Ɖáwʊɖa ɩlʊ́rʊ Natáanɩ.
3.32: Yesée waalʊ́rʊ Ɖáwʊɖa, Obɛ́ɛdɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Yesée, Bóozɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Obɛ́ɛdɩ, Saláa ɩlʊ́rʊ Bóozɩ, bɩka Nasɔ́ɔnɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Sulemáana.
3.33: Aminadáabɩ waalʊ́rʊ Nasɔ́ɔnɩ, Adimíini ɩlʊ́rʊ Aminadáabɩ, Arɩníi ɩlʊ́rʊ Adimíini, Ɛsɩrɔ́ɔmɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Arɩníi, Farɛ́ɛsɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Ɛsɩrɔ́ɔmɩ, bɩka Yudáa ɩlʊ́rʊ Farɛ́ɛsɩ.
3.34: Yaakúbu waalʊ́rʊ Yudáa, Ɩsaáka ɩlʊ́rʊ Yaakúbu, Ibrahím ɩlʊ́rʊ Ɩsaáka, Teráa ɩlʊ́rʊ Ibrahím, bɩka Nahɔ́ɔrɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Teráa.
3.35: Serúki waalʊ́rʊ Nahɔ́ɔrɩ, Ragóo ɩlʊ́rʊ Serúki, Falɛ́ɛkɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Ragóo, Ebɛ́ɛrɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Farɛ́ɛkɩ, bɩka Saláa ɩlʊ́rʊ Ebɛ́ɛrɩ.
3.36: Kayinám waalʊ́rʊ Saláa, Arɩfagizáadɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Kayinám, Sɛ́ɛmɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Arɩfagizáadɩ, Núhum ɩlʊ́rʊ Sɛ́ɛmɩ, bɩka Lamɛ́ɛkɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Núhum.
3.37: Matusaláa waalʊ́rʊ Lamɛ́ɛkɩ, Enɔ́ɔkɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Matusaláa, Yarɛ́ɛdɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Enɔ́ɔkɩ, Maleleyɛ́ɛlɩ ɩlʊ́rʊ Yarɛ́ɛdɩ, bɩka Kayinám ɩlʊ́rʊ Maleleyɛ́ɛlɩ.
3.38: Enɔ́ɔsɩ waalʊ́rʊ Kayinám, Séti ɩlʊ́rʊ Enɔ́ɔsɩ, Áɖam ɩlʊ́rʊ Séti, bɩka Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɩlá Áɖam.

4.1: Kezeŋa Ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ ńga woozuná Yeésu, ngɛ waalɩ́ɩ Yɔrɔdáanɩ buwá-daá ɩkábɩsɩ ngɛ kooboná yɩ tɛɛwʊ́lɔ́ɔ́-daá.
4.2: Wɔɔjɔ́ɔ ńna wɛ́ nɛɛ́lɛ bɩka Sitáánɩ wánÿɩ́m yɩ kɔdɔ́sɩ. Ideɖi nabʊ́rʊ wɛ́-bíya bɛḿ badaá. Wɛ́-bíya bɛḿ bɛɛdɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ nyɔɔ́sɩ waagʊ yɩ.
4.3: Ńna gɛ Sitáánɩ wɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «A nyɛ́gɛ́ɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ Biyaalʊ́, tɔ bʊ́ʊ́rɛ ɖɩna ɖɩbɩ́sɩ kíɖíím.»
4.4: Ngɛ Yeésu woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Baaŋmáa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Tɔ́m Tákaraɖá-daá sɩsɩ: “Bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ kíɖíím riké gɛ ɩrʊ́ wénɖíi na ɩcɔ́ɔ weezuú-daá.”»
4.5: Ngɛ Sitáánɩ wooboná yɩ lénlé bɩɩbá buwóro nɛ́ ɩwɩ́lɩ yɩ sáa kʊ́ɖʊmʊ́ʊ-daá ɖúúlínya-dɛ́ɛ kowúrásɩ rɩ́ŋa,
4.6: ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Mánváa nya yíko kɩna kɩrɩ́ŋa, na kowúrásɩ na sɩdɛ́ɛ ɖɔ́ɔ́lɛ rɩ́ŋa, káma, mɔ́ɔ́ gɛ baava yíko bɩrɩ́ŋa bɩlɛ́ bʊrɔ, ngɛ weení mɔ́ɔ́zɔ́ɔ́lɩ nɛ́ gɛ mánváa.
4.7: Bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, a nyáágá nyáɖʊná-rɔ ngúu ma tɛ́ɛ́dɩ, mánváa nya bɩrɩ́ŋa.»
4.8: Ngɛ Yeésu woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Baaŋmáa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Tɔ́m Tákaraɖá-daá sɩsɩ: “Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ riké gɛ nyónguú tɛ́ɛ́dɩ, ngɛ iriké gɛ nyánlám bɔwʊtá.”»
4.9: Ńna gɛ Sitáánɩ wooboná Yeésu Yerusalɛ́ɛm, ɩsɩ́ɩ yɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga kʊjʊʊ́-daá. Ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «A nyɛ́gɛ́ɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ Biyaalʊ́, tɔ nyádɩ nzúu adɛ,
4.10: káma, baaŋmáa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Tɔ́m Tákaraɖá-daá sɩsɩ: “Ɩsɔ́ɔ wánváa ɩdɛ́ɛ malááyɩ́kawá wɛ́ɖɛ befére nyɔ́rɔ́,
4.11: bɩka bɛkpɛ́kɩ nya banʊ́ʊ́zɩ-daá, na nyɔ́nʊvɔ́rɛ íkotuúli bʊ́ʊ́rɛ.”»
4.12: Ngɛ Yeésu woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Baadáŋmáa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Tɔ́m Tákaraɖá-daá sɩsɩ: “Ńdánɖaazɩ Nyádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ nbɛ́ɛ sɩsɩ wánbɩɩzɩ́?”»
4.13: Sitáánɩ waayɩ́ yɩ kɔdɔ́sɩ ɩwɩ́ɩ nɛ́, ngɛ wɛɛɖɛ́ɛ iyéle yɩ hálɩ sáátɩ kɩ́falʊʊ́. Yeésu waabáázɩ ɩdɩmɛ́rɛ Galilée laadɔ́ɔ-daá (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 4.12-17 na Mrk 1.14-15 ɖʊɖɔ)
4.14: Ngɛ Yeésu wɔɔlɔ́ɔ ɩbɩ́sɩ Galilée bɩka Kezeŋa Ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ ńga-dɛ́ɛ ɖóni wɛ ɩrɔ. Ngɛ ɩyɩ́ɖɛ wɛɛzɛ́ɛ fáráńdɩ́ kɩḿ kɩrɩ́ŋa kɩdaá.
4.15: Wánwɩlɩ́ɩ ɩráa bɛdɛ́ɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɖaazɛɛɖɛ́wá-daá bɩka barɩ́ŋa bánzám yɩ. Yeésu-dɛ́ɛ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá ńba tafa yɩ toovonúm (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 13.53-58 na Mrk 6.1-6 ɖʊɖɔ)
4.16: Yeésu wɛɛɖɛ́ɛ Nazarɛ́ɛtɩ, tɛ́ɛ́dɩ wentí tɩdaá wɔɔjɔ́ɔ ɩbɩ́ɩ nɛ́. Ngɛ Fɛɛzɩrɛ wɩ́rɛ, waazʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɖaazɛɛɖɛ́ ńŋɩnáa bɩdɛ́rɛ́gɛ́ɛ ɩdɛ́ɛ ɖɔ́ɔ́ná nɛ́. Ngɛ waagʊrʊ́ sɩ ɩkála Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m.
4.17: Ngɛ beejéle yɩ anɖébi Esáya-dɛ́ɛ tákaraɖá. Woovulú kɩ nɛ́, ngɛ bɩɩzaaná lénlé baaŋmáa sɩsɩ:
4.18: «Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Kezeŋa wɛ mɔ́rɔ́, waalɩzɩ́ ma sɩsɩ méveeri kadanbʊrʊ́sɩ Laabáárʊ Kífeńgi. Weegédíri ma sɩsɩ méveeri sáráka-dɩnáa sɩsɩ bɛ́njɛ́m wɛ, mevééri njɛma sɩsɩ baazá wónvulúu babáázɩ náa, na meyéle wenbá bánnaazɩ́ wɛ́ nɛ́ boyuú badɩ,
4.19: na mevééri mɩ́ɩ Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ kʊnyɔnnɩɩrɛ́ bɩ́nɩ.»
4.20: Waagála bɩtɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ waabɩsɩná tákaraɖá ifu, icéle kɩ bɔwʊtá-dʊ́ʊ, ngɛ weedí ɩcɔ́ɔ. Wenbá barɩ́ŋa bɔwɛ ńna nɛ́, baabá bɛbɛɛ́na yɩ tíḿḿ.
4.21: Ńna gɛ wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m mɩ́ɩ́nɩ́ɩ tɩ ɖɔ́ nɛ́, sinje gɛ tiigóódi.»
4.22: Ngɛ ɩdɔ́m waalá barɩ́ŋa mááɖé bánzám bɩka bɩjɔɔ́ɔ wɛ bítí kʊnyɔnnɩɩrɛ́-dɛ́ɛ waázu wánlám kɩ nɛ́ kɩrɔɔzɩ́, bɩka bɔ́ndɔ́m sɩsɩ: «Bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ Ísifu biyaalʊ́ nbɩlɛ́?»
4.23: Ńna gɛ Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ sɩsɩ: «Báa bɩɩlá nŋɩ́nɩ́, mínduú ma ɖudúúre ɖɩna sɩsɩ: “Faadɩ-ɖʊʊrʊ́, waazɩ nyádɩ; ɖáánɩ́ɩ wenbí bɩrɩ́ŋa nyáagála Kapɛrɩnawʊ́m nɛ́, la ńŋɩnáa bɩlɛ́ ɖʊɖɔ nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá cé.”»
4.24: Ngɛ waadásɩ ɩtɔ́ wɛ ɖʊɖɔ sɩsɩ: «Ménveerím mɩ́ɩ toovonúm sɩsɩ anɖébi naárʊ fɛ́yɩ́ bánváa yɩ gírímá ɩdɩtɩŋa ɩdɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá.
4.25: Bɩlɛ́ bibaasí, anɖébi Elíya-dɛ́ɛ sáátɩ, aláa leeláa waabá bɔɖɔ́ɔ Israyɛ́ɛlɩ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá sáátɩ wenkí tɛ́ɛ́wʊ waagba hálɩ bɩ́ɩ́zɩ nasúdoozo na fɔɔlʊʊ́, ngɛ nyɔɔ́sɩ kʊ́bɔńzɩ waazʊ́ʊ laadɔ́ɔ rɩ́ŋa nɛ́.
4.26: Amá, na bɩrɩ́ŋa, Ɩsɔ́ɔ tetíri Elíya badaá naárʊ-jɔ́, asée Sarɛpɩtáa tɛ́ɛ́dɩ tɩwɛ Sidɔ́ɔnɩ laadɔ́ɔ-daá nɛ́-dɛ́ɛ alʊ́ leelú-jɔ́ riké.
4.27: Anɖébi Elizée-dɛ́ɛ sáátɩ, cɛnɩ́sɩ waabá sɩɖɔ́ɔ Israyɛ́ɛlɩ laadɔ́ɔ-daá, amá, sɩdaá báa nɛkɛ́rɛ tawáa kalá ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ, asée Siríi laadɔ́ɔ-daá cɛnɩŋa Namáanɩ riké.»
4.28: Wenbá bɔwɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɖaazɛɛɖɛ́ nɛ́, baabá bɛyɛ́ɛ baaná baanɩ́ɩ tɔ́mwá tɩḿ nɛ́.
4.29: Barɩ́ŋa baagʊrʊ́ banára Yeésu balɩzɩ́ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ. Booboná yɩ buurɔɔ́ wenká kɔrɔ bɛdɛ́ɛ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ wɛ nɛ́ kɛdɛ́ɛ kʊjʊʊ́-daá sɩsɩ na bɛkɛ́vɛ́dɩ́ yɩ ɩsála kazalɩ́ya-daá.
4.30: Amá, ɩlɛ́ wɔɔgbɔɔná bɔlɔwʊtáá ɩɖɛ́ɛ ɩnɩ́bááwʊ. Yeésu wɔɔɖɔ́ɔ zííni ɩrʊ́ naárʊ-rɔ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mrk 1.21-28 ɖʊɖɔ)
4.31: Woobó ɩtála Kapɛrɩnawʊ́m, tɛ́ɛ́dɩ tɩwɛ Galilée laadɔ́ɔ-daá nɛ́ tɩdaá. Ngɛ Fɛɛzɩrɛ wɩ́rɛ nɛ́, ɩwɛ wánwɩlɩ́ɩ ɩráa.
4.32: Ɩdɛ́ɛ wɩlɩ́ɩ waabá bɩlá wɛ bítí, káma, wánwɩlɩnáa yíko wenkí Ɩsɔ́ɔ weejéle yɩ nɛ́ gɛ.
4.33: Ɩrʊ́ naárʊ wɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɖaazɛɛɖɛ́ ɩwɛná zííni; ngɛ ɩrʊ́ ɩmʊ́ woogóo bɩcáárɩ sɩsɩ:
4.34: «Ówu! Yeésu Nazarɛ́ɛtɩ ńnɩ́, wé gɛ nyɔ́zɔɔlɛ́ɛ na ɖáa. Nyɔ́ɔ́gɔ́nɩ sɩ ndɛlɛ́sɩ ɖáa yáá wé. Máábá mányɩ weení nyɛ́gɛ́ɛ nɛ́: nyɔ́ɔ́ gɛ Ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ-dʊ́ʊ weení Ɩsɔ́ɔ weegédíri yɩ nɛ́.»
4.35: Ngɛ Yeésu waagazɩ́ kɩ na ɖóni ɩtɔ́ kɩ sɩsɩ: «Su tɔ́m, bɩka nlɩ́ɩ ɩrʊ́ ceení-rɔɔzɩ́.» Ńna gɛ zííni wɔɔlɔ ɩrʊ́ ɩmʊ́ adɛ ɩráa lɔwʊtáá kɩcáŋ kɩlɩ́ɩ ɩrɔ. Amá, kɩdalá yɩ nabʊ́rʊ bɩdaavé nɛ́.
4.36: Bɩɩbá bɩlá wenbá barɩ́ŋa bɔwɛ ńna nɛ́ bítí hálɩ bɔ́nbɔɔzɩ́ ɖamá sɩsɩ: «Ŋmatɩrɛ wenɖé gɛ ɖɩna bɩlɛ́! Wánŋmatɩnáa zííniwá na yíko páá bɩka tɩlɛ́ tɩ́nlɩɩ́.»
4.37: Ngɛ Yeésu yɩ́ɖɛ waabá ɖɩsɛ́ɛ fáráńdɩ́ kɩḿ kɩrɩ́ŋa kɩdaá. Yeésu waawáázɩ kʊdɔndɩnáa ɖabata (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 8.14-17 na Mrk 1.29-34 ɖʊɖɔ)
4.38: Yeésu waalɩ́ɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɖaazɛɛɖɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ woobó ɩɖɛ́ɛ Simɔ́ɔnɩ-dɛ́ɛ ɖaána. Waadála nɛ́, Simɔ́ɔnɩ nɔɔzɔ́ɔ wánnyaadɩ́ ɩdɔnʊʊ́ ɩbá kizoláa. Ngɛ baavɩ́nɩ Yeésu sɩsɩ ɩ́waazɩ yɩ.
4.39: Ńna gɛ Yeésu woolúúzi ɩdɩ ɩrɔ ɩkazɩ́ kʊdɔḿ, ngɛ waawáa, ɩkʊrʊ́ ńna‑ńna ɩɖʊ wɛ kíɖíím.
4.40: Wɩ́sɩ waazála nɛ́, wenbá barɩ́ŋa bɔwɛná kʊdɔndɩnáa bánnyaadɩ́ kʊdɔmɩ́nɩ ndɩ‑ndɩ nɛ́ bɔɔgɔ́gɔ́ná wɛ Yeésu-jɔ́. Ngɛ ɩlɛ́ waadɩ́nɩ wɛ nʊ́ʊ́zɩ bɩka ɩwáázɩ wɛ.
4.41: Zííniwá ɖʊɖɔ waalɩ́ɩ ɖabata-daá tíngoó sɩsɩ: «Nyɔ́ɔ́ gɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ Biyaalʊ́!» Amá, Yeésu waabá ɩkazɩ́ tɩ bɩka ikiziná tɩ sɩsɩ tɩ́kaŋmatɩ, káma, tɩlɛ́ tɩnyɩ sɩsɩ ɩnáábɩ́lɛ́ Lɛɛrʊ́. Yeésu wánlám waázu Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɖaazɛɛɖɛ́wá-daá (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mrk 1.35-39 ɖʊɖɔ)
4.42: Tɛ́ɛ́wʊ weevé nɛ́, ngɛ waalɩ́ɩ ibó lénlé ɩráa fɛ́yɩ́ nɛ́. Ngɛ zamɔ́ɔ tuutúúma wɛ kɩ́njáádɩ yɩ. Sáátɩ wenkí baana yɩ nɛ́, bɔɔzɔ́ɔ́lɩ sɩsɩ bɔɖɔ́kɩ yɩ na ɩkɛ́ɖɛɛ iyéle wɛ.
4.43: Amá, wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Bɩmɔɔ́na mevééri ɩráa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ kowúrɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Laabáárʊ Kífeńgi tɛ́ɛ́dɩwá tɩɩganáa-daá ɖʊɖɔ, káma, bʊrɔ gɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ weegédíri ma.»
4.44: Ngɛ weevééri ɩráa Laabáárʊ Kífeńgi Yudée laadɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɖaazɛɛɖɛ́wá-daá.

5.1: Wɩ́rɛ neɖére gɛ Yeésu wɛ Genezarɛ́ɛtɩ lɩɩrɛ́ kʊ́bɔńɖɛ nɔɔ́-rɔ wánlám waázu. Zamɔ́ɔ kʊ́bɔńgɩ wɛ ńna bɩka kɩdɛ́ɛ ɩráa ɩbá bányʊʊ́ ɖamá sɩ banɩ́ɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m.
5.2: Waana kpɩ́ɩ́rɩ́nɩ natɩ́lɛ sɩ́ŋɛ́ɛ lɩ́m nɔɔ́-rɔ. Tiiná kpaaráa wáńlɩ́ɩ́ tɩdaá bánÿaalɩ́ bɛdɛ́ɛ biríni.
5.3: Tɩdaá nakɩ́rɩ kɛ́ɛ Simɔ́ɔnɩ-dɛ́ɛ ńgɩ. Ngɛ Yeésu woobó ɩkpa kɩlɛ́ kɩdaá ɩtɔ́ Simɔ́ɔnɩ sɩsɩ ɩ́saa kpɩ́ɩ́rʊʊ́ ɩtásɩ ɩsʊ́ʊ cʊ́kɔ. Ngɛ weedí ɩcɔ́ɔ kpɩ́ɩ́rʊʊ́-daá ńna bɩka wánwɩlɩ́ɩ ɩráa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m.
5.4: Wɛɛdɛ́ ŋmatɩrɛ nɛ́, ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ Simɔ́ɔnɩ sɩsɩ: «Saa kpɩ́ɩ́rʊʊ́ nbó lénlé biilíŋ nɛ́ bɩka ɩlɔ mɩ́dɛ́ɛ biríni ɩkpa tiiná.»
5.5: Ngɛ Simɔ́ɔnɩ woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Kʊ́bɔnɩ́, nuvoowú rɩ́ŋa, ɖáábá ɖɩlɔ biríni fifíni ití ɖáa faala, ɖódoyuú báa nabʊ́rʊ. Amá, nyɔ́ɔ́dɔ́ ná nɛ́, mɔ́nlɔ́ɔ tɩ.»
5.6: Ngɛ bɔɔlɔ biríni babá bakpa tiiná bɩɖɔ́ɔ páá hálɩ bɛdɛ́ɛ biríni wɛ́nlɛrɩ́ɩ.
5.7: Ńna gɛ bɔɔlɔ nʊ́ʊ́zɩ bayáa bɔɖɔndɩnáa bɔgɔwɛ kpɩ́ɩ́rʊʊ́ kɩɩganáa-daá nɛ́ sɩsɩ bɔ́kɔnɩ basɩná wɛ. Bɛlɛ́ bɔɔgɔ́nɩ ngɛ barɩ́ŋa baaɖʊ tiiná kpɩ́ɩ́rɩ́nɩ lɛ́ɛ́nɩ́-daá bisu hálɩ tɩlɛ́ tɩ́nlʊwáána lɩ́m-daá liríi.
5.8: Simɔ́ɔnɩ Pétro waana bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ weedí isóm Yeésu ɩzá-daá ɩtɔ́ sɩsɩ: «Ɖádʊ́ʊ, laná ma bolíni, káma, mɛ́gɛ́ɛ alaháácɩ́-dʊ́ʊ gɛ.»
5.9: Wenbí bʊrɔ Simɔ́ɔnɩ wɔɔdɔ́ bɩlɛ́ nɛ́ gɛ sɩsɩ nɩdáárɛ kʊ́bɔńɖɛ waabaná ɖɩlá yɩ bɩkpɛdɩ́na ɩ́na wenbá nɛ́, tiiná ɖabata baagba yɛ nɛ́ arɔɔzɩ́.
5.10: Hálɩ bɩkpɛdɩ́na Simɔ́ɔnɩ ɖɔndɩnáa Yaakúbu na Yʊháánɩ, Zebedée biyaalɩnáa ɖʊɖɔ. Amá, Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ Simɔ́ɔnɩ sɩsɩ: «Bɩ́kalá nya nɩdáárɛ. Kpɔɔná lɛlɛɛɖɔ́, ɩráa gɛ sɩ ngáyáa sɩsɩ bófú ma.»
5.11: Ngɛ baagábɩ́sɩ́ná bɛdɛ́ɛ kpɩ́ɩ́rɩ́nɩ kpaam-rɔ, beyéle bɩrɩ́ŋa bofu Yeésu. Yeésu waawáázɩ cɛnɩŋa nɛkɛ́rɛ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 8.1-4 na Mrk 1.40-45 ɖʊɖɔ)
5.12: Wɩ́rɛ neɖére gɛ Yeésu wɛ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ natɩ́rɩ-daá, ngɛ ɩrʊ́ naárʊ cɛnɩ́tɩ waabɩrɩná ɩrɩ́ŋa nɛ́ waadála. Waana Yeésu nɛ́, ngɛ wɛɛjɛ́ ɩsála ɩlɛ́ waazá-daá wánzʊlʊ́ʊ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Kʊ́bɔnɩ́, a nyɔ́zɔɔlɛ́ɛ, nyánbɩɩzɩ́ nÿéle mawáa malá ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ.»
5.13: Ńna gɛ Yeésu wɔɔvɔ́ ɩnʊ́ʊ́nɩ itekiná yɩ ɩtɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Ɩɩ́n, mɔ́zɔɔlɛ́ɛ, waa nlá ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ.» Ngɛ nɔɔ́ kʊ́ɖʊḿ nɛ́, cɛnɩ́tɩ waawáa.
5.14: Ngɛ Yeésu waabásɩ yɩ, ɩtɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Nkefééri naárʊ wenbí bɩɩlá nɛ́. Amá, bo Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖʊ́ ɩna wenbí nyɔ́jɔɔ́ɔ nɛ́, na nlá sarɔ́ɔ wenká Múúsá wɔɔdɔ́ sɩsɩ bála nɛ́, na báa weení ɩtɩlɩ́ sɩsɩ nyááwáa.»
5.15: Ɩráa ɩbá bɔwɛ bánŋmatɩ́ Yeésu-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m ɖabata, bɩka zamɔ́ɔ tuutúúma wɔ́ngɔnɩ́ kínduuzí ɩjɔ́ kínwelesí yɩ bɩka wánwaazɩ́ ɩráa-dɛ́ɛ kʊdɔmɩ́nɩ.
5.16: Amá, Yeésu ɩlɛ́ nɛ́, wándárálɩ́ɩ gɛ wɛ́nɖɛɛ́ faɖáma-daá lé ɩráa fɛ́yɩ́ nɛ́ wángazʊlʊ́ʊ. Yeésu waawáázɩ gaala‑gáálɔɔ́ nɛkɛ́rɛ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 9.1-8 na Mrk 2.1-12 ɖʊɖɔ)
5.17: Wɩ́rɛ neɖére Yeésu wɛ ɩbamáa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m wɩlɩ́ɩ nɛ́, Faríizi ńba na Mará wɩlɩɖáa wɛ bɔjɔɔ́ɔ ɩjɔ́. Baagálɩ́ɩ́ná Galilée na Yudée laadásɩ-dɛ́ɛ tɛɛbíízi rɩ́ŋa na Yerusalɛ́ɛm tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá. Ɖádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ yíko wɛ Yeésu-rɔ, kínÿelíi wánwaazɩ́ kʊdɔndɩnáa.
5.18: Ɩráa nɛbɛ́rɛ wɔɔgɔ́nɩ bagazʊwáána gaala‑gáálɔɔ́ nɛkɛ́rɛ kɩgbáláwʊ -rɔ bánjáádɩ sɩ basʊʊná kɛ ɖaána-daá basɩ́ɩ kɛ Yeésu ɩzá-daá.
5.19: Amá, zamɔ́ɔ-rɔ nɛ́, badabɩ́ɩ́zɩ basʊʊná kɛ. Ngɛ baagba ná kɛ ɖaḿ kʊjʊʊ́ -rɔ batʊlʊ́ bɔɔwʊ́ bekédisi kɛ zamɔ́ɔ lɔwʊtáá Yeésu ɩzá-daá kána kagɩgbáláwʊ.
5.20: Yeésu waana nŋɩ́nɩ́ baava yɩ toovonúm nɛ́, ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ kʊdɔndʊ́ʊ sɩsɩ: «Mɛ́ɛ́jɛ́ nya nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ alaháácɩ́wá.»
5.21: Mará wɩlɩɖáa na Faríizi ńba wɛ bɔ́ndɔ́m badaá sɩsɩ: «Ɩrʊ́ weení gɛ ceení gɛ wɛ́ngbɛɛnáa Ɩsɔ́ɔ bɩlɛ́. Weení wánbɩɩzɩ kʊ ɩcɛ́ ɩráa-dɛ́ɛ alaháácɩ́wá bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ riké.»
5.22: Yeésu waadɩlɩ́ wentí bánmaazɩ́ nɛ́, ngɛ wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ wɛ sɩsɩ: «We-rɔ gɛ mɩ́nmaazɩ́ míwenbé-daá bɩlɛ́.
5.23: Mɔdɔ́ sɩsɩ: “Mɛ́ɛ́jɛ́ nya nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ alaháácɩ́wá,” na: “Kʊrʊ́ nnʊ́ŋ,” bʊlɔwʊtáá, wentí fɛ́yɩ́na káálɛ.»
5.24: Amá, mɔ́zɔɔlɛ́ɛ ɩtɩlɩ́ sɩsɩ ɩrʊ́ Biyaalʊ́ wɛná yíko ɩcɛ́ ɩráa bɛdɛ́ɛ alaháácɩ́wá adɛ laadɔ́ɔ-rɔ cé. Ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ gaala‑gáálɔɔ́ sɩsɩ: «Mazɩ: “Kʊrʊ́! Kpɔɔ nyágɩgbáláwʊ ngbé nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ.”»
5.25: Ńna‑ńna gɛ waagʊrʊ́ ɩsɩ́ŋ barɩ́ŋa baazá-daá, ɩkpɔ́ɔ kɩgbáláwʊ ɩvʊnvɩ́nɛ́ɛ kɩrɔ nɛ́ wéngbém ɩdɛ́ɛ bɩka wánzám Ɩsɔ́ɔ.
5.26: Bɩɩbá bɩlá barɩ́ŋa bítí bɩka bánzám Ɩsɔ́ɔ. Nɩdáárɛ waabá bɩlá wɛ nɛ́, bánŋmatɩ́ sɩsɩ: «Sinje ɖááná wenbí kɛtɛngɛrɛ ɖádanáa ta nɛ́.» Yeésu waayáa Léévi sɩsɩ ífú yɩ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 9.9-13 na Mrk 2.13-17 ɖʊɖɔ)
5.27: Bʊwɔ́rɔ́ nɛ́, Yeésu waalɩ́ɩ, ngɛ waana tikée mʊʊrʊ́ naárʊ bánÿaá yɩ sɩsɩ Léévi, ɩjɔɔ́ɔ ɩdɩmɛ́rɛ-daá. Ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Kovu ma.»
5.28: Ngɛ ɩlɛ́ weeyéle bɩrɩ́ŋa ɩkʊrʊ́ ifu yɩ.
5.29: Bʊwɔ́rɔ́ nɛ́, Léévi waalá Yeésu jíńgáárɩ́ kʊ́bɔńgɩ nakɩ́rɩ ɩdɛ́ɛ ɖaána. Ngɛ tikée mʊʊráa ɖabata na ɩráa nɛbɛ́rɛ wɔɔgɔ́nɩ bána wɛ bénɖíi kíɖíím.
5.30: Faríizi ńba na bɛdɛ́ɛ Mará wɩlɩɖáa wánŋmɩɩdɩ́, ngɛ bɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ ɩdɛ́ɛ wanbaaráa sɩsɩ: «Bɩyáásɩ́ gɛ mɩ́na tikée mʊʊráa na ɩráa balakásɩ taavé nɛ́, mínɖíi mɩ́nyɔɔ́.»
5.31: Ńna gɛ Yeésu woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Kʊdɔndɩnáa wánjáádɩ kʊ lákʊ́ta, alaafɩ́ya-dɩnáa baafɛ́yɩ́ na yɩ.
5.32: Mɔ́dɔkɔ́nɩ sɩ mayáa wenbá bazɩɩzɛ́ɛ nɛ́, amá, alaháácɩ́-dɩnáa-rɔ gɛ mɔ́ɔ́gɔ́nɩ na babɩ́ɩ́zɩ balá túúbá.» Yeésu wánŋmatɩ́ nɔɔ́ fɔkɩ́-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 9.14-17 na Mrk 2.18-22 ɖʊɖɔ)
5.33: Ngɛ Faríizi ńba wɔɔdɔ́ Yeésu sɩsɩ: «Yaayá-dɛ́ɛ wanbaaráa wɔ́ndɔ́rɔ́vɔ́kɩ́ nɔɔ́ gɛ bɩka bánlám sʊlʊ́ńdɩ, ɖɔ́ɔ́ ɖɛ́dɛ́ɛ ńba ɖʊɖɔ wánlám bɩlɛ́. Amá, nyɔ́ɔ́ nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ wanbaaráa wénɖíi gɛ bɩka bɔ́nnyɔɔ́.»
5.34: Ngɛ Yeésu woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Mɩ́nbɩɩzɩ́ iyéle weetáhárʊ ɖɔndɩnáa ɩfɔ́kɩ nɔɔ́ sáátɩ wenkí bána yɩ nɛ́?
5.35: Amá, sáátɩ nakɩ́rɩ kɛgɛrɛŋɛ, bɔ́ngɔnɩ́ balɩzɩ́ yɩ bɔlɔwʊtáá, bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ gɛ bɔ́nvɔkɩ́.»
5.36: Ngɛ Yeésu waadásɩ ɩŋmatɩná wɛ ɖʊɖɔ na tɔmgɛɛzɩrɛ ɩtɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Naárʊ fɛ́yɩ́ wɛ́nlɛrɩ́ɩ bɩsaawʊ́ kɩ́falʊʊ́-dɛ́ɛ fɔɔlɔɔ́ ɩtɔ ná bɩsaawʊ́ kɩ́bɩńgɩ, a waalá bɩlɛ́, wɛɛlɛrɩ́ bɩsaawʊ́ kɩ́falʊʊ́ bɩka ɖʊɖɔ fɔɔlɔɔ́ kɩ́falɔɔ́ tánzaaná bɩsaawʊ́ kɩ́bɩńgɩ.
5.37: Naárʊ tɔ́ngbɔwʊ́ sʊlʊ́m kɩ́fabɩ bɩdabɩɩ tá bɩtɛ́ nɛ́ isúu tɔná furúni kɩ́bɩńdɩ-daá. A waalá bɩlɛ́, sʊlʊ́m bɩḿ bínÿelíi tɔná furúni ɩya, sʊlʊ́m ɩbɛ́ɖɩ, bɩka tɔná furúni ɩlá ásáráwʊ́.
5.38: Amá, bónzuú sʊlʊ́m kɩ́fabɩ tɔná furúni kɩ́fatɩ-daá gɛ.
5.39: Naárʊ tánjaa wɔ́ńnyɔ́ɔ́ sʊlʊ́m kɩ́bɩńbɩ bɩtɛ́ nɛ́, ɩtásɩ ɩnyɔ́ɔ kɩ́fabɩ, káma, bánŋmatɩ́ sɩsɩ: “Sʊlʊ́m kɩ́bɩńbɩ cɔɔ́ɔ na kʊ kazɔ́ɔ.”»

6.1: Fɛɛzɩrɛ wɩ́rɛ neɖére gɛ Yeésu wɛ́ndɛsɩ́ bilée fásɩ. Ngɛ ɩwanbaaráa waabáázɩ bilée kpɛɛ́ bónnuudí banʊ́ʊ́zɩ-daá bɔ́ndɔwʊ́ʊ kibíya.
6.2: Ńna gɛ Faríizi ńba nɛbɛ́rɛ wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «We-rɔ gɛ mɩ́nlám wenbí ɖɛ́dɛ́ɛ Mará tafa nɩ́bááwʊ sɩsɩ bála Fɛɛzɩrɛ wɩ́rɛ nɛ́.»
6.3: Ngɛ Yeésu woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «A bɩlɛ́, mɩ́dákála wenbí Ɖáwʊɖa waalá wɩ́rɛ neɖére nyɔɔ́sɩ waalá yɩ bɩkpɛdɩ́na ɩ́na wenbá nɛ́ gɛ?
6.4: Waazʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-daá gɛ, ɩkpɔ́ɔ kpɔ́nɔ́wá baalá tɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarɔ́ɔ nɛ́ ɩtɔ́ɔ. Ngɛ waava tɩ ɩ́na wenbá nɛ́ bɔtɔ́ɔ ɖʊɖɔ. Ngʊ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa riké gɛ Mará waava nɩ́bááwʊ sɩsɩ bɔ́tɔɔ tɩ.»
6.5: Ngɛ Yeésu waadásɩ ɩtɔ́ wɛ ɖʊɖɔ sɩsɩ: «Ɩrʊ́ Biyaalʊ́ wɛná na kʊ yíko Fɛɛzɩrɛ wɩ́rɛ-rɔ.» Yeésu waawáázɩ ɩrʊ́ biilí ɩnʊ́ʊ́nɩ nɛ́ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 12.9-14 na Mrk 3.1-6 ɖʊɖɔ)
6.6: Fɛɛzɩrɛ wɩ́rɛ neɖére ɖʊɖɔ gɛ Yeésu waazʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɖaazɛɛɖɛ́ wánwɩlɩ́ɩ ɩráa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m; abaalʊ́ naárʊ wɛ ńnaamʊ́ biilí ɩnʊ́ʊ́nɩ kíɖiiwú.
6.7: Mará wɩlɩɖáa na Faríizi ńba wɛ bɛbɛɛ́na Yeésu sɩsɩ wánwaazɩ́ ɩrʊ́ Fɛɛzɩrɛ wɩ́rɛ yáá nŋɩ́nɩ́, na boyuú kúbuunátɩ bobuuná yɩ.
6.8: Amá, Yeésu ɩlɛ́ ɩvʊnnyɩ bolomaazɛ́. Ńna gɛ wɔɔdɔ́ ɩrʊ́ ɩmʊ́ biilí ɩnʊ́ʊ́nɩ nɛ́ sɩsɩ: «Kʊrʊ́ ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá nzɩ́ŋ lɔwʊtáá ńna.» Ngɛ ɩlɛ́ waagʊrʊ́ ɩsɩ́ŋ ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá.
6.9: Ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Mɔ́nbɔɔzɩ́ mɩ́ɩ sɩsɩ we gɛ Mará waava nɩ́bááwʊ sɩsɩ bála Fɛɛzɩrɛ wɩ́rɛ. Bɩɩva nɩ́bááwʊ sɩsɩ bála kazɔ́ɔ ńbɩ yáá bɩdaavé nɛ́. Sɩsɩ bɛ́lɛɛ ɩrʊ́ yáá bákʊ́ yɩ gɛ.»
6.10: Ńna gɛ Yeésu wɛɛbɛ́ɛ́ŋ barɩ́ŋa ɩlára ɩmɩ́lɩ, ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ ɩrʊ́ ɩmʊ́ sɩsɩ: «Fɔ nyánʊ́ʊ́nɩ.» Ngɛ ɩlɛ́ wɔɔvɔ́ ɩnʊ́ʊ́nɩ, ngɛ ɩnʊ́ʊ́nɩ waawáa ɩbɩ́sɩ nyazɩ lí ńnɩ́.
6.11: Mará wɩlɩɖáa na Faríizi ńba waabá bɛyɛ́ɛ baaná páá, ngɛ baabáázɩ ɖamá sááwʊ́ra lanáa na batɩlɩ́ nŋɩ́nɩ́ sɩ bala ná Yeésu nɛ́. Tɩndɩnáa fuú na nɔɔ́lɛ Yeésu waalɩzɩ́ wɛ nɛ́ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 10.1-4 na Mrk 3.13-19 ɖʊɖɔ)
6.12: Wɩ́rɛ neɖére gɛ Yeésu waagba bʊ́ʊ-daá sɩ ɩkázʊlʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ. Wɔɔjɔ́ɔ ńna nuvoowú rɩ́ŋa sʊlʊ́ńdɩ-daá.
6.13: Tɛ́ɛ́wʊ weevé nɛ́, ngɛ waayáa ɩwanbaaráa ɩlɩzɩ́ fuú na nɔɔ́lɛ badaá ɩfa wɛ yɩ́ɖɛ sɩsɩ: Tɩndɩnáa.
6.14: Fuú na nɔɔ́lɛ bɛḿ nɖɔ́: Simɔ́ɔnɩ weení waava yɩ yɩ́ɖɛ sɩsɩ Pétro nɛ́, na igoobú Andirée; Yaakúbu na Yʊháánɩ; Filíipu na Barɩtelemíi;
6.15: Maatéwu na Tomáa; Yaakúbu Alɩfée biyaalʊ́ na Simɔ́ɔnɩ weení bánÿaá yɩ sɩsɩ kezée-bú nɛ́;
6.16: Yúudi Yaakúbu biyaalʊ́ na Yudásɩ Isikariyóo weení waayá yɩ nɛ́. Yeésu wánwɩlɩ́ɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m bɩka wánwaazɩ́ kʊdɔmɩ́nɩ
6.17: Yeésu waagálɩɩ bʊ́ʊ-rɔɔzɩ́ ikédi ɩ́gana wɛ, ngɛ bɔɔgɔ́nɩ basɩ́ŋ kɩdɛrɛwʊ-daá lé ɩwanbaaráa tuutúúma fʊnzɩ́ŋɛ́ɛ nɛ́. Zamɔ́ɔ kʊ́bɔńgɩ ɖʊɖɔ wɛ ńna kɩɩgálɩ́ɩ́ná Yudée laadɔ́ɔ-daá, Yerusalɛ́ɛm tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá, na tenkú nɔɔ́‑nɔɔ́ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ Tíiri na Sidɔ́ɔnɩ.
6.18: Bɔɔgɔ́nɩ sɩ bewélesi yɩ bɩka ɩwáázɩ bɛdɛ́ɛ kʊdɔmɩ́nɩ. Wenbá zííniwá wánjaarɩ́ wɛ nɛ́ baawáa,
6.19: bɩka zamɔ́ɔ rɩ́ŋa wánjáádɩ sɩsɩ kitekiná yɩ, káma, ɖóni naárʊ wánlɩɩ́ ɩrɔ wánwaazɩ́ barɩ́ŋa. Wenbá sɩ bokóyuú fɛɛzɩrɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-jɔ́ nɛ́ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 5.1-12 ɖʊɖɔ)
6.20: Ńna gɛ waagʊ́sɩ waazá ɩbɛ́ɛ ɩwanbaaráa, ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Wenbi‑niíni-dɩnáa gɛ mɩ́gɛ́ɛ, mɩ́nyɔ́ɔ́ kadanbʊrʊ́sɩ; káma, mɩ́dɩɩná Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ kowúrɔ́ɔ.
6.21: Wenbi‑niíni-dɩnáa gɛ mɩ́gɛ́ɛ, mɩ́nyɔ́ɔ́ wenbá nyɔɔ́sɩ wángʊ́ʊ mɩ́ɩ lɛlɛɛɖɔ́ nɛ́; káma, mɩ́ngɔnɩ́ ikéɖí ɩfɔ́ɔ. Wenbi‑niíni-dɩnáa gɛ mɩ́gɛ́ɛ, mɩ́nyɔ́ɔ́ wenbá mínwií lɛlɛɛɖɔ́ nɛ́; káma, mɩ́ngɔnɩ́ ɩkámʊŋ.
6.22: Wenbi‑niíni-dɩnáa gɛ mɩ́gɛ́ɛ, a bɩgɛ́ɛ sɩsɩ ɩráa tánjaa mɩ́ɩ, béngizíi mɩ́ɩ, bándʊ́ʊ́dɩ mɩ́ɩ, bɩka bánŋmatɩ́ wentí tɩdaavé nɛ́ mɩ́rɔ́ɔ́zɩ́, káma, mívóo Ɩrʊ́ Biyaalʊ́ nɛ́-rɔɔzɩ́.
6.23: Bɩdɛ́ɛ wɩ́rɛ, bɩ́la mɩ́ɩ niíni ɩfáárɩ, káma, mɩ́dɛ́ɛ kɩvɛrɛwʊ wɔɔɖɔ́ɔ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ kowúrɔ́ɔ-daá. Ńŋɩnáa bɩlɛ́ gɛ bajaájaanáa waanáázɩ anɖébiwá.
6.24: Amá, nbusú ɖamáa na mɩ́ɩ, mɩ́ɩ wenbá mɩ́gɛ́ɛ ɖɔ́ɔ́lɛ-dɩnáa nɛ́, káma, míńÿúú mɩ́dɛ́ɛ wenbi‑niíni.
6.25: Nbusú ɖamáa na mɩ́ɩ, mɩ́ɩ wenbá mɩ́vɔɔ́ lɛlɛɛɖɔ́ nɛ́, káma, mɩ́ngɔnɩ́ ɩsɩ́ nyɔɔ́sɩ. Nbusú ɖamáa na mɩ́ɩ, mɩ́ɩ wenbá mɩ́nmʊŋ́ lɛlɛɛɖɔ́ nɛ́, káma, mɩ́ngɔnɩ́ ɩcɔ́ɔ ɖúkúru-daá bɩka iwíi.
6.26: Nbusú ɖamáa na mɩ́ɩ, a bɩgɛ́ɛ sɩsɩ ɩráa rɩ́ŋa wánŋmatɩ́ kazɔ́ɔ ńdɩ mɩ́rɔ́ɔ́zɩ́, káma, bɩlɛ́ gɛ bajaájaanáa waazá anɖébiwá bʊbɔtɩnáa.» Ɩzɔ́ɔ́lɩ mɩ́báɖaanáa (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 5.38-48; 7.12a ɖʊɖɔ)
6.27: «Amá, mɩ́ɩ wenbá mínwelesí ma nɛ́, ménveerím mɩ́ɩ sɩsɩ: Ɩzɔ́ɔ́lɩ mɩ́báɖaanáa, bɩka ɩlá wenbá bádánjaa mɩ́ɩ nɛ́ kífeńbi;
6.28: ɩɖʊ wenbá bánlám mɩ́ɩ láálɩ́ nɛ́ alɩbáráka, bɩka ɩsʊ́lʊ wenbá bánnaazɩ́ mɩ́ɩ nɛ́ bɔrɔɔzɩ́.
6.29: A naárʊ wɛɛjɛ́ nya kadaŋá nyédeegbeluú nakɩ́rɩ-rɔɔzɩ́, kɛɛzɩ́ kɩɩganáa njéle yɩ. A bɩgɛ́ɛ sɩsɩ naárʊ wɔɔgbɔ́ɔ nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ ɖaazíki, talɩná yɩ nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ kpáyɩ ɖʊɖɔ.
6.30: Fa weení wánzʊlʊ́ʊ nya nɛ́, bɩka a naárʊ wɔɔgbɔ́ɔ nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ nabʊ́rʊ, nkɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ.
6.31: Ɩlá baaganáa wenbí nɔ́ɔ́ mɩ́zɔɔlɛ́ɛ sɩsɩ bɛlɛ́ bála mɩ́ɩ nɛ́.
6.32: A wenbá bɔzɔɔlɛ́ɛ mɩ́ɩ nɛ́ beriké gɛ mɩ́zɔɔlɛ́ɛ, kɩvɛrɛwʊ wenkí gɛ mɩ́ɖamáa ɖʊɖɔ. Káma, alaháácɩ́-dɩnáa ɖʊɖɔ sɔɔlɛ́ɛ wenbá bɔzɔɔlɛ́ɛ wɛ nɛ́ gɛ.
6.33: A ngʊ́ wenbá bánlám mɩ́ɩ kífeńbi nɛ́ beriké gɛ mɩ́nlám kífeńbi, kɩvɛrɛwʊ wenkí gɛ mɩ́ɖamáa. Bɩlɛ́ gɛ alaháácɩ́-dɩnáa tɩtɩŋa wánlám.
6.34: Ngɛ a wenbá mɩ́nyɩ sɩsɩ bɔ́ngɔnɩ́ bɛfɛ́rɛ mɩ́ɩ nɛ́ beriké gɛ mɩ́ngɩ́m, kɩvɛrɛwʊ wenkí gɛ mɩ́ɖamáa. Alaháácɩ́-dɩnáa ɖʊɖɔ wángɩ́m alaháácɩ́-dɩnáa gɛ na bɛfɛ́rɛ wɛ bɩdɛ́ɛ nɔ́ɔ́.
6.35: Amá, ɩzɔ́ɔ́lɩ mɩ́báɖaanáa, ɩlá wɛ kífeńbi, ngɛ ɩgɩ́ bɩka mɩ́raaɖamáa nabʊ́rʊ. Bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, mɩ́dɛ́ɛ kɩvɛrɛwʊ wɔ́nɖɔɔ́ bɩka ɩbɩ́sɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ bílí‑bílí-dʊ́ʊ biyaalɩnáa, káma, ɩlɛ́ wánlám kutulúwá na wenbá badaavé nɛ́ kífeńbi.
6.36: Ɩbɩ́sɩ kazɔ́ɔ-lanɖáa ńŋɩnáa Mɩ́jaa kɛ́ɛ kazɔ́ɔ-lanɖʊ́ nɛ́.» Wenbí bʊrɔ ɩrʊ́ ɩ́kafʊʊná ɩrɔwʊ́ nɛ́ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 7.1-5 ɖʊɖɔ)
6.37: «Ɩ́kafʊʊná naárʊ, na bádanvʊʊná mɩ́ɩ; ɩ́kakʊ naárʊ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m, na bádángʊ́ʊ mɩ́dɔ́m; ɩjɛ́ baaganáa na bɛcɛ́ mɩ́ɩ.
6.38: Ɩva baaganáa na bafa mɩ́ɩ; sɩ babá gɛ bamáázɩ bisu bɩwáádɩ babɩ́rɩ mɩ́bɩsaawʊ́-daá. Káma, kɩ́maazʊʊ́ wenkí mɩ́nmaazɩnáa baaganáa nɛ́ gɛ sɩ bamaazɩ ná mɩ́ɩ ɖʊɖɔ.»
6.39: Yeésu waadásɩ ɩŋmatɩná wɛ na tɔmgɛɛzɩrɛ sɩsɩ: «Njɛm wánbɩɩzɩ́ ikéti njɛm naárʊ? Bɛlɛ́ɛ́nɩ́ bódónÿoozi basála bɔɔwʊ́-daá?
6.40: Wanbaarʊ́ weení wɛ́ngbɛlɛŋ́ nɛ́ takɩ́lɩ ɩdɛ́ɛ wɩlɩɖʊ́, amá, weení baawɩ́lɩ yɩ kazɔ́ɔ nɛ́ wánbɩsɩ́ gɛ nyazɩ ɩdɛ́ɛ wɩlɩɖʊ́.
6.41: Ngbaalá gɛ nyɛ́bɛɛ́na keyiká kɔwɛ nyɔ́rɔwʊ́ ɩzɩ́rɛ-daá nɛ́ bɩka ńdánnáa ɖaagbetumuú kʊwɛ nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ ńɖɛ-daá nɛ́.
6.42: Nŋɩ́nɩ́ gɛ nyánbɩɩzɩ́ ndɔ́ ngoobú sɩsɩ: “Yele malɩzɩ́ keyiká kɔwɛ nyáázɩ́rɛ-daá nɛ́,” nyɔ́ɔ́ weení ńdánnáa ɖaagbetumuú kʊwɛ nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ ńɖɛ-daá nɛ́. Munáávikí, lɩzɩ́ ɖaagbetumuú kʊwɛ nyáázɩ́rɛ-daá naanɩ́, na nna kazɔ́ɔ nlɩzɩ́ keyiká kɔwɛ nyɔ́rɔwʊ́ ɩzɩ́rɛ-daá nɛ́.» Tɩɩwʊ́ bíya gɛ bándɩlɩ́ɩ na kɩ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 7.16-20; 12.33-35 ɖʊɖɔ)
6.43: «Tɩɩwʊ́ kazɔ́ɔ ńgɩ tánɖʊ́ʊ bíya badaavé nɛ́, ngʊ́ tɩɩwʊ́ kɩdaavé nɛ́ tánɖʊ́ʊ bíya kazɔ́ɔ ńba.
6.44: Tɩɩwʊ́ báa wenkí nɛ́, kibíya gɛ bándɩlɩ́ɩ na kɩ. Bɔ́dɔ́ngɔrɩ́ furúu bíya sɔɔzɔ́ɔ́zɩ-daá, yáá kɩjɩcɩ́lʊ́ʊ bíya bʊvʊ́m-daá.
6.45: Ɩrʊ́ kazɔ́ɔ ńnɩ́ wánlɩzɩ́ɩ wenbí bɩjɔɔ́ɔ kazɔ́ɔ nɛ́ wenbí ɩwɛná kazɔ́ɔ ńbɩ bʊwɛ iwenbiré-daá nɛ́ bɩdaá, ɩrʊ́ kidaavéénúu ɩlɩzɩ́ wenbí bɩdaavé nɛ́ wenbí ɩwɛná bɩdaavé nɛ́ bɩdaá.» Ɖaána baama kɛ kanyɩ́ŋa-rɔ yáá bʊ́tangbalʊʊ́-rɔ nɛ́ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 7.24-27 ɖʊɖɔ)
6.46: «Ngɛ ngbaalá mɩ́nÿaá ma sɩsɩ: “Ɖádʊ́ʊ, Ɖádʊ́ʊ,” bɩka mɩ́ndánlaḿ wentí mɔ́ndɔ́m nɛ́.
6.47: Weení rɩ́ŋa wɔɔgɔ́nɩ mɔ́jɔ́, ɩnɩ́ɩ tɔ́m mánŋmatɩ́ tɩ ɖɔ́ nɛ́, ngɛ woovu ɩlá wenbí tɩ́nbɔɔzɩ́ nɛ́, ménveerím mɩ́ɩ weení waalɩ́ɩ nɛ́:
6.48: waalɩ́ɩ gɛ nyazɩ ɩrʊ́ weení wánmáa ɖaána nɛ́, waabáa adɛ bɩbá bilíŋ, ngɛ waalá ɖɩzɩɩrɛ bʊ́tangbalʊʊ́-rɔ. Sáátɩ wenkí tɛ́ɛ́nɩ waanɩ́ɩ búúzi isu sɩyɛlɩ́, búúzi-daá lɩ́m iyóo ɖaána kɛḿ, amá, bɩdabɩ́ɩ́zɩ bɩyɔ́ kɛ, káma, baama kɛ kazɔ́ɔ.
6.49: Amá, ɩrʊ́ weení waanɩ́ɩ mɛ́dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m, ngɛ ɩdalá wenbí tɩ́nbɔɔzɩ́ nɛ́ cɔɔ́ɔ gɛ nyazɩ ɩrʊ́ weení waama ɩɖɔɔ́ adɛ ɖɩzɩɩrɛ fɛ́yɩ́ nɛ́. Búúzi-daá lɩ́m wɔɔgɔ́nɩ biyóo kɛ nɛ́, ngɛ kaajáŋ kasála, kabá konúúdi.»

7.1: Yeésu waaŋmátɩ zamɔ́ɔ kínwelesí yɩ nɛ́ tɔ́mwá tɩḿ tɩrɩ́ŋa bɩtɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ waagʊrʊ́ ibó Kapɛrɩnawʊ́m tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá.
7.2: Tɛ́ɛ́dɩ tɩḿ tɩdaá, Róóma sɔ́ɔ́ja kʊ́bɔnɩ́ naárʊ wɛ ńna, ɩwɛná bɔwʊtá-dʊ́ʊ naárʊ ɩbá ɩzɔɔlɛ́ɛ ɩdɔ́m. Bɔwʊtá-dʊ́ʊ ɩmʊ́ ɩbá wánnyaadɩ́ wánlʊwɔ́ɔ na sɩ́m.
7.3: Róóma sɔ́ɔ́ja kʊ́bɔnɩ́ ɩmʊ́ waanɩ́ɩ bánŋmatɩ́ Yeésu-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m nɛ́, ngɛ weedíri Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnáa nɛbɛ́rɛ ɩjɔ́ sɩ bakávɩ́nɩ yɩ sɩsɩ ɩ́kɔnɩ ɩwáázɩ ɩdɛ́ɛ bɔwʊtá-dʊ́ʊ.
7.4: Baadála Yeésu-jɔ́ nɛ́, ngɛ baabá babáázɩ yɩ kɩvɩ́nʊ́ʊ sɩsɩ: «Ɩrʊ́ ɩmʊ́ ɩmɔɔ́na nlɛ́ɛ yɩ.
7.5: Ɩzɔɔlɛ́ɛ ɖɛ́dɛ́ɛ laadɔ́ɔ, hálɩ weeyele ná bama ɖɛ́dɛ́ɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɖaazɛɛɖɛ́.»
7.6: Ńna gɛ boovu Yeésu bɔkpɔ́ɔ nɩ́bááwʊ bɛ́nɖɛɛ́. Wáńjʊ́ʊ́ná ɖaána gɛ Róóma ńba-dɛ́ɛ sɔ́ɔ́ja kʊ́bɔnɩ́ weedíri ɩɖɔndɩnáa sɩsɩ béfeeri yɩ sɩsɩ: «Kʊ́bɔnɩ́, nkatánnaazɩ nyádɩ, káma, mádatála nzʊ́ʊ máɖaána-daá;
7.7: bɩlɛ́ bʊrɔ gɛ mádacáa mádɩtɩŋa mobó nyɔ́jɔ́. Amá, ŋmatɩ tɔ́m bú kʊ́ɖʊḿ na mɛ́dɛ́ɛ bɔwʊtá-dʊ́ʊ ɩwáa.
7.8: Mádɩtɩŋa mɔ́wɛná mágʊ́bɔnáa, bɩka mɔ́wɛná sɔ́ɔ́jawá mɛ́dɛ́ɛ́zɩ́ mɛ́dɛ́ɛ tɩmɛ́rɛ-daá. A mɔ́ɔ́dɔ́ kʊ́ɖʊḿ sɩsɩ: “Ɖɛɛ,” wɛ́nɖɛɛ́ gɛ; a mɔ́ɔ́dɔ́ lí ńnɩ́ sɩsɩ: “Kɔnɩ,” wɔ́ngɔnɩ́ gɛ; ngɛ a mɔ́ɔ́dɔ́ mɛ́dɛ́ɛ bɔwʊtá-dʊ́ʊ sɩsɩ: “La ɖɔ́,” wánlám gɛ.»
7.9: Yeésu waanɩ́ɩ bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, bɩɩbá bɩlá yɩ mááɖé, ngɛ wɛɛgɛ́ɛ́zɩ ɩtɔ́ zamɔ́ɔ kiigóvú yɩ nɛ́ sɩsɩ: «Ménveerím mɩ́ɩ toovonúm sɩsɩ báa Israyɛ́ɛlɩ ńba-daá, mádanáá ta toovonúm-fáa ńŋɩnáa bɩna bɩdaká.»
7.10: Wenbá beegédiri wɛ nɛ́, bɔɔlɔ́ɔ babɩ́sɩ Róóma ńba-dɛ́ɛ sɔ́ɔ́ja kʊ́bɔnɩ́-dɛ́ɛ ɖaána-daá, ngɛ bɔɔmɔɔná bɔwʊtá-dʊ́ʊ wáńwáá. Yeésu weevéézi alʊ́ leelú biyaalʊ́ ɩsɩɖʊ́
7.11: Bʊwɔ́rɔ́ nɛ́, Yeésu wɛɛɖɛ́ɛ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ natɩ́rɩ bánÿaá tɩ sɩsɩ Nayíini nɛ́ tɩdaá, ngɛ ɩwanbaaráa na zamɔ́ɔ kʊ́bɔńgɩ fóo yɩ.
7.12: Sáátɩ wenkí waajʊʊná tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá ɖaazʊʊnáɖɛ nɛ́, waana bazʊwáána ɩsɩɖʊ́ bɛ́nɖɛɛnáa bím. Ɩsɩɖʊ́ ɩmʊ́ nɛ́, alʊ́ leelú naárʊ biyaalʊ́ gɛ bɩgɛ́ɛ. Iriké gɛ bɩɩva yɩ. Tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá ɩráa ɖabata waagálaazɩ alʊ́ ɩmʊ́.
7.13: Ɖádʊ́ʊ Yeésu waana alʊ́ ɩmʊ́ nɛ́, bɩɩbá bɩlá yɩ kʊnyɔḿ, ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Yele wíídi.»
7.14: Ngɛ woodúu itekiná amákaá; ńna gɛ wenbá bazʊwáána kɩ nɛ́ baazɩ́ŋ. Ngɛ Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ sɩsɩ: «Afobú, mazɩ kʊrʊ́, mɔ́ɔ́dɔ́ ná!»
7.15: Ngɛ ɩsɩɖʊ́ waagʊrʊ́ ɩcɔ́ɔ ɩbáázɩ ŋmatɩrɛ. Ngɛ Yeésu weejéle yɩ ɩgɔɔ.
7.16: Nɩdáárɛ kʊ́bɔnbɔńɖɛ waagba barɩ́ŋa, ngɛ baabáázɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ sám bɔ́ndɔ́m sɩsɩ: «Anɖébi kʊ́bɔnɩ́ naárʊ waaɖʊ ɩlɩ́ɩ ɖɔ́lɔ́wʊ́táá! Ɩsɔ́ɔ wɔɔgɔ́nɩ isúlu ɩdɛ́ɛ zamɔ́ɔ-rɔ ɩlɛ́ɛ kɩ.»
7.17: Ngɛ wenbí Yeésu waalá nɛ́, woozuná Yudée laadɔ́ɔ rɩ́ŋa na kɩdɛ́ɛ fáráńdɩ́wá. Wentí Yeésu woobúsi Yaayá-dɛ́ɛ tɩndɩnáa nɛ́ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 11.2-19 ɖʊɖɔ)
7.18: Yaayá-dɛ́ɛ wanbaaráa woobó bakádɩ tɔ́mwá tɩḿ tɩrɩ́ŋa befééri yɩ, ngɛ ɩlɛ́ waalɩzɩ́ badaá nɔɔ́lɛ
7.19: itíri Ɖádʊ́ʊ Yeésu-jɔ́ bɔkɔ́bɔɔzɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Nyánáábɩ́lɛ́ weení sɩsɩ wɔ́ngɔnɩ́ nɛ́ yáá ɖándasɩ́ ɖɩɖáŋ naárʊ.»
7.20: Bɛlɛ́ baadála Yeésu-jɔ́ nɛ́, ngɛ bɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Yaayá weegédíri ɖáa sɩsɩ ɖɩ́bɔɔzɩ nya sɩsɩ nyánáábɩ́lɛ́ weení sɩ ɩkɔ́nɩ nɛ́ yáá ɖándasɩ́ ɖɩɖáŋ naárʊ.»
7.21: Bɩɩjáŋ bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ kɩḿ, Yeésu waawáázɩ kʊdɔndɩnáa ɖabata, ɩwáázɩ ɩráa ɖabata bɛ́nÿɛlɛ́ŋ nɛ́, na wenbá zííniwá wánjaarɩ́ wɛ nɛ́, bɩka iyéle njɛma ɖabata ɩbáázɩ náa.
7.22: Bʊwɔ́rɔ́ gɛ woobúsi Yaayá-dɛ́ɛ tɩndɩnáa sɩsɩ: «Ibó ifééri Yaayá wenbí mɩ́ɩ́ná na wenbí mɩ́ɩ́nɩ́ɩ nɛ́: Njɛma wánnáa bɩka gaala‑gáálásɩ wánnʊŋɛ́, cɛnɩ́sɩ waawáa sɩlá ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ, ndamáa wánnɩɩ́, ɩsɩɖáa wénvém, bɩka bénveerím kadanbʊrʊ́sɩ Laabáárʊ Kífeńgi.
7.23: Wenbi‑niíni-dʊ́ʊ gɛ weení ɩdɛbɛ́ɖɩ toovonúm waava ma nɛ́.»
7.24: Sáátɩ wenkí Yaayá-dɛ́ɛ wanbaaráa wɛɛɖɛ́ɛ nɛ́, ngɛ Yeésu wɔɔgbɔ́ɔ wánŋmatɩ́ zamɔ́ɔ Yaayá-rɔ sɩsɩ: «Wé gɛ mííbó ɩkɛ́bɛ́ɛŋ tɛɛwʊ́lɔ́ɔ́-daá. Ɖɩgɛrɛ́ fefelimá wónÿuúdi ɖɛ nɛ́? Aayɩ́.
7.25: Bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, wé gɛ mííbó ɩkɛ́bɛ́ɛŋ. Ɩrʊ́ izóóna tókowá kífeńdi nɛ́? Wenbá bónzuú tókowá kífeńdi bɩka bɔjɔɔ́ɔ bɩzaláa wɛ́ nɛ́ wɛ wúrowá-dɛ́ɛ kowuro-ɖɛ́ɛ́zɩ-daá gɛ.
7.26: Bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, we gɛ mííbó ɩkɛ́bɛ́ɛŋ. Anɖébi? Ɩɩ́n, bɩlɛ́ gɛ ménveerím mɩ́ɩ. Hálɩ waagɩ́lɩ anɖébi.
7.27: Káma, Yaayá-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m gɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Tɔ́m Tákaraɖá waaŋmátɩ sɩsɩ: “Méndiríi mɛ́dɛ́ɛ tɩndʊ́ʊ nyáázá-daá ɩnyɔ́ɔ́zɩ nya nɩ́bááwʊ.”
7.28: Ménveerím mɩ́ɩ sɩsɩ ɩráa-daá, naárʊ tɔcɔ́ɔ waagɩ́lɩ Yaayá nɛ́. Ngʊ́ nbɛ́ɛ́ŋ nɛ́, weení ɩgɛ́ɛ kúmuú Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ kowúrɔ́ɔ-daá nɛ́ waagɩ́lɩ yɩ.
7.29: Ɩráa rɩ́ŋa weewélesi Yaayá, bɩkpɛdɩ́na tikée mʊʊráa; ngɛ beeɖéézi Ɩsɔ́ɔ, bʊrɔɔzɩ́ gɛ beeyéle Yaayá ilíri wɛ lɩ́m-daá ɩsɔ wɛ túúbá lɩ́m.
7.30: Amá, Faríizi ńba na Mará wɩlɩɖáa weegízi wenbí Ɩsɔ́ɔ wánvʊnjaanáa wɛ nɛ́ bekízi Yaayá telíri wɛ lɩ́m-daá ɩsɔ wɛ túúbá lɩ́m.»
7.31: Ngɛ Yeésu waadásɩ ɩtɔ́ sɩsɩ: «Weení gɛ mánbɩɩzɩ́ mɛgɛɛzɩná zaamáánɩ kɩna kɩdɛ́ɛ ɩráa. Weení gɛ baalɩ́ɩ.
7.32: Bɔjɔɔ́ɔ gɛ nyazɩ bíya bɔjɔɔ́ɔ wɔnɔɔ́ kʊ́bɔńga-daá bɔ́ndɔ́m baranáa sɩsɩ: “Ɖáávʊ́lʊ mɩ́ɩ foyísi, amá, mɩ́dabáa. Ɖéédée lííya yéńdi, mɩ́dɛ́mɛ́ɛ́dɩ iwíi,” nɛ́.
7.33: Káma, Yaayá wɔɔgɔ́nɩ nɛ́, ideɖi kíɖíím ngʊ́ ɩdɔnyɔ́ɔ sʊlʊ́m, ngɛ mɩ́ɩ́dɔ́ sɩsɩ ɩwɛná zííni.
7.34: Ɩrʊ́ Biyaalʊ́ wɔɔgɔ́nɩ nɛ́, wénɖíi wɔ́nnyɔɔ́. Ngɛ mɩ́ndɔ́m sɩsɩ: “Ɩbɛ́ɛ ceení, ɖiirú na sʊlʊ́m nyɔɔrʊ́ gɛ ɩgɛ́ɛ; tikée mʊʊráa na alaháácɩ́-dɩnáa gɛ ɩɖɔndɩnáa.”
7.35: Amá, wenbá barɩ́ŋa baava Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ áséńsí toovonúm nɛ́, beeɖéézi sɩsɩ kɩzɩɩzɛ́ɛ.» Yeésu wénɖíi kíɖíím Simɔ́ɔnɩ Faríizi ńnɩ́-dɛ́ɛ ɖaána-daá
7.36: Wɩ́rɛ gɛ Faríizi ńnɩ́ naárʊ waayáa Yeésu sɩsɩ ɩ́kɔnɩ iɖi kíɖíím ɩdɛ́ɛ. Ngɛ Yeésu woobó ɩrʊ́ ɩmʊ́ ɩdɛ́ɛ bɔjɔɔ́ɔ bénɖíi kíɖíím.
7.37: Alʊ́ wásangarɩ́ naárʊ wɛ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ tɩḿ tɩdaá. Alʊ́ ɩmʊ́ waanɩ́ɩ sɩsɩ Yeésu wɛ Faríizi ńnɩ́-dɛ́ɛ ɖaána wénɖíi kíɖíím nɛ́, ngɛ waagázʊʊ ɩ́gana kpárábá kazɔ́ɔ ńgɩ nakɩ́rɩ tulaarɩ́ woozu kɩdaá nɛ́.
7.38: Wɛɛgɛɛ ná Yeésu wɔ́rɔ́ ɩlɛ́ ɩnʊvɔ́-jɔ́ wénwií bɩka ɩdɛ́ɛ nzʊlʊ́m wéndím Yeésu nʊvɔ́-rɔ. Ngɛ waavɩɩzɩná yɛ na ɩnyɔ́ɔ́zɩ, ɩkparásɩ yɛ, ngɛ waabɩ́rɩ tulaarɩ́ arɔɔzɩ́.
7.39: Faríizi ńnɩ́ weení waagáyáa Yeésu kíɖíím ɖíi nɛ́ waana bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, ɩwɛ wɔ́ndɔ́m ɩdaá sɩsɩ: «A toovonúm ɩrʊ́ ceení ɩ́fʊ́ngɛ́ɛ anɖébi, ɩraadɩlɩ́ weení alʊ́ ceení wéndekináa yɩ ɖɔ́ nɛ́ kɛ́ɛ nɛ́; ɩraadɩlɩ́ sɩsɩ wásangarɩ́ gɛ ɩgɛ́ɛ.»
7.40: Ńna gɛ Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Simɔ́ɔnɩ, mɔ́wɛná natɩ́rɩ sɩ maŋmátɩ nya.» Ngɛ Simɔ́ɔnɩ sɩsɩ: «Ŋmatɩ, kʊ́bɔnɩ́.»
7.41: Ngɛ Yeésu sɩsɩ: «Ɩráa nɔɔ́lɛ weeɖi ná kʊ́bɔnɩ́ naárʊ kɩmɛ́rɛ. Badaá kʊ́ɖʊḿ-dɛ́ɛ kɩmɛ́rɛ kɛ́ɛ wɛ́ kákpɩ́ɩ́zɩ nasɩ́lɛ na nɩɩ́nʊ́wá (500) tɩmɛ́rɛ liideé, bɩka sɩɩlɛ ńnɩ́ wɛ́ nɛɛ́saaláa (50) tɩmɛ́rɛ liideé.
7.42: Ńŋɩnáa badaá báa naárʊ tánbɩɩzɩ sɩ ɩfɛ́rɛ yɩ nɛ́, ngɛ wɛɛjɛ́ wɛ barɩ́ŋa. Tɔ́ɔ, bɛlɛ́ɛ́nɩ́ badaá, weení wánbá kʊ ɩsɔ́ɔ́lɩ kʊ́bɔnɩ́ ɩmʊ́ bɩkɩ́lɩ.»
7.43: Ngɛ Simɔ́ɔnɩ woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Mɛ́dɛ́ɛ bɛɛŋ́-daá nɛ́, weení ɩgɩmɛ́rɛ waabá ɖɩɖɔ́ɔ ngɛ bɛɛjɛ́ yɩ nɛ́ gɛ.» Ngɛ Yeésu sɩsɩ: «Nyóóbúsi kazɔ́ɔ.»
7.44: Ńna gɛ Yeésu waavaná alʊ́ ɩzá, ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ Simɔ́ɔnɩ sɩsɩ: «Yaa nyááná alʊ́ ceení ya; máagázʊʊ nyáɖaána-daá nɛ́, ńdáfá ma lɩ́m sɩsɩ mazám mɔ́nʊvɔ́. Amá, ɩlɛ́ waazám yɛ na ɩdɛ́ɛ nzʊlʊ́m bɩka ɩfɩɩzɩná yɛ na ɩnyɔ́ɔ́zɩ.
7.45: Ńdékpíríki ma, amá, ɖoo ɩlɛ́ waagázʊʊ nɛ́, mɔ́nʊvɔ́ gɛ ɩlɔɔ́na kparásɩ wónbusí ɖɔ́.
7.46: Ńdábɩ́rɩ mágʊjʊʊ́-rɔ núm, amá, ɩlɛ́ waabɩ́rɩ mɔ́nʊvɔ́-rɔ tulaarɩ́.
7.47: Bʊrɔɔzɩ́ nɛ́, ménveerím nya sɩsɩ ɩdɛ́ɛ alaháácɩ́wá waabá bʊɖɔ́ɔ gɛ, bɛɛjɛ́ tɩ; biiyéle waawɩ́lɩ sɔɔlɩ́m bɩbá bʊɖɔ́ɔ. Amá, weení bɛɛjɛ́ yɩ cɩ́kɔ nɛ́, wánwɩlɩ́ɩ sɔɔlɩ́m cɩ́kɔ gɛ.»
7.48: Ngɛ Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ alʊ́ sɩsɩ: «Mɛ́ɛ́jɛ́ nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ alaháácɩ́wá.»
7.49: Wenbá bɔwɛ ńna bénɖíi kíɖíím bána yɩ nɛ́, bɔwɛ bɔ́ndɔ́m badaá sɩsɩ: «Ɩrʊ́ ceení gɛ weení gɛ hálɩ wɛ́njɛ́m alaháácɩ́wá ye.»
7.50: Ngɛ Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ alʊ́ sɩsɩ: «Bo nɖɛ́ɛ bɩka njɔ́ɔ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ fɛɛzɩrɛ-daá, nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ toovonúm fáa wɛɛlɛ́ɛ nya.»

8.1: Bɩlɛ́ bʊwɔ́rɔ́ gɛ Yeésu wɛɛɖɛ́ɛ tɛ́ɛ́dɩwá na tɛɛbíízi-daá wánlám waázu bɩka wénveerím Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ kowúrɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Laabáárʊ Kífeńgi. Ɩwanbaaráa fuú na nɔɔ́lɛ fóo yɩ,
8.2: bɩtasɩná aláa nɛbɛ́rɛ wenbá Yeésu wɔɔɖɔ́ɔ zííniwá bɔrɔ nɛ́, na wenbá waawáázɩ wɛ kʊdɔmɩ́nɩ nɛ́: bɛɛ Marɩyáma bánÿaá yɩ sɩsɩ Magɩdaláa alʊ́ Yeésu wɔɔɖɔ́ɔ zííniwá lʊbɛ ɩrɔ nɛ́;
8.3: Yuháána, Eróodi-dɛ́ɛ tɩmɛlanɖáa-rɔ bɛɛŋɩrʊ́ Kúúza ɖɛɛlʊ́, na Suuzáána, na aláa ɖabata nɛbɛ́rɛ ɖʊɖɔ. Aláa bɛḿ bɔ́ngbɔwʊ́ʊ wenbí bɔwɛná nɛ́ bánzɩnáa Yeésu na ɩwanbaaráa. Fɔɔ́-dʊ́ʊ waalɩ́ɩ kúɖúúdi larɩ́ɩ ɩvɔɔ́-daá (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 13.1-9 na Mrk 4.1-9 ɖʊɖɔ)
8.4: Zamɔ́ɔ kʊ́bɔńgɩ woodúúzi; ɩráa waagálɩ́ɩ́ná tɛ́ɛ́dɩwá ndɩ‑ndɩ-daá bɔkɔ́nɩ ɩjɔ́, ngɛ waaŋmatɩná wɛ na tɔmgɛɛzɩrɛ sɩsɩ:
8.5: «Ɩrʊ́ naárʊ woobo ná ɩvɔɔ́-daá kúɖúúdi larɩ́ɩ . Wánlarɩ́ɩ nɛ́, ngɛ natɩ́rɩ waazála nɩ́bááwʊ‑nɩ́bááwʊ, nɩ́baaɖɛɛráa ɩnʊ́ŋ tɩrɔ, ngɛ siḿsi wɔɔgɔ́nɩ siɖi tɩ.
8.6: Natɩ́rɩ waazála bɔ́-daá; tɩɩnyɔ nɛ́, ngɛ tɩɩwɩ́lɩ, káma, adɛ fɛ́yɩ́ kaanɩŋá.
8.7: Kúɖúúdi natɩ́rɩ waazála sɔɔzɔ́ɔ́zɩ-daá, ngɛ tɩ́na sɔɔzɔ́ɔ́zɩ tiiyóózi tɩnyɔ, sɔɔzɔ́ɔ́zɩ ɩnyʊʊ́ tɩ.
8.8: Natɩ́rɩ waazála tɛ́ɛ́dɩ kazɔ́ɔ ndɩ-daá. Ngɛ tɩlɛ́ tɩɩɖʊ bíya, tikú báa wenkí-rɔ, bíya nɩɩ́nʊ́wá.» Ngɛ Yeésu waaŋmátɩ bɩcáárɩ sɩsɩ: «Weení ɩwɛná nɩgbamɩ́nɩ nɛ́, ɩ́nɩɩ.» Wenbí bʊrɔ Yeésu wánŋmatɩnáa tɔmgɛɛza nɛ́ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 13.10-17 na Mrk 4.10-12 ɖʊɖɔ)
8.9: Ngɛ wanbaaráa wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Tɔmgɛɛzɩrɛ ɖɩḿ ɖugutoluú gɛ sɩsɩ wé.»
8.10: Ńna gɛ Yeésu woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Mɩ́nyɔ́ɔ́ nɛ́, Ɩsɔ́ɔ waava mɩ́ɩ sɩsɩ ɩ́tɩ́lɩ́ ɩdɛ́ɛ kowúrɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ ásííríwá. Amá, baaganáa nɛ́, tɔmgɛɛza-daá gɛ bánwɩlɩnáa wɛ, na: “Bɛbɛɛ́na bɩka bádánnáa, bénwelesí bɩka bádánnɩɩ.”» Kúɖúúdi baalára fɔɔ́-daá nɛ́-dɛ́ɛ tɔmgɛɛzɩrɛ kutoluú (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 13.18-23 na Mrk 4.13-20 ɖʊɖɔ)
8.11: «Tɔmgɛɛzɩrɛ ɖɩḿ ɖugutoluú nɖɔ́: kúɖúúdi gɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m.
8.12: Nɩ́bááwʊ‑nɩ́bááwʊ lénlé kúɖúúdi waazála nɛ́ gɛ ɩráa wenbá baanɩ́ɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m, ngɛ Sitáánɩ wɔɔgɔ́nɩ nɛ́, wɛɛgbɛzɩ́ tɔ́m tɩḿ bewenbé-daá na bʊcɔ bákafa toovonúm bɩka boyuú lɛ́ɛ́dɩ.
8.13: Bɔ́-daá lénlé kúɖúúdi waazála nɛ́ gɛ ɩráa wenbá baanɩ́ɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m na bacáŋ bamʊ tɩ na wenbi‑niíni nɛ́. Amá, bedeyéle tɔ́m tɩḿ tɩnyɔ wóózi: bánváa toovonúm alɩwáátɩ nakɩ́rɩ gɛ, ngɛ a nɔwɛ́ya waadála kɩmɔɔná wɛ, na babɩ́sɩ bɔwɔ́rɔ́.
8.14: Sɔɔzɔ́ɔ́zɩ-daá lénlé kúɖúúdi waazála nɛ́ gɛ ɩráa wenbá bánnɩɩ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m na beyéle lomaazɛ́ na ɖɔ́ɔ́lɛ na ɖúúlínya-dɛ́ɛ kɔɖɛyɩ́wá ɩkɔ́nɩ bɩnyʊʊ́ tɩ bɩka bádánɖʊ́ʊ bíya bɛsɛ́ɛ nɛ́.
8.15: Tɛ́ɛ́dɩ kazɔ́ɔ ńdɩ-daá lénlé kúɖúúdi waazála nɛ́ gɛ ɩráa wenbá bánnɩɩ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m, ngɛ bánmʊ́ʊ tɩ na wenbiré kʊ́ɖʊńɖɛ bɩka bɔ́nɖɔkɩ́ tɩ bánjaarɩ́ badɩ hálɩ baɖʊ bíya nɛ́.» Nabʊ́rʊ fɛ́yɩ́ bɩmʊ́sɛ́ɛ bádánnáa bɩ nɛ́ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mrk 4.21-25 ɖʊɖɔ)
8.16: Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́tɔḿ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Bɔ́dɔ́nzɔḿ fɩtɩ́la na bɔkpɔ́ɔ gbégídi bofu kɩrɔ yáá basɩ́ɩ kɩ gáɖó-dɛ. Amá, bɔ́ngbɔwʊ́ʊ kɩ gɛ batɩ́nɩ ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá na wenbá bángazʊʊ́ nɛ́ bana ɖɛnyɛm.
8.17: Káma, nabʊ́rʊ fɛ́yɩ́ bɩmʊ́sɛ́ɛ bɩ́dánlɩɩ bana bɩ nɛ́, cáńfáná ásíírí bádándɩlɩ́ kɩ nɛ́.
8.18: Iguná laakáarɩ na nŋɩ́nɩ́ mɩ́nnɩɩ́ nɛ́, káma, weení ɩwɛná nɛ́, bándasɩ́ yɩ. Amá, weení ɩvɛ́yɩ́na nɛ́, bɛ́nlɛɛ́ bɩkpɛdɩ́na cʊ́kɔyɔ́ɔ wenká wánmaazɩ́ sɩsɩ ɩwɛná kɛ nɛ́.» Wenbá bɛgɛ́ɛ Yeésu igoobíya páá nɛ́ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 12.46-50 na Mrk 3.31-35 ɖʊɖɔ)
8.19: Yeésu ɩgɔɔ na igoobíya bɔɔgɔ́nɩ ɩjɔ́, amá, zamɔ́ɔ-rɔ nɛ́, bádánbɩɩzɩ bobó hálɩ ɩjɔ́.
8.20: Ngɛ naárʊ veevééri yɩ sɩsɩ: «Bɛɛ ngɔɔ na ngoobíya bɔwɛ asʊ bánjáádɩ sɩsɩ bana nya.»
8.21: Ngɛ woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Mɔgɔɔ na mogoobíya gɛ wenbá bánnɩɩ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m bɩka bónvúu bánlám wenbí tɩ́nbɔɔzɩ́ nɛ́.» Yeésu waagazɩ́ fefelimá na lɩ́m bɩsála ɖɛfɛɛ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 8.23-27 na Mrk 4.35-41 ɖʊɖɔ)
8.22: Wɩ́rɛ neɖére gɛ Yeésu na ɩwanbaaráa baagba kpɩ́ɩ́rʊʊ́-daá, ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ɖɩ́tɛsɩ lɩɩrɛ́ kʊ́bɔńɖɛ-dɛ́ɛ fúu lí ńgɩ-rɔ.» Ngɛ bɛɛɖɛ́ɛ.
8.23: Babamáa kpɩ́ɩ́rʊʊ́ saá bɛ́nɖɛɛ́ nɛ́, Yeésu wooɖóo. Ngɛ fefelimá kʊ́bɔná naárɛ waajáŋ abáázɩ fɛtɩ́ na ɖóni lɩɩrɛ́ kʊ́bɔńɖɛ-rɔɔzɩ́; lɩ́m waabáázɩ kpɩ́ɩ́rʊʊ́-daá sʊʊ́ bínzúu hálɩ bɛ́nɖɛɛ́ sɩ́m nɔɔ́.
8.24: Ngɛ wanbaaráa woodúu Yeésu-jɔ́ beféézi yɩ bɔ́ndɔ́m sɩsɩ: «Kʊ́bɔnɩ́, Kʊ́bɔnɩ́, ɖánzɩ́m!» Yeésu weevé, ngɛ waagazɩ́ fefelimá na lɩmvolá. Ngɛ bɩrɩ́ŋa bɩɩzála bɩcɔ́ɔ ɖɛfɛɛ.
8.25: Bʊwɔ́rɔ́ gɛ Yeésu wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Lé gɛ mɩ́dɛ́ɛ toovonúm fáa wɛ.» Nɩdáárɛ waalá wɛ, bɩlá wɛ bítí hálɩ bɔ́nbɔɔzɩ́ ɖamá sɩsɩ: «Ɩrʊ́ weení gɛ ceení bɩlɛ́ gɛ bɩkpɛdɩ́na fefelimá na lɩ́m wánlám wenbí wɔ́nbɔɔzɩ́ nɛ́.» Yeésu wɔɔɖɔ́ɔ zííniwá ɩrʊ́ naárʊ-rɔ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 8.28-34 na Mrk 5.1-20 ɖʊɖɔ)
8.26: Yeésu na ɩwanbaaráa boobó batála Geraseníi ńba-dɛ́ɛ laadɔ́ɔ-rɔ; laadɔ́ɔ kɛḿ na Galilée laadɔ́ɔ baazá fáána ɖamá gɛ.
8.27: Sáátɩ wenkí baalɩ́ɩ kpɩ́ɩ́rʊʊ́-daá betí adɛ nɛ́, ngɛ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá ɩrʊ́ naárʊ wɔɔgɔ́nɩ sɩ ɩsɩ́ŋ yɩ. Ɩrʊ́ ɩmʊ́, zííniwá ɩbaná tɩ́njaarɩ́ yɩ. Bɩɩbá bɩlá wɛ́ náálɛ ídóndosuu kpɩná bɩka ɩ́dánzʊʊ ɖaána nɛkɛ́rɛ-daá nɛ́, bɔɔláánɩ-daá gɛ ɩwɛ.
8.28: Waana Yeésu nɛ́, ngɛ waamá kebiká, ɩcɛ́ ɩsála ɩlɛ́ ɩnʊvɔ́-dɛ wóngoó wɔ́ndɔ́m sɩsɩ: «We gɛ nyɔ́zɔɔlɛ́ɛ na ma, Yeésu Ɩsɔ́ɔ bílí‑bílí-dʊ́ʊ Biyaalʊ́. Máávɩ́nɩ nya, nkanáázɩ ma.»
8.29: Káma, Yeésu waaŋmatɩná zííni ɩsɩ́ɩ́zɩ kɩ sɩsɩ kɩ́lɩɩ ɩrʊ́ ɩmʊ́ ɩrɔ. Wenbí bʊrɔɔzɩ́ nɛ́, zííni kɩḿ kɩɩbá kɩlɔɔná ɩrʊ́ ɩmʊ́ caarɩ́ gɛ. Na babɩ́ɩ́zɩ basɩ́ɩ yɩ ɖɩdáarɛ kʊ́ɖʊńɖɛ nɛ́, bɔ́nvɔkɩ́ yɩ na agbarangbára na nyɩɩrɩ́tɩ gɛ. Amá, waalaaná bɩlɛ́ bɩrɩ́ŋa cɛ́m, bɩka zííni wónbonáa yɩ faɖáma-daá lénlé ɩráa fɛ́yɩ́ nɛ́.
8.30: Ngɛ Yeésu wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Sɩsɩ wé gɛ bánÿaá nya.» Ngɛ ɩrʊ́ ɩmʊ́ sɩsɩ: «Tuutúúma». Káma, zííniwá ɖabata fóo na kʊ yɩ.
8.31: Bɩka tɩ́nvɩnɩ́ Yeésu sɩsɩ íkeyéle tɩḿ tɩsʊ́ʊ azáába-daá.
8.32: Ngʊ́ lénlé bɔwɛ nɛ́, bʊ́ʊ cʊ́ʊ́na wɛ. Bɩka afawá tuutúúma natɩ́rɩ wɛ bʊ́ʊ-rɔ tínɖíi. Ngɛ zííniwá waavɩ́nɩ yɩ sɩsɩ íyéle tɩḿ tibó tɩsʊ́ʊ afawá tɩḿ. Ngɛ ɩlɛ́ waava tɩ nɩ́bááwʊ.
8.33: Ńna gɛ zííniwá waalɩ́ɩ ɩrʊ́ ɩmʊ́ ɩrɔ tibó tɩsʊ́ʊ afawá, ngɛ afawá fuúre rɩ́ŋa waagálɩɩ bʊ́ʊ-rɔ tise tɩsála lɩɩrɛ́ kʊ́bɔńɖɛ-daá, lɩ́m iɖi tɩ tɩsɩ́.
8.34: Tɩdɛ́ɛ ketiráa waana wenbí bɩɩlá nɛ́, ngɛ beeze bobó bekéveeri tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá na fásɩ-daá.
8.35: Ngɛ ɩráa wɔɔgɔ́nɩ sɩ bɛbɛ́ɛ́ŋ wenbí bɩɩlá nɛ́. Baadála Yeésu-jɔ́ nɛ́, baana ɩrʊ́ weení zííniwá waalɩ́ɩ ɩrɔ nɛ́ ɩjɔɔ́ɔ Yeésu nʊvɔ́-jɔ́ izóóna kpɩná bɩka ɩ́na ɩdɩ. Ńna gɛ bɩɩbá bɩlá wɛ nɩdáárɛ.
8.36: Wenbá baana wenbí bɩɩlá nɛ́, baadɩ́ nŋɩ́nɩ́ bɩɩlá hálɩ zííniwá-dʊ́ʊ iyuú alaafɩ́ya nɛ́ befééri baaganáa.
8.37: Ńna gɛ Geraseníi laadɔ́ɔ-daá ɩráa rɩ́ŋa wɔɔdɔ́ Yeésu sɩsɩ ɩ́lɩɩ bɛḿ balaadɔ́ɔ-daá ɩɖɛ́ɛ bolíni; wenbí bʊrɔɔzɩ́ nɛ́ nɩdáárɛ kʊ́bɔńɖɛ waabá ɖɩkpa wɛ. Ngɛ Yeésu waagba kpɩ́ɩ́rʊʊ́-daá sɩ ɩbɩ́sɩ.
8.38: Ɩrʊ́ weení zííniwá waalɩ́ɩ ɩrɔ nɛ́ waavɩ́nɩ yɩ sɩsɩ íyele ɩmʊ́ ifu yɩ. Amá, Yeésu weegízi ɩtɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ:
8.39: «Bɩsɩ nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ bɩka ndɩ́ wenbí bɩrɩ́ŋa Ɩsɔ́ɔ waalá nya nɛ́ nvééri.» Ngɛ ɩrʊ́ ɩmʊ́ wɛɛɖɛ́ɛ ɩbáázɩ ɩráa feerím tɛ́ɛ́dɩ rɩ́ŋa-daá wenbí bɩrɩ́ŋa Yeésu waalá yɩ nɛ́. Yeésu waawáázɩ alʊ́ naárʊ bɩka iféézi bú aléeréyɔ́ɔ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 9.18-26 na Mrk 5.21-43 ɖʊɖɔ)
8.40: Yeésu waadála lɩɩrɛ́ kʊ́bɔńɖɛ-dɛ́ɛ fúu lí ńgɩ-rɔ nɛ́, zamɔ́ɔ kɩvʊnwɛ ńna kɩɖamáa yɩ nɛ́, kɩɩmʊ yɩ.
8.41: Ńna gɛ ɩrʊ́ naárʊ wɔɔgɔ́nɩ ɩjɔ́, bánÿaá yɩ sɩsɩ Yááhíru. Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɖaazɛɛɖɛ́-dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnɩ́ gɛ ɩgɛ́ɛ. Ngɛ wɛɛjɛ́ ɩsála Yeésu nʊvɔ́-dɛ wánvɩnɩ́ yɩ sɩsɩ ɩ́kɔnɩ ɩdɛ́ɛ ɖaána-daá.
8.42: Káma, ɩwɛná bú aléeré, iriké kóŋ́ gɛ bɩɩva yɩ. Bú ɩmʊ́ ɩwɛná bɩ́ɩ́zɩ fuú na nasɩ́lɛ gɛ, ngɛ ɩbá wánnyaadɩ́ wánlʊwɔ́ɔ na sɩ́m. Sáátɩ wenkí Yeésu wɔɔgbɔ́ɔ nɩ́bááwʊ wɛ́nɖɛɛ́ ńna nɛ́, zamɔ́ɔ fóo yɩ kɩbá kɩ́nyʊʊ́ yɩ cé na cé.
