20.21: Bɛlɛ́ bɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Kʊ́bɔnɩ́, ɖányɩ sɩsɩ toovonúm gɛ nyánŋmatɩ́ bɩka nyánwɩlɩ́ɩ kazɔ́ɔ, ngʊ́ bɩlɛ́ gɛ nyáábafɛ́yɩ́na naárʊ, amá, nyánwɩlɩ́ɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m na toovonúm gɛ.
20.22: Bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, feeri ɖáa wentí nyánmaazɩ́ tɔ́m tɩna tɩrɔ nɛ́: Bɩɩva nɩ́bááwʊ yáá bɩdafa sɩsɩ ɖɩ́fɛrɛ Róóma wúro kʊ́bɔnɩ́ lanpóo.»
20.23: Amá, Yeésu nyɩ bɛdɛ́ɛ lɔ́nɩ-rɔ nɛ́, ngɛ sɩsɩ:
20.24: «Ɩwɩ́lɩ ma liideé mɩ́nvɛrɛnáa lanpóo nɛ́. Weení kʊjʊʊ́ na ɩyɩ́ɖɛ gɛ kɩrɔ.» Ngɛ boobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Róóma wúro kʊ́bɔnɩ́ gɛ.»
20.25: Ńna gɛ Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ijéle Róóma wúro kʊ́bɔnɩ́ wenbí bɩgɛ́ɛ Róóma wúro kʊ́bɔnɩ́-dɛ́ɛ ńbɩ nɛ́, bɩka icéle Ɩsɔ́ɔ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ ńbɩ.»
20.26: Bodoyuú natɩ́rɩ ɩdɛ́ɛ ŋmatɩrɛ-daá bobuuná bakʊ ɩdɔ́m zamɔ́ɔ ɩzá-daá ńna. Hálɩ ɩdɛ́ɛ tɔ́m busí waalá wɛ bítí gɛ bosú tɔ́m. Ɩsɩɖáa-daá fém-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 22.23-33 na Mrk 12.18-27 ɖʊɖɔ)
20.27: Bʊwɔ́rɔ́ gɛ Sadusée ńba wenbá bɔ́ndɔ́m sɩsɩ ɩsɩɖáa ténveḿ nɛ́, boogóduu Yeésu-jɔ́ bɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ:
20.28: «Kʊ́bɔnɩ́, Múúsá wɔɔdɔ́ sɩsɩ a ɩrʊ́ abaalʊ́ talʊ́rʊ gɛ waazɩ́, bɩɩbɔ́ɔ́zɩ igoobú ɩfʊ́ leelú na ɩlʊ́rʊ bíya babɩ́sɩ koobúu weení waazɩ́ nɛ́ ɩdɛ́ɛ bíya.
20.29: Ngʊ́ ɖɔ́ɔ́ ɖɛ́dɛ́ɛ, koobíya lʊbɛ wɛ ná. Kaɖaa ńnɩ́ wɔɔgbɔ́ɔ alʊ́ nɛ́ waazɩ́, ɩdalʊ́rʊ.
20.31: toozo ńnɩ́ ɩkpɔ́ɔ yɩ, bɩlɛ́ gɛ bɩɩlaaná hálɩ bɛdɛ́ɛ lʊbɛ basɩ́ bɩka báa kʊ́ɖʊḿ talʊ́rʊ.
20.32: Barɩ́ŋa baazɩ́ wɔ́rɔ́ nɛ́, ngɛ leelú ɖʊɖɔ waazɩ́.
20.33: Tɔ́ɔ, ńŋɩnáa barɩ́ŋa bɔɔgbɔ́ɔ yɩ nɛ́, wɩ́rɛ wenɖé ɩsɩɖáa sɩ befé bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, badaá weení gɛ alʊ́ waalʊ́ ɖɔ́.»
20.34: Yeésu woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ɖúúlínya kɩna kɩdaá gɛ aláa na abaaláa bɔ́ngbɔwʊ́ʊ ɖamá.
20.35: Amá, wenbá Ɩsɔ́ɔ weeɖéézi wɛ sɩsɩ bónÿuú ceré bɩka befé balɩ́ɩ ɩsɩɖáa-daá nɛ́ bɔ́dɔngbɔwʊ́ aláa yáá basáa abaaláa.
20.36: Bɛlɛ́ bádándasɩḿ ɖʊɖɔ, káma, bɔjɔɔ́ɔ gɛ nyazɩ malááyɩ́kawá. Bɛgɛ́ɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ biyaalɩnáa gɛ, káma, beevé balɩ́ɩ ɩsɩɖáa-daá.
20.37: Múúsá waawɩ́lɩ bɩlɛ́ sɔɔzɔ́ɔ́zɩ-daá nimidʊlʊʊ́-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m-daá sáátɩ wenkí waayáa Ɖádʊ́ʊ sɩsɩ Ibrahím na Ɩsaáka na Yaakúbu bɛdɛ́ɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ nɛ́.
20.38: Ɩsɔ́ɔ tɛkɛ́ɛ ɩsɩɖáa-dɛ́ɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ, amá, weezíni-dɩnáa-dɛ́ɛ ńnɩ́ gɛ ɩgɛ́ɛ. Káma, ɩjɔ́ nɛ́ wenbá barɩ́ŋa bɛgɛ́ɛ ɩdɛ́ɛ ńba nɛ́ bɔwɛ weezuú-daá gɛ.»
20.39: Ńna gɛ Mará wɩlɩɖáa nɛbɛ́rɛ wɔɔdɔ́ sɩsɩ: «Kʊ́bɔnɩ́, nyááŋmátɩ kazɔ́ɔ.»
20.40: Káma, bɩdɩ́ŋa-rɔ bodokúti boyuú wenbiré bɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ tɔ́m natɩ́rɩ ɖʊɖɔ. Lɛɛrʊ́ waagɩ́lɩ wúro Ɖáwʊɖa (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 22.41-46 na Mrk 12.35-37 ɖʊɖɔ)
20.41: Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Nŋɩ́nɩ́ gɛ ɩráa wánbɩɩzɩ́ bɔtɔ́ sɩsɩ Lɛɛrʊ́ kɛ́ɛ Ɖáwʊɖa biyaalʊ́.
20.42: Káma, Ɖáwʊɖa tɩtɩŋa wɔɔdɔ́ Yéńdiwá-dɛ́ɛ tákaraɖá-daá sɩsɩ: “Ɖádʊ́ʊ wɔɔdɔ́ Mádʊ́ʊ sɩsɩ: ‘Cɔɔ mégíɖíiwú-rɔ
20.44: A bɩlɛ́ gɛ Ɖáwʊɖa waayáa yɩ sɩsɩ Ɩdʊ́ʊ, bɩɩlá nŋɩ́nɩ́ gɛ igúti ɩgɛ́ɛ ibiyaalʊ́ ɖʊɖɔ.» Iguná laakáarɩ na Mará wɩlɩɖáa (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 23.1-36 na Mrk 12.38-40 ɖʊɖɔ)
20.45: Bɩlɛ́ bʊwɔ́rɔ́ gɛ Yeésu waaŋmatɩná ɩwanbaaráa zamɔ́ɔ rɩ́ŋa kiwelesée yɩ nɛ́ kɩɩzá-daá sɩsɩ:
20.46: «Iguná laakáarɩ na Mará wɩlɩɖáa. Bɔzɔɔlɛ́ɛ béngilím bozóóna kpáyɩwá kʊ́bɔńdɩ bɩka ɖʊɖɔ bɔzɔɔlɛ́ɛ gɛ a bɛ́nzɛɛ́ wɛ zamɔ́ɔ-daá, bɔ́nɖɔɔzɩ́ wɛ. Kʊ́bɔɔ-ɖɩdáarɛ gɛ bɔɔzɔ́ɔ́lɩ cɔwʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɖaazɛɛɖɛ́ na ɖíínawá-daá.
20.47: Bɛ́nlɛɛ́ leeláa-jɔ́ wenbí bɩrɩ́ŋa bɛlɛ́ bɔwɛná nɛ́, bɩka bánlám sʊlʊ́ńdɩ kɩ́bɩɩzɩ́tɩ na ɩráa ɩna wɛ. Bʊrɔɔzɩ́ gɛ bɛdɛ́ɛ nɩgbamʊʊ́ fɔ́m wánbá bɩlá ɖóni.»

21.1: Yeésu waagʊ́sɩ ɩzá nɛ́, ngɛ waana liideé-dɩnáa wánɖʊ́ʊ bɛdɛ́ɛ kʊjɔ́ɔ́nɩ, kʊjɔ́ɔ́nɩ ɖaaɖʊ́ʊ́ɖɛ.
21.2: Ngɛ waadánáa leelú kɛdɛɛrɩ́ya nɛkɛ́rɛ waaɖʊ jɩtɔ́ɔ yáawá nasɩ́lɛ sɩdatála nabʊ́rʊ nɛ́.
21.3: Ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ sɩsɩ: «Ménveerím mɩ́ɩ toovonúm sɩsɩ leelú kɛdɛɛrɩ́ya kana kaaɖʊ kakɩ́lɩ baaganáa rɩ́ŋa.
21.4: Káma, baaganáa rɩ́ŋa waalɩzɩ́ weená avɛ́yɩ́na wɛ fɔ́ɔ́zɩrɛ nɛ́ adaá gɛ, amá, kɛḿ nɛ́, na bɩrɩ́ŋa na kɛdɛ́ɛ kɛdɛɛrɩ́tɩ, kaava wenbí bɩrɩ́ŋa kɔwɛná sɩ bité kɛ nɛ́ gɛ.» Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-dɛ́ɛ yɔ́m na nbusúwá sɩ tɩkɔ́nɩ nɛ́ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 24.1-14 na Mrk 13.1-13 ɖʊɖɔ)
21.5: Nɛbɛ́rɛ wɛ bánŋmatɩ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-dɛ́ɛ máa-dɛ́ɛ kazɔ́ɔ, na bɔ́ baamaná kɛ nɛ́, na kpɩná baava Ɩsɔ́ɔ nɛ́-dɛ́ɛ kazɔ́ɔ nɛ́, ngɛ Yeésu sɩsɩ:
21.6: «Wɩ́rɛ wándalɩ́ɩ, bɩ́dángáa bʊ́ʊ́rɛ ɖɩdɩ́nɛ́ɛ ɖɩrɔwʊ́-rɔ. Bɩrɩ́ŋa bínnuudí.»
21.7: Ngɛ bɛlɛ́ bɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Kʊ́bɔnɩ́, feeri ɖáa sáátɩ wenkí sɩ bɩlá bɩlɛ́ nɛ́ na nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ kɔnɖɛ́ na ɖúúlínya kʊrʊ́ʊ-dɛ́ɛ seríya.»
21.8: Ngɛ Yeésu woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Iguná laakáarɩ, naárʊ ɩ́kɛtɛlɛ́sɩ mɩ́ɩ. Káma, ɩráa ɖabata wɔ́ngɔnɩ́ na máyɩ́ɖɛ-daá, bɔtɔ́ sɩsɩ: “Mɔ́ɔ́ gɛ Lɛɛrʊ́, alɩwáátɩ waadála.” Íkofu wɛ.
21.9: A mɩ́nnɩɩ́ bánŋmatɩ́ yóóni na ɖamá kʊrʊ́na-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m, ɩ́kanɩ́ɩ nɩdáárɛ! Káma, bɩmɔɔ́na bɩlɛ́ bɩrɩ́ŋa bɩtála. Amá, bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ sɩsɩ ɖúúlínya kʊrʊ́ʊ waajaŋ ná bɩtála.»
21.10: Ngɛ woozúúri sɩsɩ: «Yíri wónÿoó yíri, wúro iyóo wúro;
21.11: Fáráńdɩ́wá ndɩ‑ndɩ-daá, adɛ wánbá biséle, kɩzɩ́kʊ ɩlá, nyɔɔ́sɩ ɖʊɖɔ ɩlá. Bónlosí maanáwá tɩjɔɔ́ɔ nɩdáárɛ nɛ́ ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá, na maamááciwá kʊ́bɔńdɩ.
21.12: Amá, naanɩ́ bɩlɛ́ bɩrɩ́ŋa bɩtála nɛ́, bángbáa mɩ́ɩ, banáázɩ mɩ́ɩ, bɩka bakʊ mɩ́ɩ. Bɔ́ngbɔwʊ́ʊ mɩ́ɩ becéle tɔmvʊʊráa Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɖaazɛɛɖɛ́, bɔtɔ mɩ́ɩ sáráka. Bánÿaá mɩ́ɩ wɔnásɩ wúrowá na laadásɩ-dɛ́ɛ nɩ́baadɛɛráa-jɔ́ máyɩ́ɖɛ-rɔɔzɩ́.
21.14: Ɩdɩlɩ́ ɩsɩ́ɩ mɩ́gʊjʊ́nɩ-daá sɩsɩ bɩdɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ ɩfʊ́ńgbɩɩrɩ kúbúsíti sáátɩ wenkí sɩ bafʊʊná mɩ́ɩ nɛ́.
21.15: Mádɩtɩŋa sɩ mejele ná mɩ́ɩ áséńsí ŋmatɩrɛ wenɖé mɩ́báɖaanáa tánbɩɩzɩ bɔcɔ́ɔ́lɩ ɖɛ péḿ nɛ́.
21.16: Mɩ́jaanáa tɩtɩŋa na mɩ́gɔɔnáa, mígoobíya, mígoobíre, na mɩ́ɖɔndɩnáa wánÿám mɩ́ɩ, beyéle bakʊ mɩ́dáá nɛbɛ́rɛ tɔ́m sɩsɩ bákʊ́ wɛ.
21.18: Amá, báa mɩ́gʊjʊʊ́-daá nyɔká kʊ́ɖʊmɔ́ɔ tɛ́nbɛɖɩ.
21.19: Ɩɖɔ́kɩ mɩ́dɩ: Bɩlɛ́ bínÿelíi kʊ ɩlɛ́ɛ míweezíni.» Wenbí sɩ bɩlá Yerusalɛ́ɛm-dɛ́ɛ nuudí sáátɩ nɛ́ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 24.15-21 na Mrk 13.14-19 ɖʊɖɔ)
21.20: «A bɩgɛ́ɛ mɩ́ɩ́ná sɔ́ɔ́jawá waalára bamɩlɩná Yerusalɛ́ɛm, ɩdɩlɩ́ sɩsɩ tɩdɛ́ɛ nuudí waadála.
21.21: Bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ nɛ́, wenbá bɔwɛ Yudée laadɔ́ɔ-daá nɛ́, bésé bɛɖɛ́ɛ bʊ́ʊ́nɩ-daá. Wenbá bɔwɛ Yerusalɛ́ɛm tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá nɛ́, bálɩɩ. Wenbá bɔwɛ fásɩ nɛ́ bákákázʊʊ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá.
21.22: Káma, wɛ́-bíya bɛḿ badaá Ɩsɔ́ɔ wɔ́nvɔ́m ɩráa nɩgbamʊʊ́ nɛ́ gɛ wentí tɩrɩ́ŋa baaŋmáa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Tɔ́m Tákaraɖá-daá nɛ́ wóngoodí.
21.23: Nbusú ɖamáa na aláa bɛyɛ́ɛna fúúzi nɛ́, na wenbá bebíya wánmʊzʊ́ʊ wɛ wɛ́ amʊ́ nɛ́. Káma, laadɔ́ɔ kɛḿ kánnáa wahála kʊ́bɔńgɩ, bɩka Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ baaná ití kɛdɛ́ɛ ɩráa-rɔ.
21.24: Bángʊ́ʊ nɛbɛ́rɛ na tókobíwá, bakpa nɛbɛ́rɛ yoḿti bɛɖɛɛná laadásɩwá rɩ́ŋa-daá na bɩka wenbá baasɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ nɛ́ bonúúdi Yerusalɛ́ɛm hálɩ alɩwáátɩ wenkí baava wɛ nɛ́ ɩtɛ́.» Wenbí sɩ bɩlá Ɩrʊ́ Biyaalʊ́-dɛ́ɛ kɔnɩ́ sáátɩ nɛ́ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 24.29-31 na Mrk 13.24-27 ɖʊɖɔ)
21.25: «Yáásɩ́wá natɩ́rɩ wánlám wɩ́sɩ-daá, na fenɔɔ́-daá, na wɩlásɩ-daá; bɩka adɛ laadɔ́ɔ-rɔɔzɩ́, tenkú na kɩdɛ́ɛ lɩmvolá-dɛ́ɛ agogo wánbá bɩsʊ́ʊ́zɩ yíriwá kaanɩŋá.
21.26: Baɖamáa nbusúwá sɩ tɩkɔ́nɩ adɛ laadɔ́ɔ-rɔ nɛ́, ɩráa wɛ́nbɛlɩ́ɩ basɩ́ nɩdaazɩ́m. Káma, yíkowá tɩwɛ ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá nɛ́ tínzelíi.
21.27: Sáátɩ kɩḿ gɛ bánnáa Ɩrʊ́ Biyaalʊ́ wɛ́ngɛɖɛɛ́ ŋmɩnʊʊ́-rɔɔzɩ́ ɩ́gana yíko rɩ́ŋa na ásícé rɩ́ŋa.
21.28: A bɩdɛ́ɛ yáásɩ́wá tɩḿ tɩɩbáázɩ lám, ɩgʊrʊ́ ɩsɩ́ŋ bɩka ɩkʊ́sɩ kʊjʊʊ́, káma, mɩ́dɛ́ɛ lɛ́ɛ́dɩ waajʊ́ʊ.» Wenbí figíyée tɩɩwʊ́-dɛ́ɛ cɔwʊrɛ wánwɩlɩ́ɩ nɛ́ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 24.32-35 na Mrk 13.28-31 ɖʊɖɔ)
21.29: Ngɛ waaŋmatɩná wɛ na tɔmgɛɛzɩrɛ sɩsɩ: «Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ figíyée tɩɩwʊ́ na tɩ́ɩ́nɩ rɩ́ŋa:
21.30: a bɩgɛ́ɛ sɩsɩ tɩɩbáázɩ fáádɩ lɩzɩ́ɩ, mɩ́dɩtɩŋa mɩ́nyɩ sɩsɩ lʊngʊrɛ́ waajʊ́ʊ nbɩlɛ́.
21.31: Bɩlɛ́ nɛ́ mɩ́nyɔ́ɔ́ ɖʊɖɔ, a bɩgɛ́ɛ sɩsɩ mɩ́ɩ́ná yáásɩ́wá tɩḿ tɩ́nlám, ɩdɩlɩ́ sɩsɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ kowúrɔ́ɔ waajʊ́ʊ.
21.32: Ménveerím mɩ́ɩ toovonúm sɩsɩ zaamáánɩ kɩna kɩdɛ́ɛ ɩráa tɛ́ndɛŋ́ na bɩrɩ́ŋa ɖɔ́ bɩtála.
21.33: Adɛ na ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá wɛ́ndɛlɛ́ŋ, amá, mɛ́dɛ́ɛ ŋmatɩrɛ tɛ́ndɛlɛ́ŋ kɛtɛngɛrɛ.» Bɩ́nbɔɔzɩ́ ɩráa kpɩɩrɛ́ɛ badɩ bɩka beveráa
21.34: «Ɩɖɔ́kɩ mɩ́dɩ míveráa na ɩ́kɔkpɔ́ɔ mɩ́dɩ ɩɖʊ ɖíi na nyɔ́ɔ́dɩ na wenbí sɩ bʊɖɔ́kɩ mɩ́ɩ weezuú-daá nɛ́ bɩdɛ́ɛ lomaazɛ́wá-daá, na bɩdɛ́ɛ wɩ́rɛ ɖɩḿ ɖɩ́kɔkɔ́nɩ ɖɩtála mɩ́raabaazɛ́ɛ́na.
21.35: Sɩ ɖɩcɛ́ gɛ ɖɩsála wenbá barɩ́ŋa bɔwɛ adɛ laadɔ́ɔ rɩ́ŋa-rɔ nɛ́ bɔrɔ nyazɩ bɔ́nlɔ́ɔ biruú nɛ́.
21.36: Bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, ɩjɔ́ɔ míveráa bɩka mɩ́nzɛɛ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ báa sáátɩ wenkí, na ɩbɩ́ɩ́zɩ iyuú ɖóni ɩlɩ́ɩ wenbí bɩrɩ́ŋa sɩ bɩkɔ́nɩ nɛ́ bɩdaá, na ɩbɩ́ɩ́zɩ ɩsɩ́ŋ Ɩrʊ́ Biyaalʊ́ ɩzá-daá.»
21.37: Ɩdaavéézi nɛ́, Yeésu wánwɩlɩ́ɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-daá gɛ; amá, kínÿúu nɛ́, na ɩlɩ́ɩ ɩɖɛ́ɛ bʊ́ʊ bánÿaá kɩ Olivíyée tɩ́ɩ́nɩ bʊ́ʊ nɛ́ kɩdaá ikóɖoo.
21.38: Tɛ́ɛrɛ́-tɛ́ɛrɛ́ nɛ́, zamɔ́ɔ rɩ́ŋa wɔ́ngɔnɩ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-daá bénwelesí yɩ.

22.1: Kpɔ́nɔ́ badaɖʊ kɩ faadɩ́nɩ nɛ́-dɛ́ɛ jíńgáárɩ́ bánÿaá kɩ sɩsɩ Fɛlɛ nɖɛ́ɛ-dɛ́ɛ jíńgáárɩ́ nɛ́ bamáa cʊʊ́.
22.2: Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa kʊ́bɔnáa na Mará wɩlɩɖáa wánjáádɩ nŋɩ́nɩ́ báta balá na bakʊ Yeésu nɛ́, amá, bánnɩɩ́ zamɔ́ɔ nɩdáárɛ. Yudásɩ wánjáádɩ sɩ ɩyá Yeésu (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 26.14-16 na Mrk 14.10-11 ɖʊɖɔ)
22.3: Bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ gɛ Sitáánɩ waazʊ́ʊ Yudásɩ weení bánÿaá yɩ sɩsɩ Isikariyóo bɩka ɩgɛ́ɛ fuú na nɔɔ́lɛ-daá ńnɩ́ naárʊ nɛ́.
22.4: Ngɛ Yudásɩ waagʊrʊ́ ibó ɩmɔɔná Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa kʊ́bɔnáa na sɔ́ɔ́jawá bénveríi Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga nɛ́ bɛdɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnáa ɩ́na wɛ bɔmɔ́ɔ ɖamá nŋɩ́nɩ́ sɩ ɩlá na ɩkpa Yeésu icéle wɛ nɛ́.
22.5: Ńna gɛ bɩɩbá bɩlá wɛ niíni, ngɛ baazɩ́ŋ sɩsɩ bánváa yɩ liideé.
22.6: Kʊjɔɔwʊ sɩ balá Yudásɩ nɛ́ wɔɔmɔ́ɔ yɩ, ngɛ waazʊ́ʊ nɩ́báánɩ cáádɩ na ɩkpa Yeésu icéle wɛ bɩka zamɔ́ɔ tándɩlɩ́. Yeésu weedíri sɩ bakágbɩɩrɩ Fɛlɛ nɖɛ́ɛ-dɛ́ɛ jíńgáárɩ́ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 26.17-25; Mrk 14.12-21; Yʊh 13.21-30 ɖʊɖɔ)
22.7: Kpɔ́nɔ́ badaɖʊ kɩ faadɩ́nɩ nɛ́-dɛ́ɛ jíńgáárɩ́-dɛ́ɛ wɩ́rɛ wenɖé bángʊ́ʊ Fɛlɛ nɖɛ́ɛ-dɛ́ɛ jíńgáárɩ́-dɛ́ɛ feevaláa nɛ́ waadála.
22.8: Ngɛ Yeésu weedíri Pétro na Yʊháánɩ ɩtɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ibó ɩkágbɩɩrɩ ɖáa Fɛlɛ nɖɛ́ɛ-dɛ́ɛ jíńgáárɩ́ na ɖiɖi kɩ.»
22.9: Ngɛ bɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Lé gɛ nyɔ́zɔɔlɛ́ɛ sɩsɩ ɖɩ́kagbɩɩrɩ kɩ.»
22.10: Ngɛ Yeésu woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Bɛɛ́ɛ, a mɩ́ɩ́dála sɩ ɩsʊ́ʊ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá, mɩ́nzɩŋ́ abaalʊ́ naárʊ, ɩgazʊwáána lɩ́m na báyɔ́ɔ. Ivu yɩ ɖaána wenká kadaá sɩ ɩsʊ́ʊ nɛ́,
22.11: na ɩtɔ́ ɖaána-dʊ́ʊ sɩsɩ: “Kʊ́bɔnɩ́ sɩsɩ ɖɩ́bɔɔzɩ nya sɩsɩ ɖaḿ wenkí-daá gɛ ɩmʊ́ sɩ iɖi Fɛlɛ nɖɛ́ɛ-dɛ́ɛ jíńgáárɩ́ ɩ́na ɩwanbaaráa.”
22.12: Wánwɩlɩ́ɩ mɩ́ɩ ɖaḿ kʊ́bɔńgɩ nakɩ́rɩ bísa-daá báńgbɩɩrɩ kɩ. Ńna gɛ ɩgbɩ́ɩ́rɩ ɖáa jíńgáárɩ́.»
22.13: Bɛɛɖɛ́ɛ, ngɛ baagána wenbí nɔ́ɔ́ wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ nɛ́; ngɛ baagbɩ́ɩ́rɩ kɩ. Ɖádʊ́ʊ-dɛ́ɛ kíɖíím kɛdɛɛzɩya ńbɩ ɖíi-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 26.26-30; Mrk 14.22-26; 1Ko 11.23-25 ɖʊɖɔ)
22.14: Kíɖíím ɖíi alɩwáátɩ waadála nɛ́, ngɛ Yeésu na ɩdɛ́ɛ tɩndɩnáa boobó bɔcɔ́ɔ sɩ beɖi.
22.15: Ngɛ Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Máábá mɔzɔ́ɔ́lɩ sɩsɩ meɖi Fɛlɛ nɖɛ́ɛ-dɛ́ɛ jíńgáárɩ́ kɩna mána mɩ́ɩ naanɩ́ mana naazɩrɛ.
22.16: Káma, ménveerím mɩ́ɩ sɩsɩ módóndokúti meɖi kɩ hálɩ wenbí bʊrɔ bénɖíi kɩ nɛ́ ɩkɔ́nɩ bikógoodi Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ kowúrɔ́ɔ-daá.»
22.17: Bʊwɔ́rɔ́ nɛ́, ngɛ wɔɔgbɔ́ɔ sʊlʊ́m na kagbɔ́ɔ, waazá Ɩsɔ́ɔ nɛ́, ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ sɩsɩ: «Ɩmʊ sʊlʊ́m bɩna ɩnyɔ́ɔ ɩka ɖamá.
22.18: Káma, ménveerím mɩ́ɩ sɩsɩ módóndokúti mɔnyɔ́ɔ sʊlʊ́m hálɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ kowúrɔ́ɔ ɩtála.»
22.19: Ngɛ wɔɔgbɔ́ɔ kpɔ́nɔ́. Waazá Ɩsɔ́ɔ kɩrɔ bɩtɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ wɛɛbɛlɩ́ kɩ icéle wɛ ɩtɔ́ sɩsɩ: «Kpɔ́nɔ́ kɩna kɩgɛ́ɛ na mɛ́dɛ́ɛ tɔnʊʊ́ wenkí sɩ malá kɩ sarɔ́ɔ mɩ́rɔ́ɔ́zɩ́ nɛ́. Ɩlá bɩlɛ́ na ɩtɔ́ɔ́zɩ mɔ́rɔ́.»
22.20: Beeɖi kíɖíím bɩtɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ wɔɔgbɔ́ɔ sʊlʊ́m na kagbɔ́ɔ ɩtálaḿ bɩlɛ́ ɖʊɖɔ icéle wɛ ɩtɔ́ sɩsɩ: «Sʊlʊ́m bɩna bɩgɛ́ɛ na keɖiyá kɩ́falɔɔ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ sɩ iɖi kɛ ɩ́na ɩzamɔ́ɔ nɛ́. Bɩgɛ́ɛ na mɛ́dɛ́ɛ azimá sɩ abɩ́rɩ adɛ mɩ́rɔ́ɔ́zɩ́ nɛ́. Azimá amʊ́ sɩ ayele ná na keɖiyá kɛḿ katá.
22.21: Amá, ɩbɛ́ɛ, weení sɩ ɩyá ma nɛ́ wɛ wénɖíi kíɖíím cé mána yɩ.
22.22: Ɩrʊ́ Biyaalʊ́ wánzɩ́m ńŋɩnáa Ɩsɔ́ɔ waazɩ́ɩ́zɩ bɩ nɛ́, amá, nbusú na weení sɩ ɩyá yɩ nɛ́.»
22.23: Ngɛ baabáázɩ ɖamá bɔɔzɩ́ na batɩlɩ́ badaá weení sɩ ɩlá bɩlɛ́ nɛ́. Weení ɩgɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnɩ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-jɔ́ nɛ́
22.24: Wanbaaráa ɩbá bɔwɛ bónÿoó beriké bánjáádɩ sɩ batɩlɩ́ badaá weení ɩgɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnɩ́ nɛ́.
22.25: Ńna gɛ Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Yíriwá-dɛ́ɛ wúrowá wánnaazɩ́ bɛdɛ́ɛ ɩráa gɛ, bɩka wenbá bɔwɛná yíko ɩráa-rɔ nɛ́ sɔɔlɛ́ɛ bayáa wɛ sɩsɩ kazɔ́ɔ lanɖáa.
22.26: Amá, mɩ́nyɔ́ɔ́ nɛ́, bɩdɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ bɩlɛ́ mɩ́lɔ́wʊ́táá. Mɩ́dáá weení ɩgɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnɩ́ nɛ́, ɩ́bɩsɩ nyazɩ kúmuú, bɩka weení ɩgɛ́ɛ nɩ́baadɛɛrʊ́ nɛ́ ɩbɩ́sɩ nyazɩ bɔwʊtá-dʊ́ʊ.
22.27: Káma, weení ɩjɔɔ́ɔ bɔ́ngɔnáa yɩ kíɖíím nɛ́, na weení wɔ́ngɔnáa kíɖíím nɛ́ bɔlɔwʊtáá, weení gɛ kʊ́bɔnɩ́. Bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ weení ɩjɔɔ́ɔ bɩka bɔ́ngɔnáa yɩ kíɖíím nɛ́? Ngʊ́ mɔ́ɔ́ nɛ́, mɔ́wɛ mɩ́lɔ́wʊ́táá gɛ nyazɩ weení wɔ́ngɔnáa kíɖíím nɛ́.
22.28: Mɩ́nyɔ́ɔ́ nɛ́, mɩ́ɩ́ɖɔ́kɩ mɩ́dɩ ɩcɔɔná ma nɔwɛ́yawá mááná tɩ nɛ́ tɩdaá.
22.29: Bʊrɔɔzɩ́ gɛ ńŋɩnáa Majaa weejéle ma kowúrɔ́ɔ nɛ́, mɔ́ɔ́ ɖʊɖɔ ménjelíi mɩ́ɩ kɛ.
22.30: Na ɩkɔ́nɩ iɖi ɩnyɔ́ɔ mána mɩ́ɩ mɛ́dɛ́ɛ kowúrɔ́ɔ-daá, bɩka ɩcɔ́ɔ kowuro-gbelásɩ-rɔ ɩfʊʊná Israyɛ́ɛlɩ agó fuú na náálɛ tɔ́m.» Yeésu wénveerím Pétro sɩsɩ wɔ́ngɔnɩ́ ikízi yɩ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 26.31-35; Mrk 14.27-31; Yʊh 13.36-38 ɖʊɖɔ)
22.31: Yeésu weevééri Simɔ́ɔnɩ sɩsɩ: «Simɔ́ɔnɩ, Simɔ́ɔnɩ, Sitáánɩ wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ sɩsɩ béyele yɩ na ɩcaádɩ mɩ́ɩ nyazɩ bánjaádɩ bilée na balɩzɩ́ fúti nɛ́.
22.32: Amá, máázʊ́lʊ nyɔ́rɔ́ɔ́zɩ́ na ńkɛbɛ́ɖɩ nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ toovonúm nyáává ma kɩ nɛ́. Bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, a nyáagábɩsɩ mɔ́jɔ́, kpaazɩ ngoobíya ɖóni.»
22.33: Ngɛ Pétro woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Ɖádʊ́ʊ, mɔ́ɔ́ mázɩ́ŋɛ́ɛ sɩsɩ a sáráka ya, a ngʊ́ sɩ́m ya, mána nya ɖónboɖé.»
22.34: Ngɛ Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Pétro, ménveerím nya sɩsɩ sinje kɩna, kalɩńbaawʊ́ tatanbɔɔ tá gɛ sɩ njɔ́ɔ́lɩ bʊrɔ nabúdoozo sɩsɩ nyáásɩ ma.» Wanbaaráa wɛ́nɖɛɛ́ tɩmɛ́rɛ bána badɩmɛ́rɛ kpɩná
22.35: Ngɛ Yeésu wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Méédíri mɩ́ɩ mɩ́dɔɖɔ́kɩ liideé, cáńfáná furuú yáá takaḿwá nɛ́, nabʊ́rʊ waagála mɩ́ɩ takáásɩ́?» Ngɛ boobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Aayɩ́».
22.36: Ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Tɔ́ɔ, lɛlɛɛɖɔ́ nɛ́, weení ɩwɛná liideé nɛ́, ɩkpɔ́ɔ yɛ, bɩlɛ́ ɖʊɖɔ gɛ weení ɩwɛná furuú nɛ́ ɩ́kpɔɔ kɩ; ngɛ weení ɩvɛ́yɩ́na sɔɔ́ tókobí nɛ́, bʊdʊ́ʊ ɩyá ɩdɛ́ɛ kpáyɩ ɩmʊ kʊ́ɖʊmɔ́ɔ.
22.37: Káma, ménveerím mɩ́ɩ sɩsɩ tɔ́m tɩna baaŋmáa tɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Tɔ́m Tákaraɖá-daá nɛ́, bɩmɔɔ́na tikóódi méweezuú-daá. Tɩlɛ́ gɛ sɩsɩ: “Baagála yɩ baɖʊ wenbá bánlám bɩdaavé nɛ́ badaá.” Káma, wentí tɩgɛ́ɛ mɛ́dɛ́ɛ ńdɩ nɛ́, asée tiigóódi.»
22.38: Ngɛ wanbaaráa sɩsɩ: «Ɖádʊ́ʊ, bɛɛ tókobíwá natɩ́lɛ.» Ngɛ woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Bɩɩmɔ́ɔ bɩlɛ́.» Yeésu woobó Olivíyée tɩ́ɩ́nɩ bʊ́ʊ-daá wánzʊlʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 26.36-46 na Mrk 14.32-42 ɖʊɖɔ)
22.39: Yeésu waalɩ́ɩ ibó Olivíyée tɩ́ɩ́nɩ bʊ́ʊ-daá ńŋɩnáa bɩdɛ́rɛ́gɛ́ɛ ɩdɛ́ɛ ɖɔ́ɔ́ná nɛ́. Ngɛ ɩwanbaaráa woovu yɩ.
22.40: Waadála ńnaamʊ́ nɛ́, ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ɩzʊ́lʊ na ɩ́kasála Sitáánɩ-dɛ́ɛ kɔdɔ́sɩ-daá.»
22.41: Ngɛ waalɩ́ɩ bɔjɔ́ itúu kpɔ́mɔ́ɔ́ nyazɩ báta bɔlɔ bʊ́ʊ́rɛ ɖɩsála ɖɩdáarɛ ɩká ɩɖʊná-rɔ wánzʊlʊ́ʊ sɩsɩ:
22.42: «Majaa, a nyéndisí, laná ma bolíni na wahála kagbɔ́ɔ kana. Amá, bɩ́kalá wenbí mɔ́zɔɔlɛ́ɛ nɛ́, nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ sɔɔlɩ́m ɩ́la ná.» [
22.43: Bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ gɛ ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá malááyɩ́ka naárʊ waaɖʊ ɩlɩ́ɩ ɩjɔ́ ɩkpáázɩ yɩ ɖóni.
22.44: Ɩlaakáarɩ waabá bɩkʊrʊ́ nɛ́, waadásɩ ɩbá ɩlɔɔná sʊlʊ́ʊ, ngɛ ɩdɛ́ɛ fifíni waabɩ́sɩ nyazɩ azimá bɩlɛ́ bíndosí adɛ.]
22.45: Waazʊ́lʊ bɩlɛ́ bɩtɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ waagʊrʊ́ ɩkábɩsɩ wanbaaráa-jɔ́ ɩmɔɔná bɛlɛ́ bónɖóm ɖúkúru ɖóm.
22.46: Ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ngbaalá gɛ mínɖóm. Ɩgʊrʊ́ bɩka ɩsʊ́lʊ na ɩ́kasála Sitáánɩ-dɛ́ɛ kɔdɔ́sɩ-daá.» Baagba Yeésu nɛ́-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 26.47-56; Mrk 14.43-50; Yʊh 18.3-11 ɖʊɖɔ)
22.47: Ɩbamáa ŋmatɩrɛ gɛ zamɔ́ɔ nakɩ́rɩ waaɖʊ kɩlɩ́ɩ; bɩka fuú na nɔɔ́lɛ-daá ńnɩ́ weení bánvʊnÿaá yɩ sɩsɩ Yudásɩ nɛ́, kɛdɛ́ɛ kɩ nɩ́bááwʊ. Yudásɩ ɩmʊ́ woogóduu Yeésu-jɔ́ ɩsɛ́ɛ yɩ ikpíriki yɩ.
22.48: Ńna gɛ Yeésu wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Yudásɩ, nyéngbirikí Ɩrʊ́ Biyaalʊ́ gɛ na nÿá yɩ?»
22.49: Wenbá bavʊnwɛ bána Yeésu nɛ́ baana wenbí sɩ bɩlá nɛ́, ngɛ bɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ Yeésu sɩsɩ: «Ɖádʊ́ʊ, ɖɩ́cɛsɩ wɛ tókobí?»
22.50: Ngɛ badaá kʊ́ɖʊḿ wɛɛjɛ́sɩ sarásɩ lanɖʊ́ kʊ́bɔnɩ́-dɛ́ɛ bɔwʊtá-dʊ́ʊ bɩcɛ́ ɩlɛ́ ɩnɩgbamʊʊ́ kíɖiiwú.
22.51: Amá, Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Iyéle, bɩɩmɔ́ɔ bɩlɛ́.» Ngɛ weedekiná ɩrʊ́ ɩmʊ́ ɩnɩgbamʊʊ́ ɩwáázɩ yɩ.
22.52: Ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ sarásɩ lanɖáa kʊ́bɔnáa, na Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-rɔ fereɖáa-dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnáa na tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá kʊ́bɔnáa bɔɔgɔ́nɩ ɩwɔ́rɔ́ nɛ́ sɩsɩ: «Mɛ́gɛ́ɛ ŋmɩɩlʊ́ yáá we-rɔ gɛ mɩ́ɩgágʊ́rʊ́ mɔ́wɔ́rɔ́ mɩ́gana tókobíwá na ɖáázɩ bɩlɛ́.
22.53: Mávʊ́nna mɩ́ɩ gɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-daá báa wɩ́rɛ wenɖé, ngɛ mɩ́dákpá ma. Amá, tɔ́ɔ, lɛlɛɛɖɔ́ nɛ́, mɩ́dɛ́ɛ alɩwáátɩ na temenuú-dɛ́ɛ yíko waadala ná.» Pétro wɔɔjɔ́ɔ́lɩ sɩsɩ waasɩ Yeésu (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 26.57-58, 69-75; Mrk 14.53-54, 66-72; Yʊh 18.12-18, 25-27 ɖʊɖɔ)
22.54: Baagba Yeésu nɛ́, ngɛ booboná yɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa rɩ́ŋa-dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnɩ́-dɛ́ɛ ɖaána-daá. Pétro kɔwɛ bolíni igovóo wɛ.
22.55: Baaɖʊ nimíni tɔ́ɔ lɔwʊ́rɛ betí bɔcɔ́ɔ balára bamɩlɩná yɩ nɛ́, ngɛ Pétro wɔɔgɔ́nɩ ɩcɔ́ɔ bɔlɔwʊtáá.
22.56: Alʊ́ bɔwʊtá-dʊ́ʊ naárʊ waana yɩ ɩjɔɔ́ɔ nimíni-jɔ́ nɛ́, woozúu yɩ ɩzɩ́rɛ tíḿḿ, ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ sɩsɩ: «Ceení ɖʊɖɔ fʊngana yɩ gɛ.»
22.57: Ngɛ Pétro wɔɔjɔ́ɔ́lɩ ɩtɔ́ sɩsɩ: «Aayɩ́ yoo ɖɔ́gɔɔ, máásɩ yɩ.»
22.58: Bɩɩdásɩ cʊ́kɔ nɛ́, naárʊ waana yɩ nɛ́, wɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Nyɔ́ɔ́ ɖʊɖɔ nyɔ́wɛ ɩráa bɛḿ badaá.» Amá, Pétro woobúsi ɩrʊ́ ɩmʊ́ sɩsɩ: «Aayɩ́ yoo, mɛ́vɛ́yɩ́ badaá.»
22.59: Bɩlɛ́ bʊwɔ́rɔ́, bɩɩlá nyazɩ áwa kʊ́ɖʊmʊ́ʊ nɛ́, naárʊ ɖʊɖɔ waadábaazɩ tɩ ɖʊɖɔ na ɖóni sɩsɩ: «Ceení ɖɔ́ ɩbá ɩgɛ́ɛ badaá naárʊ gɛ, káma, Galilée ńnɩ́ gɛ ɩgɛ́ɛ.»
22.60: Ngɛ Pétro woobúsi sɩsɩ: «Bʊbɔ́tɩ gɛ, máátanzɩ wentí nyánŋmatɩ́ tɩ ɖɔ́ nɛ́.» Ɩbamáa ŋmatɩrɛ bɩlɛ́ ɩdatanzum tá gɛ kalɩńbaawʊ́ wɔɔbɔ́ɔ.
22.61: Ńna gɛ Ɖádʊ́ʊ wɛɛgɛ́ɛ́zɩ ɩkɛ́bɛ́ɛŋ Pétro. Ngɛ Pétro wɔɔdɔ́ɔ́zɩ tɔ́m wentí Ɖádʊ́ʊ waavʊ́ńveeri yɩ tɩ nɛ́ sɩsɩ: «Naanɩ́ kalɩńbaawʊ́ ɩbɔ́ɔ sinje nɛ́, nyéngizíi ma hálɩ bʊrɔ nabúdoozo.»
22.62: Ngɛ waalɩ́ɩ asʊ ɩbá iwíi páá. Bándʊ́ʊ́dɩ Yeésu bɩka bánmám yɩ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 26.67-68 na Mrk 14.65 ɖʊɖɔ)
22.63: Sɔ́ɔ́jawá baazɩ́ɩ wɛ bénveríi Yeésu nɛ́ wɛ bánmʊŋɛ́ yɩ bɩka bánmám yɩ.
22.64: Boovu waazá-rɔ bɩka bɔ́nbɔɔzɩ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Tɩrɩkɩ, weení waama ná nya.»
22.65: Bɩka babá bándʊ́ʊ́dɩ yɩ kʊdʊ́ʊ́nɩ ndɩ‑ndɩ. Booboná Yeésu tɔmvʊʊráa kʊ́bɔnáa-jɔ́ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 26.59-66; Mrk 14.55-64; Yʊh 18.19-24 ɖʊɖɔ)
22.66: Tɛ́ɛ́wʊ weevé nɛ́, ngɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa-dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnáa na Mará wɩlɩɖáa na Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnáa baaganáa woodúúzi. Ngɛ bɔɔgɔ́gɔ́ná Yeésu bɛdɛ́ɛ tɔmvʊʊráa kʊ́bɔnáa-jɔ́.
22.67: Ngɛ bɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Nyɔ́ɔ́ gɛ Lɛɛrʊ́? Feeri ɖáa.» Ngɛ woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «A méévééri mɩ́ɩ sɩsɩ bɩlɛ́ gɛ bɩgɛ́ɛ, bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ sɩ ɩfa ma toovonúm.
22.68: Ngʊ́ a mɔ́ɔ́bɔ́ɔ́zɩ mɩ́ɩ, bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ sɩ ibúsi ma.
22.69: Amá, kpɔɔná lɛlɛɛɖɔ́, Ɩrʊ́ Biyaalʊ́ wɔ́njɔwʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ yíko-dʊ́ʊ-dɛ́ɛ nʊ́ʊ́nɩ kíɖiiwú-rɔ.»
22.70: Ńna gɛ barɩ́ŋa bɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «A bɩlɛ́, nyɔ́ɔ́ gɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ Biyaalʊ́?» Ngɛ woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ńŋɩnáa wenbí mɩ́ɩ́ŋmátɩ nɛ́, bɩlɛ́ gɛ mɛ́gɛ́ɛ.»
22.71: Ngɛ bɔɔdɔ́ sɩsɩ: «Ɖóógúti ɖánjáádɩ seríya wenkí ɖʊɖɔ, káma, ɖádɩtɩŋa ɖáánɩ́ɩ ɩdɩtɩŋa ɩnɔɔ́-daá.»

23.1: Barɩ́ŋa booyóózi bakʊrʊ́, bɔkpɔ́ɔ Yeésu boboná Piláatɩ-jɔ́.
23.2: Baadála ńna nɛ́, ngɛ baabáázɩ yɩ tɔ́mwá ndɩ‑ndɩ buunáa sɩsɩ: «Ɖáágbá ɩrʊ́ ceení ɩbamáa ɖɛ́dɛ́ɛ zamɔ́ɔ tɛlɛ́sɩ sɩsɩ kɩ́kʊrʊ́na nɩ́baadɛɛráa, wéngizináa ɩráa sɩsɩ bɛ́kɛfɛrɛ Róóma wúro kʊ́bɔnɩ́ lanpóo, bɩka wɔ́ndɔ́m ɩdɩ sɩsɩ ɩmʊ́ gɛ Lɛɛrʊ́, sɩsɩ ɩmʊ́ gɛ wúro.»
23.3: Bɩnáábɩ́lɛ́ Piláatɩ wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Nyɔ́ɔ́ gɛ Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ wúro?» Ngɛ Yeésu woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Tɩnáábɩ́lɛ́ nyɔ́ɔ́dɔ́ ɖɔ́.»
23.4: Ngɛ Piláatɩ wɔɔdɔ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa kʊ́bɔnáa na zamɔ́ɔ sɩsɩ: «Mádáná taalɩ́ nakɩ́rɩ kɩ́nbɩɩzɩ́ kiyéle bakʊ ɩrʊ́ ceení-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m nɛ́.»
23.5: Amá, baabá bazɩ́ŋɛ́ɛ bɩjaarɛ́ɛ bɔ́ndɔ́m sɩsɩ: «Ɩdɛ́ɛ wɩlɩ́ɩ-daá, wóndulúsi ɩráa. Galilée gɛ waagábaazɩná, ɩkɔ́nɩ ɩsʊ́ʊ Yudée laadɔ́ɔ rɩ́ŋa-daá hálɩ ɩtála cé ɖɔ́.» Booboná Yeésu Eróodi-jɔ́
23.6: Piláatɩ waanɩ́ɩ bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ sɩsɩ: «Ɩrʊ́ ɩmʊ́ ɩgɛ́ɛ Galilée ńnɩ́ gɛ?»
23.7: Wooyuú ɩtɩlɩ́ sɩsɩ Yeésu kɛ́ɛ laadɔ́ɔ Eróodi wénɖíi kowúrɔ́ɔ kɔrɔ nɛ́-dɛ́ɛ ɩrʊ́ nɛ́, ngɛ weeyéle boboná yɩ Eróodi-jɔ́. Káma, bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ kɩḿ nɛ́, Eróodi wáńgágbáa Yerusalɛ́ɛm.
23.8: Eróodi waana Yeésu nɛ́, ngɛ bɩɩbá bɩlá yɩ niíni ɖabata, káma, ɖoo bɩrɩ́ŋa bɩlɛ́, wánjáádɩ sɩsɩ ɩna Yeésu wentí wánnɩɩ́ bánŋmatɩ́ ɩrɔ nɛ́-rɔɔzɩ́, ngɛ ɩdɛ́ɛ tamɔ́ɔ wɛ sɩsɩ ɩna Yeésu ɩlá maamááci nakɩ́rɩ.
23.9: Waabá ɩbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ tɔ́mwá ɖabata, amá, Yeésu tobúsi yɩ báa natɩ́rɩ.
23.10: Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa kʊ́bɔnáa na Mará wɩlɩɖáa fʊnwɛ ńna bɩka babá bónbuunáa yɩ tɔ́mwá na baaná.
23.11: Eróodi na ɩdɛ́ɛ sɔ́ɔ́jawá bénveríi ɩrɔ nɛ́, baabá bɛkpɛɛná Yeésu bɩka bamʊ́ŋɩ yɩ. Bʊwɔ́rɔ́ nɛ́, ngɛ boozúu yɩ jaba kífeńgi nakɩ́rɩ, ngɛ weeyéle babɩsɩná yɩ Piláatɩ-jɔ́.
23.12: Bɩdɛ́ɛ wɩ́rɛ ɖɩḿ gɛ Piláatɩ na Eróodi baabɩ́sɩ ɖɔndɩnáa, bɛḿ wenbá ɖoo bavʊngɛ́ɛ báɖaanáa nɛ́. Baaŋmátɩ basɩ́ŋ sɩsɩ bángʊ́ʊ Yeésu (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 27.15-26; Mrk 15.6-15; Yʊh 18.39–19.16 ɖʊɖɔ)
23.13: Piláatɩ woodúúzi Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa kʊ́bɔnáa na wúrowá na zamɔ́ɔ,
23.14: ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Mɩ́ɩ́gɔ́ná ma ɩrʊ́ ceení sɩsɩ wɛ́ndɛlɛ́sɩ zamɔ́ɔ sɩsɩ kɩ́kʊrʊ́na nɩ́baadɛɛráa, ngʊ́ mɔ́ɔ́bɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ tɔ́mwá mɩ́ɩ́zá-daá cé nɛ́, mádáná taalɩ́ nakɩ́rɩ kɩ́ngʊ́ʊ ɩdɔ́m wentí mɩ́ɩ́ŋmátɩ nɛ́ tɩdaá.
23.15: Eróodi ɖʊɖɔ takáná na yɩ nabʊ́rʊ, káma, weeyéle bakábɩ́sɩ́ná ɖáa yɩ. Bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, ɩdalá nabʊ́rʊ bɩ́nbɔɔzɩ́ bakʊ yɩ.
23.16: Bʊrɔɔzɩ́ nɛ́, ménÿelíi bosúti yɩ agbáázá na bʊwɔ́rɔ́ nɛ́ madálɩ yɩ.»
23.17: [Jíńgáárɩ́ báa wenkí asée Piláatɩ wɛɛjɛ́ wɛ sáráka-dʊ́ʊ kʊ́ɖʊḿ.]
23.18: Barɩ́ŋa booyóózi bóngoó sɩsɩ: «Bákʊ́ ɩrʊ́ ceení bɩka bɛcɛ́ ɖáa Barabáasɩ.»
23.19: Barabáasɩ ɩmʊ́ nɛ́, sáátɩ wenkí ɩráa waagʊrʊ́na gómínantɩ nɛ́, bɩdaá gɛ waagʊ ɩrʊ́; biiyéle baagba yɩ bɔtɔ sáráka.
23.20: Ńŋɩnáa Piláatɩ wɔɔzɔ́ɔ́lɩ sɩ ɩcɛ́ Yeésu nɛ́, waadábaazɩ zamɔ́ɔ tɔ́m bɔɔzɩ́.
23.21: Amá, bɛlɛ́ baadásɩ gɛ bóngoó sɩsɩ: «Ka yɩ ɖɛ́nɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ-rɔ! Ka yɩ ɖɛ́nɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ-rɔ!»
23.22: Ngɛ Piláatɩ waadábaazɩ wɛ bɔɔɔzɩ́ toozo-dɛ́ɛ sɩsɩ: «Taalɩ́ wenkí gɛ waabá ɩlá. Mádábá mana taalɩ́ nakɩ́rɩ ɩrɔ kɩ́nbɔɔzɩ́ sɩsɩ bákʊ́ yɩ nɛ́. Bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, ménÿelíi bosúti yɩ agbáázá bɩka madálɩ yɩ.»
23.23: Amá, bɛlɛ́ baabá bazɩ́ŋɛ́ɛ bɩjaarɛ́ɛ na agogo kʊ́bɔná bɔ́nbɔɔzɩ́ sɩsɩ báka yɩ ɖɛ́nɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ-rɔ, hálɩ bɛdɛ́ɛ agogo wɛɛdɛ́ abɩ́ɩ́zɩ Piláatɩ.
23.24: Biiyéle Piláatɩ ɩsɩ́ɩ́zɩ sɩsɩ wánlám wenbí bɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ nɛ́.
23.25: Wɛɛjɛ́ weení bɔɔdɔ yɩ sáráka, káma, baagʊrʊ́na gómínantɩ bɩka ɩkʊ ɩrʊ́ bɩdaá ngɛ bɔ́nbɔɔzɩ́ ɩdɛ́ɛ cɛ́m nɛ́, bɩka icéle wɛ Yeésu sɩsɩ báláná yɩ wenbí bɔzɔɔlɛ́ɛ nɛ́. Baagá Yeésu ɖɛ́nɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ-rɔ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 27.32-44; Mrk 15.21-32; Yʊh 19.17-27 ɖʊɖɔ)
23.26: Baalɩ́ɩ bɛ́nɖɛɛnáa Yeésu nɛ́, baana abaalʊ́ naárʊ bánÿaá yɩ sɩsɩ Simɔ́ɔnɩ, wáńgálɩɩná fɔɔ́. Ɩgɛ́ɛ Sirɛ́ɛnɩ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá ńnɩ́ gɛ. Ngɛ baagba yɩ basʊ́ʊ yɩ ɖɛ́nɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ ɩtɩ́nɩ Yeésu wɔ́rɔ́.
23.27: Zamɔ́ɔ tuutúúma fóo yɩ bɩkpɛdɩ́na aláa, bɩka aláa bɛḿ bénwií bɛ́nmɛɛdɩ́ ɩrɔɔzɩ́.
23.28: Ngɛ Yeésu wɛɛgɛ́ɛ́zɩ ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ wɛ ɩtɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Yerusalɛ́ɛm aláa, íkewíi mɔ́rɔ́, amá, iwíi mɩ́na míbíya mɩ́rɔ́.
23.29: Káma, wɛ́ naárɛ kɛgɛrɛŋɛ, ngɛ wɛ́ amʊ́ adaá nɛ́, sɩ bɔtɔ́ gɛ sɩsɩ: “Wenbi‑niíni-dɩnáa gɛ aláa kaalʊrʊ́sɩ; wenbi‑niíni-dɩnáa gɛ wenbá badalʊ́rʊ bana yáá bíya tamʊ́zʊ wɛ nɛ́.”
23.30: Bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ kɩḿ, bɔ́ndɔ́m bʊ́ʊ́nɩ sɩsɩ: “Bʊ́ʊ́nɩ, ɩzála ɖɔ́rɔ́.” Bɩka bɔtɔ́ buuronísi sɩsɩ: “Buuronísi, ɩbála ifu ɖɔ́rɔ́.”
23.31: Káma, a bánlám tɩɩwʊ́ lɩ́m ńgɩ ńŋɩnáa ɖɔ́, wenkí kɩ́ńwɩ́lɩ́ nɛ́, nŋɩ́nɩ́ gɛ sɩ balá kɩlɛ́ bɩlɛ́.»
23.32: Bɛ́nɖɛɛnáa ɩráa kɩdaavéénínáa nɔɔ́lɛ ɖʊɖɔ sɩ bakágʊ́ wɛ bána Yeésu.
23.33: Baadála ɖɩdáarɛ bánÿaá ɖɛ sɩsɩ Kʊjʊʊ́ Bɔɔrɔɔ́ nɛ́, ngɛ baagá yɩ ɖɛ́nɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ-rɔ ńna. Ngɛ baagá ɖʊɖɔ ɩráa kɩdaavéénínáa bɛḿ bɛlɛ́ɛ́nɩ́ ɖáázɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ-rɔ: kʊ́ɖʊḿ, ɩdɛ́ɛ nʊ́ʊ́nɩ kíɖiiwú-rɔ, waaganáa, ɩdɛ́ɛ nʊ́ʊ́nɩ nɩbɩɩwʊ́-rɔ.
23.34: Ńna gɛ Yeésu waaŋmátɩ sɩsɩ: «Baabá, cɛ wɛ káma, baasɩ wenbí bánlám nɛ́.» Ngɛ bɔɔdɔ tɛ́tɛ́ ɩgbɩná-rɔ batára yɛ ɖamá.
23.35: Zamɔ́ɔ wɛ kɩzɩ́ŋɛ́ɛ ńna kɩbɛɛ́na, bɩka Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ wúrowá bɛlɛ́ bɔwɛ bánmʊŋ́ yɩ bɔ́ndɔ́m sɩsɩ: «Wɛɛlɛ́ɛ baaganáa nɛ́, ɩ́kʊ́ ɩlɛ́ɛ ɩdɩ a toovonúm ɩgɛ́ɛ Lɛɛrʊ́, a ɩmʊ́ gɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ waalɩzɩ́.»
23.36: Sɔ́ɔ́jawá ɖʊɖɔ wɛ bánmʊŋɛ́ yɩ. Ngɛ boogóduu ɩjɔ́ becéle yɩ sʊlʊ́m nyɩ́gáázɩ ńbɩ,
23.37: bɔ́ndɔ́m yɩ sɩsɩ: «A nyɛ́gɛ́ɛ Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ wúro, nyádɩtɩŋa lɛɛ nyádɩ!»
23.38: Ngɛ baaŋmáa tɔ́m bíya bana ɖɔ́ kpálɩfɔ́ɔ-rɔ bosúsi ɩgʊjʊʊ́-rɔ sɩsɩ: «Ceení gɛ Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ wúro.»
23.39: Kɩdaavéénínáa baagá wɛ ɖɛ́nɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ-rɔ nɛ́, badaá naárʊ wándʊ́ʊ́dɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Mányɩ sɩsɩ nyɛ́gɛ́ɛ Lɛɛrʊ́ gɛ. Lɛɛ nyádɩ bɩka nlɛ́ɛ ɖɔ́ɔ́ ɖʊɖɔ!»
23.40: Amá, waaganáa wooyooná yɩ sɩsɩ: «Nyɔ́ɔ́ weení bɔ́nvɔ́m nyánɩgbamʊʊ́ nyazɩ ɩlɛ́ nɛ́, ńdénzée Ɩsɔ́ɔ?
23.41: Ɖɔ́ɔ́ nɛ́, ɖɛ́dɛ́ɛ nɩgbamʊʊ́ fɔ́m mɔɔ́ɔ, káma, ɖálakásɩ wɔ́nbɔɔzɩ́ wenbí nɛ́ gɛ bánlanáa ɖáa. Amá, ɩlɛ́ ɩdalá taalɩ́ nakɩ́rɩ.»
23.42: Ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ Yeésu sɩsɩ: «A nyɔ́ɔ́gɔ́nɩ sɩ nɖi kowúrátɩ, la suúru ndɔ́ɔ́zɩ mɔ́rɔ́.»
23.43: Ngɛ Yeésu woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Ménveerím nya toovonúm sɩsɩ sinje mána nya sɩ ɖɩsʊʊ ná arɩjáńna-daá.» Yeésu-dɛ́ɛ sɩ́m-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 27.45-56; Mrk 15.33-41; Yʊh 19.28-30 ɖʊɖɔ)
23.44: Bɩ́ńgbɛ́dɩ́ bɩlá nyazɩ ɩdaawʊ́ bɩlɛ́, ngɛ adɛ laadɔ́ɔ rɩ́ŋa waalá temenuú hálɩ bɩlá kéréfu natúdoozo ɩdaawʊ́ wɔ́rɔ́.
23.45: Wɩ́sɩ waalá temenuú, ngɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-daá láámílé waadára nabʊ́lɛ.
23.46: Ngɛ Yeésu woogóo na ɖóni sɩsɩ: «Majaa, mááɖʊ́ méweezuú nyánʊ́ʊ́zɩ-daá.» Wɔɔdɔ́ bɩlɛ́ bɩtɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ weedísi weezuú ɩsɩ́.
23.47: Róóma ńba-dɛ́ɛ sɔ́ɔ́ja kʊ́bɔnɩ́ waana wenbí bɩɩlá nɛ́, ngɛ waazá Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɩtɔ́ sɩsɩ: «Toovonúm gɛ, ɩrʊ́ ceení fɛ́yɩ́na yɩsɩ́tɩ!»
23.48: Ɩráa tuutúúma wenbá barɩ́ŋa bɔɔgɔ́nɩ bɛbɛ́ɛ́ŋ wenbí sɩ balaná Yeésu nɛ́, baana bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, bɔɔlɔ́ɔ babɩ́sɩ na ɖúkúru bɩka bénwií.
23.49: Wenbá barɩ́ŋa ɩ́na wɛ bavʊnnyɩ ɖamá nɛ́, na aláa wenbá boogóvú yɩ ɖoo Galilée nɛ́, bagazɩ́ŋɛ́ɛ bolíni bɛbɛɛ́na wenbí bɩ́nlám nɛ́. Beebí Yeésu nɛ́-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 27.57-61; Mrk 15.42-47; Yʊh 19.38-42 ɖʊɖɔ)
23.50: Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ tɔmvʊʊráa-daá ɩrʊ́ naárʊ wɛ bánÿaá yɩ sɩsɩ Ísifu. Ɩrʊ́ ɩmʊ́ ɩgɛ́ɛ ɩrʊ́ kazɔ́ɔ ńnɩ́ gɛ bɩka ɩzɩɩzɛ́ɛ.
23.51: Ɩrʊ́ ɩmʊ́ ɩdafʊ́ńdisi wenbí tɔmvʊʊráa-dɛ́ɛ bɔwʊ́ɖɛ waazɩ́ŋ sɩ bánlám nɛ́, ngʊ́ ɩdaɖʊ ɩnɔɔ́ wenbí baalá nɛ́ bɩdaá. Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ laadɔ́ɔ-daá tɛ́ɛ́dɩ bánÿaá tɩ sɩsɩ Arɩmatée nɛ́ tɩdɛ́ɛ ɩrʊ́ gɛ ɩgɛ́ɛ, bɩka ɩvʊnɖamáa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ kowúrɔ́ɔ.
23.52: Woobó Piláatɩ-jɔ́ ɩsʊ́lʊ sɩsɩ bécéle yɩ Yeésu tɔnʊʊ́.
23.53: Ngɛ waagálɩ́zɩ́ yɩ ɖɛ́nɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ-rɔ ikédisi, isúu yɩ kásáŋá iboná yɩ ɩfɩ́ɩ́zɩ bɔɔlááwʊ baabáa kɩ bʊ́tangbalʊʊ́-daá bɩka bedebim tá báa naárʊ kɩdaá nɛ́, kɩdaá.
23.54: Bɩgɛ́ɛ na wɩ́rɛ wenɖé bángbɩɩrɩ́ Fɛɛzɩrɛ wɩ́rɛ nɛ́, bɩka Fɛɛzɩrɛ wɩ́rɛ ɖɩḿ ɖɩ́ńgbɛ́dɩ́ ɖɩ́nbaazɩ́ nbɩlɛ́.
23.55: Aláa wenbá boogóvú Yeésu ɖoo Galilée nɛ́ baadɩ́nɩ Ísifu wɔ́rɔ́. Baana bɔɔlááwʊ, na nŋɩ́nɩ́ baavɩ́ɩ́zɩ Yeésu tɔnʊʊ́ nɛ́.
23.56: Ngɛ bɔɔlɔ́ɔ babɩ́sɩ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá bakpɩ́ɩ́rɩ núm bínvoorí nɛ́, na tulaarɩ́wá . Ngɛ Fɛɛzɩrɛ wɩ́rɛ nɛ́, bɔɔjɔ́ɔ badalá nabʊ́rʊ ńŋɩnáa Múúsá-dɛ́ɛ Mará waazɩ́ɩ́zɩ bɩ nɛ́.

24.1: Aláháɖɩ wɩ́rɛ tɛ́ɛrɛ́‑tɛ́ɛrɛ́ nɛ́, aláa waalɩ́ɩ bɔkpɔ́ɔ núm bínvoorí baavʊ́ńgbɩ́ɩrɩ nɛ́, ngɛ bɛɛɖɛ́ɛ bɔɔlááwʊ-jɔ́.
24.2: Baadála nɛ́, baana sɩsɩ beebiláázɩ bʊ́ʊ́rɛ ɖɩvʊnvóo bɔɔlááwʊ nɔɔ́-rɔ nɛ́ bɔlɔ kpɔ́mɔ́ɔ́.
24.3: Ngɛ baazʊ́ʊ bɔɔlááwʊ-daá nɛ́, badana Ɖádʊ́ʊ Yeésu tɔnʊʊ́.
24.4: Bɔwɛ bánlám bítí baasɩ wentí-daá bɔwɛ nɛ́, ngɛ ɩráa nɔɔ́lɛ waajáŋ baɖʊ balɩ́ɩ bɔrɔ bozóóna kpɩná ánɖée nɛ́.
24.5: Ńna gɛ nɩdáárɛ waabá bɩlá wɛ hálɩ bolúúzi bagʊjʊ́nɩ adɛ, ngɛ ɩráa bɛḿ bɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ngbaalá gɛ mɩ́njáádɩ weezuú-dʊ́ʊ ɩsɩɖáa lɔwʊtáá.
24.6: Ɩvɛ́yɩ́ cé, weevé ɩlɩ́ɩ ɩsɩɖáa-daá. Ɩdɔ́ɔ́zɩ wentí waavʊ́ńgáŋmatɩ mɩ́ɩ ɖoo sáátɩ ɩgɔwɛ Galilée nɛ́.
24.7: Sɩsɩ: “Bángbáa Ɩrʊ́ Biyaalʊ́ becéle alaháácɩ́-dɩnáa, na bɛlɛ́ baká yɩ ɖɛ́nɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ-rɔ, na wɛ́ náádoozo wɩ́rɛ nɛ́, ifé ɩlɩ́ɩ ɩsɩɖáa-daá.”»
24.8: Ńna gɛ bɔɔdɔ́ɔ́zɩ tɔ́m tɩḿ tɩrɔɔzɩ́.
24.9: Ngɛ baalɩ́ɩ bɔɔlááwʊ-jɔ́ bɛɖɛ́ɛ bakádɩ bɩlɛ́ bɩrɩ́ŋa befééri tɩndɩnáa fuú na naárʊ na wanbaaráa baaganáa rɩ́ŋa.
24.10: Aláa bɛḿ nɖɔ́: Marɩyáma Magɩdaláa alʊ́, na Yuháána, na Marɩyáma Yaakúbu ɩgɔɔ. Aláa baaganáa bána wɛ nɛ́, weevééri tɩndɩnáa tɔ́m tɩḿ tɩrɩ́ŋa ɖʊɖɔ.
24.11: Amá, tɩndɩnáa bɛlɛ́ baamáázɩ gɛ sɩsɩ aláa bɛḿ bánŋmatɩ́ kʊjʊʊ́ fɛ́yɩ́-dɩnáa-dɛ́ɛ ŋmatɩrɛ gɛ, biiyéle badafa wɛ toovonúm.
24.12: Amá, na bɩrɩ́ŋa, Pétro waagʊrʊ́ ɩkpɔ́ɔ sewɔ́ɔ ɩɖɛ́ɛ bɔɔlááwʊ-jɔ́. Waadála gɛ woolúúzi ɩdɩ nɛ́, kásáŋá-fɔɔlásɩ gɛ waana adɛ. Ngɛ wɔɔlɔ́ɔ ɩbɩ́sɩ ɩdɛ́ɛ bɩka bɩbá bɩjɔɔ́ɔ yɩ bítí wenbí bɩɩlá nɛ́ bʊrɔɔzɩ́. Emayúusi tɛɛbiiyá nɩ́bááwʊ-daá (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mrk 16.12-13 ɖʊɖɔ)
24.13: Ngʊ́ nbɛ́ɛ nɛ́, bɩdɛ́ɛ wɩ́rɛ ɖɩḿ nɔ́ɔ́, wanbaaráa-daá nɔɔ́lɛ waalɩ́ɩ bɛ́nɖɛɛ́ tɛɛbiiyá bánÿaá kɛ sɩsɩ Emayúusi nɛ́ kadaá. Áwa natɩ́lɛ gɛ a ɩrʊ́ waalɩ́ɩ Yerusalɛ́ɛm, wánɖʊ́ʊ na ɩkádála.
24.14: Wanbaaráa bɛḿ bɔwɛ bánŋmatɩnáa ɖamá wentí tɩrɩ́ŋa tɩɩlá nɛ́.
24.15: Babamáa ŋmatɩrɛ bɛ́ngɛɛzɩ́ ɖamá bɛ́nɖɛɛ́ nɛ́, Yeésu tɩtɩŋa wɔɔgɔ́nɩ ɩcʊʊná wɛ ɩ́na wɛ boyóózi bɛ́nɖɛɛ́.
24.16: Amá, bɩɩdɔ baazá-rɔ badabɩ́ɩ́zɩ batɩlɩ́ yɩ.
24.17: Ngɛ Yeésu wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Wentí gɛ mɩ́nganʊŋɛ́ bɩka mɩ́ngɛɛzɩ́ ɖamá ye.» Ngɛ baazɩ́ŋ bɩka bɔwɛ ɖúkúru-daá.
24.18: Badaá weení bánÿaá yɩ sɩsɩ Kilewofáasɩ nɛ́, woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Yerusalɛ́ɛm ńba rɩ́ŋa-daá nɛ́, nyɔ́ɔ́ nyériké ńdátɩ́lɩ́ na wenbí bɩɩlá wɛ́-bíya bana badaá nɛ́?»
24.19: Ngɛ wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ngbetíi waala ná.» Ńna gɛ bɛlɛ́ boobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Wenbí bɩɩmɔɔná Yeésu Nazarɛ́ɛtɩ ńnɩ́ nɛ́. Ɩvʊnbá ɩgɛ́ɛ anɖébi ɩwɛná yíko nɛ́ gɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɩzá-daá na zamɔ́ɔ rɩ́ŋa ɩzá-daá. Waawɩ́lɩ ɩdɛ́ɛ yíko ɩdɛ́ɛ ŋmatɩrɛ na ɩdɛ́ɛ lakásɩ-daá.
24.20: Ɖɛ́dɛ́ɛ sarásɩ lanɖáa kʊ́bɔnáa na ɖɛ́dɛ́ɛ wúrowá waagba yɩ, bakʊ ɩdɔ́m sɩsɩ bánɖʊ́ʊ yɩ sɩ́m, ngɛ baagá yɩ ɖɛ́nɩ abɛlɩ́ akɔ́ɔ-rɔ.
24.21: Ngʊ́ ɖɔ́ɔ́ ɖáńɖʊ́ʊ tamɔ́ɔ sɩsɩ ɩlɛ́ sɩ ɩlɛɛ ná Israyɛ́ɛlɩ. Amá, bɛɛ sinje wɛ́ náádoozo nɖɔ́ bɩlɛ́ ɩmʊ́ bɩrɩ́ŋa bɩɩlá nɛ́.
24.22: Aláa bovóo ɖáa nɛ́, badaá nɛbɛ́rɛ waaɖʊ ɖáa bítí. Bɔɔjɔ́ɔ́rɩ tɛ́ɛrɛ́‑tɛ́ɛrɛ́ bobó bɔɔlááwʊ-jɔ́,
24.23: ngɛ badakáná ɩdɔnʊʊ́ nɛ́, baagábɩ́sɩ befééri ɖáa sɩsɩ malááyɩ́kawá waaɖʊ baalɩ́ɩ bɔrɔ befééri wɛ sɩsɩ ɩwɛ weezuú-daá.
24.24: Ɖádáá nɛbɛ́rɛ woobó bɔɔlááwʊ-jɔ́, ngɛ wenbí nɔ́ɔ́ aláa waaŋmátɩ nɛ́ gɛ baagáná, amá, ɩmʊ́ ɩdɩtɩŋa nɛ́, badakáná yɩ.»
24.25: Ńna gɛ Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Mɩ́ɩ ɩráa bɛvɛ́yɩ́na tɩlɩ́ɩ bɩka bádánváa wentí anɖébiwá waaŋmátɩ nɛ́ toovonúm ɖasam nɛ́ bana ɖɔ́!
24.26: Bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ bɩlɛ́ gɛ bɩɩbɔ́ɔ́zɩ sɩsɩ Lɛɛrʊ́ ɩ́na wahála naanɩ́ na ɩsʊ́ʊ ɩdɛ́ɛ ásícé-daá?»
24.27: Ngɛ waalɩzɩ́ wentí tɩrɩ́ŋa baaŋmátɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Tɔ́m Tákaraɖá-daá tɩgɛ́ɛ ɩdɛ́ɛ ńdɩ nɛ́ tugutoluú wénveerím wɛ. Waagábaazɩ ná Múúsá-dɛ́ɛ ŋmáádɩ hálɩ ɩkɔ́nɩ anɖébiwá rɩ́ŋa-dɛ́ɛ ŋmáádɩ-daá.
24.28: Sáátɩ wenkí baajʊʊná tɛɛbiiyá wenká kadaá wanbaaráa wɛ́nɖɛɛ́ nɛ́, Yeésu waalá nyazɩ sɩ ɩcɛzɩ́ bɩlɛ́.
24.29: Amá, wanbaaráa waajáárɩ yɩ bɔtɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Bɛɛ́ɛ, kɩɩgbɛdɩ́ kínÿúu nbɩlɛ́, wɩ́sɩ waazála. Bɩlɛ́ nɛ́ nkɛɖɛ́ɛ, cɔɔ ɖɔ́jɔ́ cé.» Ngɛ weedísi ɩsʊ́ʊ bɔjɔ́ ɩ́na wɛ bɔcɔ́ɔ.
24.30: Sáátɩ wenkí ɩ́na wɛ bɔɔjɔ́ɔ sɩ beɖi kíɖíím nɛ́, wɔɔgbɔ́ɔ kpɔ́nɔ́, ngɛ waazá Ɩsɔ́ɔ kɩrɔ, ngɛ wɛɛbɛlɩ́ kɩ icéle wɛ.
24.31: Ńna gɛ baazá-rɔ weevé batɩlɩ́ yɩ, amá, waajáŋ ɩtɛlɛ́ŋ baazá-daá.
24.32: Ngɛ baabáázɩ ɖamá tɔ́m sɩsɩ: «Ńdáná sɩsɩ bʊrɔ gɛ bɩɩbá bɩgɔjɔɔ́ɔ ɖáa niíni sáátɩ wenkí wángaŋmatɩnáa ɖáa nɩ́bááwʊ-daá bɩka wángalɩzɩ́ɩ ɖáa wentí baaŋmáa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Tɔ́m Tákaraɖá-daá nɛ́ tugutoluú nɛ́?»
24.33: Ngɛ baajáŋ bakʊrʊ́ ńna‑ńna babɩ́sɩ Yerusalɛ́ɛm bɔmɔɔná tɩndɩnáa fuú na naárʊ na wenbá bána wɛ nɛ́.
24.34: Ngɛ bɛlɛ́ beevééri wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ɖádʊ́ʊ weevé toovonúm. Waalɩzɩ́ ɩdɩ ɩwɩ́lɩ Simɔ́ɔnɩ.»
24.35: Ńna gɛ badɩtɩŋa baabáázɩ wɛ kɛɛzɩ́ wenbí bɩɩlá nɩ́bááwʊ-daá, na nŋɩ́nɩ́ baadɩlɩ́ na yɩ kíɖíím ɖaaɖííɖɛ wɛɛbɛlɩ́ kpɔ́nɔ́ nɛ́. Yeésu weevé ɩlɩzɩ́ ɩdɩ ɩwɩ́lɩ ɩdɛ́ɛ wanbaaráa (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 28.16-20; Mrk 16.14-18; Yʊh 20.19-23; Tɩm 1.4-8 ɖʊɖɔ)
24.36: Bɔwɛ bánŋmatɩ́ bɩlɛ́ nɛ́ gɛ Yeésu tɩtɩŋa waaɖʊ ɩlɩ́ɩ bɔlɔwʊtáá, ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Fɛɛzɩrɛ ɩ́cɔ́ɔ́ná mɩ́ɩ.»
24.37: Ngɛ bɩɩbá bɩlá wɛ nɩdáárɛ páá, káma, bɔjɔɔ́ɔ sɩsɩ ásɩ́náálɩ́ɩ gɛ.
24.38: Ńna gɛ Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ngbaalá gɛ biidulúsi mɩ́ɩ bɩlɛ́. Ngɛ ngbaalá gɛ mɩ́nlám síka.
24.39: Ɩbɛ́ɛ mánʊ́ʊ́zɩ na mɔ́nʊvɔ́, mánáábɩ́lɛ́! Idekiná ma na ɩbɛ́ɛ, ásɩ́náálɩ́ɩ fɛ́yɩ́na tɔnʊʊ́, cáńfáná mʊwá ńŋɩnáa mɩ́bɛɛ́na mɔ́wɛná ɖɔ́ nɛ́.»
24.40: Waaŋmátɩ bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ waawɩ́lɩ wɛ ɩnʊ́ʊ́zɩ na ɩnʊvɔ́.
24.41: Bɩɩbá bɩlá wɛ niíni bɩcɛzɩ́na seríya bɩka bɩjɔɔ́ɔ wɛ bítí hálɩ bádánjaa sɩ bafa toovonúm nɛ́, Yeésu wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Mɩ́wɛná nabʊ́rʊ cé bénɖíi?»
24.42: Ngɛ beejéle yɩ tińɖe fɔɔlɔɔ́ bɔ́ńwɔ́ḿ nɛ́.
24.44: Ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Bɛɛ tɔ́m wentí méévééri mɩ́ɩ tɩ sáátɩ wenkí mána mɩ́ɩ ɖávʊnwɛ nɛ́ nɖɔ́: Bɩmɔɔ́na wentí tɩrɩ́ŋa baaŋmáa mɔ́rɔ́ɔ́zɩ́ Múúsá-dɛ́ɛ Mará tákaraɖá-daá, na anɖébiwá-dɛ́ɛ tákaraɖáwá-daá, na Yéńdiwá-daá nɛ́ ikóódi.»
24.45: Ńna kɩḿ gɛ woovulúsi baazá-rɔ banɩ́ɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Tɔ́m Tákaraɖá kutoluú.
24.46: Ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Wentí baaŋmáa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Tɔ́m Tákaraɖá-daá nɛ́ gɛ sɩsɩ Lɛɛrʊ́ wɔ́ngɔnɩ́ ɩna wahála, na wɛ́ náádoozo wɩ́rɛ nɛ́, ifé ɩlɩ́ɩ ɩsɩɖáa-daá.
24.47: Na ɩyɩ́ɖɛ-daá nɛ́, bánlám yíriwá rɩ́ŋa waázu sɩsɩ bála túúbá bɛkɛ́ɛ cɔwʊrɛ na Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɩcɛ́ wɛ bɛdɛ́ɛ alaháácɩ́wá, ngɛ Yerusalɛ́ɛm gɛ bɩ́ngabaazɩnáa.
24.49: Mɔ́ɔ́ mángaváa mɩ́ɩ wenbí Majaa wooɖúu sɩsɩ wánváa mɩ́ɩ nɛ́. Bɩɩga mɩ́nyɔ́ɔ́ nɛ́, ɩjɔ́ɔ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá hálɩ yíko wenkí sɩ kɩkálɩɩ ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá nɛ́ kikédi mɩ́rɔ́.» Yeésu waabɩ́sɩ ɩkpa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-jɔ́ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mrk 16.19-20 na Tɩm 1.9-11 ɖʊɖɔ)
24.50: Bʊwɔ́rɔ́ nɛ́, ngɛ Yeésu wɔɔgbɔ́ɔ ɩwanbaaráa iboná tɛɛbiiyá bánÿaá kɛ Betáániya nɛ́ kɔjɔ́. Ngɛ waagbáázɩ ɩnʊ́ʊ́zɩ ɩɖʊ wɛ alɩbáráka.
24.51: Ɩbamáa wɛ alɩbáráka ɖʊ́ʊ nɛ́, ngɛ bɩɩlɩzɩ́ yɩ bɔlɔwʊtáá bɩkpáázɩ yɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-jɔ́.
24.52: Bɩɩga bɛḿ nɛ́, boogúu yɩ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ bɩtɛ́ nɛ́, bɔɔlɔ́ɔ babɩ́sɩ Yerusalɛ́ɛm na niíni kʊ́bɔńbɩ.
24.53: Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-daá gɛ bɔwɛ báa sáátɩ wenkí bánzám Ɩsɔ́ɔ.

1.1: Bɩgabaazɩya naanɩ́ na balá báa wenbí nɛ́, weení bánÿaá yɩ sɩsɩ Ŋmatɩrɛ nɛ́, ɩvʊnwɛ. Ɩ́vʊnna Ɩsɔ́ɔ bɔwɛ ná, bɩka ɩvʊngɛ́ɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ.
1.2: Ɩ́vʊnna Ɩsɔ́ɔ bɔwɛ ná bɩgabaazɩya.
1.3: Ɩnáábɩ́lɛ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ waabaná ɩlá báa ngbetíi, bɩka nabʊ́rʊ fɛ́yɩ́ waalá bɩ ɩdabaná yɩ nɛ́.
1.4: Ɩjɔ́ gɛ weezuú fʊnwɛ bɩka weezuú kɩḿ kɩvʊngɛ́ɛ na kʊ ɩráa-dɛ́ɛ ɖɛnyɛm.
1.5: Ɖɛnyɛm wónlosí temenuú-daá, amá, temenuú tamʊ kɩ.
1.6: Ɩrʊ́ naárʊ wɔɔgɔnɩ ná, ɩrʊ́ ɩmʊ́, Ɩsɔ́ɔ weegédíri ná yɩ, ɩyɩ́ɖɛ gɛ Yaayá.
1.7: Wɔɔgɔ́nɩ nɛ́, seríya lɩzɩ́ɩ gɛ wɔɔgɔ́nɩ. Wɔɔgɔ́nɩ gɛ sɩ ɩlɩzɩ́ weení ɩgɛ́ɛ ɩráa-dɛ́ɛ ɖɛnyɛm nɛ́ seríya, na ɩmʊ́ ɩdɛ́ɛ seríya-rɔ nɛ́, ɩráa ɩfa ɩlɛ́ toovonúm.
1.8: Bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ ɩmʊ́ ɩdɩtɩŋa ɩgɛ́ɛ na kʊ ɩráa-dɛ́ɛ ɖɛnyɛm, amá, wɔɔgɔ́nɩ gɛ sɩ ɩlɩzɩ́ weení ɩgɛ́ɛ ɩráa-dɛ́ɛ ɖɛnyɛm nɛ́ seríya.
1.9: Weení ɩgɛ́ɛ ŋmatɩrɛ nɛ́ kɛ́ɛ na kʊ ɖɛnyɛm toovonúm ńgɩ, wenkí kɩ́ngɔnɩ́ ɖúúlínya-daá bɩka kínlosí ɩráa rɩ́ŋa nɛ́.
1.10: Weení bánÿaá yɩ sɩsɩ Ŋmatɩrɛ nɛ́ fʊnwɛ ɖúúlínya-daá, bɩka ɩnáábɩ́lɛ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ waala ná ɖúúlínya. Amá, ɖúúlínya-daá ɩráa tatɩlɩ́ yɩ.
1.11: Wɔɔgɔ́nɩ ɩdɩtɩŋa ɩdɛ́ɛ, amá, ɩdɛ́ɛ-ńba weegízi badamʊ yɩ.
1.12: Ngʊ́ nbɛ́ɛ nɛ́, badaá nɛbɛ́rɛ weedísi bamʊ yɩ, bafa yɩ toovonúm. Wenbá beedísi bamʊ yɩ bafa yɩ toovonúm nɛ́, waava wɛ yíko sɩsɩ bábɩsɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ bíya.
1.13: Bɛdɛ́ɛ baabɩ́sɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ bíya nɛ́ tɛkɛ́ɛ ɩrʊ́-dɛ́ɛ sɔɔlɩ́m, yáá alʊ́ na abaalʊ́ bɛdɛ́ɛ yoozí, amá, Ɩsɔ́ɔ tɩtɩŋa weeyele ná babɩ́sɩ ɩdɛ́ɛ bíya.
1.14: Weení bánÿaá yɩ sɩsɩ Ŋmatɩrɛ nɛ́, waabɩ́sɩ ɩrʊ́ ɩkɔ́nɩ ɩcɔ́ɔ ɖɔ́lɔ́wʊ́táá. Ngɛ ɖááná ɩdɛ́ɛ ásícé. A nyááná yɩ, kʊnyɔnnɩɩrɛ́ na toovonúm riké nbɩlɛ́! Ɩdɛ́ɛ ásícé kɩḿ kɩɩlɩɩná Caáwʊ-jɔ́ gɛ. Ásícé wenkí Caáwʊ weejéle ɩgʊ́ɖʊmɔ́ɔ nɛ́ nbɩlɛ́.
1.15: Yaayá waaŋmátɩ na ɖóni ɩlɩzɩ́ yɩ seríya sɩsɩ: «Ɩdɔ́m gɛ máávʊ́ńveeri mɩ́ɩ sɩsɩ mɔ́wɔ́rɔ́, weení sɩ ɩkɔ́nɩ nɛ́, waagɩ́lɩ ma; káma, ɩvʊnwɛ naanɩ́ gɛ baalʊ́rʊ ma.»
1.16: Ɖárɩ́ŋa ɖééɖí ɩgʊnyɔnnɩɩrɛ́-dɛ́ɛ ɖɔɔmɩ́nɩ-dɛ́ɛ alɩbáráka, bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ kʊ́ɖʊńbɩ ngʊ́ bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ nabʊ́lɛ.
1.17: Káma, Múúsá gɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ waabaná icéle ɖáa ɩdɛ́ɛ Mará, amá, Yeésu Krísto gɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ waabaná ɩwɩ́lɩ ɖáa ɩdɛ́ɛ kʊnyɔnnɩɩrɛ́ na ɩdɛ́ɛ toovonúm.
1.18: Naárʊ tanáá ta Ɩsɔ́ɔ kɛtɛngɛrɛ. Ɩsɔ́ɔ Biyaalʊ́ kʊ́ɖʊḿ weení ɩwɛná yɩ ɩgɛ́ɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ bɩka ɩwɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-jɔ́ nɛ́, weeyéle ná ɖɩtɩlɩ́ yɩ. Yaayá-dɛ́ɛ seríya waalɩzɩ́ kɩ nɛ́ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 3.1-12; Mrk 1.1-8; Lúk 3.1-18 ɖʊɖɔ)
1.19: Ɩbɛ́ɛ seríya wenkí Yaayá waalɩzɩ́ kɩ sáátɩ wenkí Yahúúɖuwá waagálɩ́zɩ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ sarásɩ lanɖáa na Léévi bíya Yerusalɛ́ɛm bekédiri ɩjɔ́ bɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Nyɔ́ɔ́ gɛ weení» nɛ́.
1.20: Ɩdamʊ́sɩ wɛ, waabá gɛ ifééri wɛ toovonúm sɩsɩ: «Bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ mɔ́ɔ́ gɛ Lɛɛrʊ́.»
1.21: Ngɛ bɛlɛ́ bɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «A bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, nyɔ́ɔ́ gɛ Elíya?» Ngɛ woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Aayɩ́, bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ mɔ́ɔ́ gɛ Elíya.» Ngɛ bɔɔdɔ́bɔɔzɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Nyánáábɩ́lɛ́ anɖébi?» Ngɛ Yaayá sɩsɩ: «Aayɩ».
1.22: Ńna gɛ bɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Nyɔ́ɔ́ gɛ weení. Feeri ɖáa, na ɖɩbɩ́ɩ́zɩ ɖukóbusi wenbá beegédiri ɖáa nɛ́. Weení gɛ nyɔ́ɔ́ nyádɩtɩŋa nyánmaazɩ́ sɩsɩ nyɛ́gɛ́ɛ.»
1.23: Ngɛ Yaayá sɩsɩ: «Mɔ́ɔ́ gɛ weení wóngoó tɛɛwʊ́lɔ́ɔ́-daá sɩsɩ: “Ɩgbɩ́ɩ́rɩ Ɖádʊ́ʊ-dɛ́ɛ nɩ́bááwʊ kɩsɩ́ɩ́zɩ kazɔ́ɔ,” ńŋɩnáa anɖébi Esáya waaŋmátɩ nɛ́.»
1.24: Wenbá beegédiri wɛ Yaayá-jɔ́ nɛ́ badaá, Faríizi ńba wɛ.
1.25: Ngɛ bɛlɛ́ bɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «A bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ nyɔ́ɔ́ gɛ Lɛɛrʊ́, ngʊ́ bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ nyánáábɩ́lɛ́ Elíya, cáńfáná anɖébi, bɩlɛ́ nɛ́ ngbetíi-rɔ gɛ nyénliríi ɩráa lɩ́m-daá nyɔ́nzɔ́ɔ wɛ túúbá lɩ́m.»
1.26: Ngɛ Yaayá woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Mɔ́ɔ́ nɛ́, lɩ́m-daá gɛ ménliríi mɩ́ɩ mɔ́nzɔ́ɔ mɩ́ɩ túúbá lɩ́m; mɩ́lɔ́wʊ́táá, naárʊ wɛ mɩ́ɩ́sɩ yɩ.
1.27: Mɔ́wɔ́rɔ́ nɛ́, sɩ ɩkɔnɩ ná, amá, mádatála mobóɖi ɩdakaḿwá.»
1.28: Betáániya tɛɛbiiyá-daá, Yɔrɔdáanɩ buwá-dɛ́ɛ fúu lí ńgɩ-rɔ, lénlé Yaayá wénliríi ɩráa lɩ́m-daá nɛ́ gɛ bɩ́ngalám bɩlɛ́. Bɛ́ngɛɛzɩnáa Yeésu Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Fée-bú
1.29: Kiivé nɛ́, Yaayá waana Yeésu wɛ́ngɛɖɛɛ́ ɩjɔ́ nɛ́, ngɛ sɩsɩ: «Ɩbɛ́ɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Fée-bú weení wɛ́njɛ́m ɩráa-dɛ́ɛ alaháácɩ́wá nɛ́.
1.30: Ɩdɔ́m gɛ mááŋmátɩ mɩ́ɩ sɩsɩ mɔ́wɔ́rɔ́, naárʊ wɔ́ngɔnɩ́, bʊdʊ́ʊ waagɩ́lɩ ma, káma, ɩvʊnwɛ naanɩ́ gɛ baalʊ́rʊ ma.
1.31: Mɔ́ɔ́ mádɩtɩŋa mááfʊnzɩ weení ɖéyí‑ɖéyí bɩɩbá bɩgɛ́ɛ nɛ́; amá, mɔ́ɔ́gɔ́nɩ sɩ melíri ɩráa lɩ́m-daá gɛ na meyéle Israyɛ́ɛlɩ zamɔ́ɔ ɩtɩlɩ́ yɩ.»
1.32: Ngɛ Yaayá waadáŋmatɩ sɩsɩ: «Mááná Kezeŋa Ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ ńga waagálɩɩ ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá nyazɩ ɖuvóóre kʊ́fʊlʊńɖɛ bɩlɛ́, kɔkɔ́nɩ kɔcɔ́ɔ ɩrɔɔzɩ́.
1.33: Mɔ́ɔ́ mááfʊnzɩ weení bʊdʊ́ʊ kɛ́ɛ nɛ́, amá, weení weegédíri ma sɩ melíri ɩráa lɩ́m-daá nɛ́, weevééri ma sɩsɩ: “Weení ɩrɔɔzɩ́ sɩ ńna Kezeŋa Ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ ńga ikédi kɔkɔ́nɩ kɔcɔ́ɔ nɛ́, ɩlɛ́ wénliríi kʊ ɩráa Kezeŋa Ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ ńga-daá.”
1.34: Mááná bɩlɛ́ na máázá, bʊrɔɔzɩ́ gɛ mánlɩzɩ́ɩ seríya sɩsɩ ɩnáábɩ́lɛ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ Biyaalʊ́.» Yeésu-dɛ́ɛ wanbaaráa kaɖaa ńba
1.35: Kiivé nɛ́, Yaayá tɔrɔwɛ ńna ɩ́na ɩwanbaaráa nɔɔ́lɛ
1.36: gɛ waana Yeésu wɛ́nɖɛɛ́; ngɛ sɩsɩ: «Ɩbɛ́ɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Fée-bú.»
1.37: Yaayá-dɛ́ɛ wanbaaráa nɔɔ́lɛ bɛḿ baanɩ́ɩ bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ baagʊrʊ́ bofu Yeésu.
1.38: Yeésu wɛɛgɛ́ɛ́zɩ ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ ɩwɔ́rɔ́ nɛ́, waana sɩsɩ bogovóo yɩ, ngɛ sɩsɩ: «We gɛ mɩ́njáádɩ.» Ngɛ boobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: « Ráabi , lé gɛ nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ.» (Ráabi kutoluú gɛ sɩsɩ Mará wɩlɩɖʊ́).
1.39: Ngɛ Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ɩgɔ́nɩ, mɩ́nganáa.» Ngɛ boobó ɖʊɖɔ bana lénlé Yeésu wɛ nɛ́; ngɛ bɔɔjɔ́ɔ ɩjɔ́ bɩdɛ́ɛ wɩ́rɛ ɖɩḿ. Ɖaanɩ́ŋa kéréfu natɩ́náázá bɩlɛ́ gɛ bɩ́nlám bɩlɛ́.
1.40: Wanbaaráa nɔɔ́lɛ wenbá baanɩ́ɩ Yaayá waaŋmátɩ na bakʊrʊ́ bofu Yeésu nɛ́ badaá naárʊ gɛ bánÿaá sɩsɩ Andirée. Andirée ɩmʊ́ ɩwɛná igoobú bánÿaá ɩlɛ́ sɩsɩ Simɔ́ɔnɩ Pétro.
1.41: Igoobú Simɔ́ɔnɩ ɩmʊ́ gɛ waaɖáa náa ifééri yɩ sɩsɩ baana Krísto. Krísto kutoluú gɛ sɩsɩ Lɛɛrʊ́.
1.42: Ngɛ wɔɔgbɔ́ɔ Simɔ́ɔnɩ iboná Yeésu-jɔ́. Yeésu waana yɩ nɛ́, wɛɛbɛ́ɛ́ŋ yɩ, ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Nyɔ́ɔ́ gɛ Simɔ́ɔnɩ, Yʊháánɩ biyaalʊ́; sɩ bayáa nya gɛ sɩsɩ Kéfáasɩ.» Kéfáasɩ kutoluú gɛ sɩsɩ Bʊ́ʊ́rɛ. Yeésu waayáa Filíipu na Natanayɛ́ɛlɩ
1.43: Kiivé nɛ́, Yeésu waaɖʊ sɩ wɛ́nɖɛɛ́ Galilée laadɔ́ɔ-daá, ngɛ waana Filíipu. Ńna gɛ wɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Kovu ma!»
1.44: Filíipu-dɛ́ɛ gɛ Bɛtɩsayɩdáa, Andirée na Pétro bɛdɛ́ɛ tɛɛbiiyá.
1.45: Filíipu wɔɔgɔ́nɩ ɩna Natanayɛ́ɛlɩ, ngɛ weevééri yɩ sɩsɩ: «Weení ɩdɔ́m baaŋmáa Múúsá-dɛ́ɛ Mará na anɖébiwá-dɛ́ɛ tákaraɖáwá-daá nɛ́, ɖááná yɩ, Yeésu Nazarɛ́ɛtɩ ńnɩ́ gɛ, Ísifu biyaalʊ́.»
1.46: Ngɛ Natanayɛ́ɛlɩ sɩsɩ: «Kazɔ́ɔ ńbɩ nabɩ́rɩ wánbɩɩzɩ́ bɩkálɩ́ɩ́ná Nazarɛ́ɛtɩ nbɩlɛ́?» Ńna gɛ Filíipu sɩsɩ: «Kɔnɩ na ngáná.»
1.47: Yeésu waana Natanayɛ́ɛlɩ wɛ́ngɛɖɛɛ́ ɩjɔ́ nɛ́, ngɛ wánŋmatɩ́ ɩdɔ́m sɩsɩ: «Bɛɛ Israyɛ́ɛlɩ bú tɩtɩŋa nɖɔ́; ɩrʊ́ weení ɩ́dɛ́nbɛlɩ́ bʊbɔ́tɩ kɛtɛngɛrɛ nɛ́.»
1.48: Ngɛ Natanayɛ́ɛlɩ wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Lénlé gɛ nyányɩ ná ma.» Ńna gɛ Yeésu sɩsɩ: «Naanɩ́ na Filíipu ɩyáa nya nyɔ́gɔwɛ figíyée tɩɩwʊ́-dɛ nɛ́, máávʊ́ńgánaa nya.»
1.49: Ńna gɛ Natanayɛ́ɛlɩ wɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Kʊ́bɔnɩ́, nyɔ́ɔ́ gɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ Biyaalʊ́, nyɔ́ɔ́ gɛ Israyɛ́ɛlɩ wúro.»
1.50: Ngɛ Yeésu woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «A bɩlɛ́, méévééri nya sɩsɩ mááná nya figíyée tɩɩwʊ́-dɛ nɛ́-rɔ gɛ nyáává toovonúm ɖɔ́? Tɔ́ɔ, nyɔ́ngɔnɩ́ ńna wenbí bɩɩjɛzɩ́ ɖɔ́ nɛ́.»
1.51: Ngɛ waadásɩ ɩtɔ́ sɩsɩ: «Ménveerím mɩ́ɩ toovonúm sɩsɩ mɩ́ngɔnɩ́ ɩna ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá tʊláa, bɩka Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ malááyɩ́kawá wéndím bángbanáa Ɩrʊ́ Biyaalʊ́.»

2.1: Bɩdɛ́ɛ wɛ́ náádoozo wɩ́rɛ nɛ́, ngɛ baalá hiije Kána tɛɛbiiyá-daá Galilée laadɔ́ɔ-rɔ. Yeésu ɩgɔɔ woobó hiije kɩḿ.
2.2: Baadáyáa Yeésu ɖʊɖɔ na ɩwanbaaráa bɔkɔ́nɩ.
2.3: Sʊlʊ́m bɔwɛ bɔ́nnyɔɔ́ hiije-daá nɛ́ wɔɔgɔ́nɩ bɩtɛ́, ngɛ Yeésu ɩgɔɔ weevééri yɩ sɩsɩ: «Bɛdɛ́ɛ sʊlʊ́m wɛɛdɛ́.»
2.4: Ngɛ Yeésu woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Ɖɔ́gɔɔ, mána nya wentí. Mɛ́dɛ́ɛ alɩwáátɩ tatala tá.»
2.5: Ngɛ ɩgɔɔ weevééri hiije-daá bɔwʊtá-dɩnáa sɩsɩ: «Ɩlá wenbí bɩrɩ́ŋa sɩ ɩtɔ́ mɩ́ɩ nɛ́.»
2.6: Hiije-daá, nɩgbáánɩ loɖo wɛ ńnaamʊ́, nɩgbáánɩ tɩḿ, bɔ́ gɛ bɛɛjɛ́sɩ bala ná tɩ. Tɩdaá gɛ Yahúúɖuwá wánɖʊ́ʊ lɩ́m bánlanáa badɩ ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɩzá-daá. Báa wenkí-daá bánbɩɩzɩ́ baɖʊ nyazɩ lɩ́m líitiri nɩɩ́nʊ́wá (100) bɩlɛ́.
2.7: Ngɛ Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ bɔwʊtá-dɩnáa sɩsɩ: «Ɩɖʊ lɩ́m bisu nɩgbáánɩ tɩna.» Ngɛ baaɖʊ lɩ́m bisu tɩ fɛ́lɛ́‑fɛ́lɛ́.
2.8: Ngɛ Yeésu sɩsɩ: «Ɩjɩrɩ́ lɛlɛɛɖɔ́ iboná hiije-dɛ́ɛ ɖíína-dɛ́ɛ nɩ́baadɛɛrʊ́.» Ngɛ baajɩrɩ́ boboná yɩ.
2.9: Hiije-dɛ́ɛ ɖíína-dɛ́ɛ nɩ́baadɛɛrʊ́ waaɖɩ́m lɩ́m nɛ́, bɩ́ńbɩ́sɩ sʊlʊ́m. (Ɩmʊ́ ɩdɩtɩŋa waasɩ lénlé sʊlʊ́m waagálɩ́ɩ́ná nɛ́, amá, wenbá baagájɩ́rɩ́ lɩ́m nɛ́, bɛlɛ́ banyɩ ná). Ńna gɛ waayáa weetáhárʊ
2.10: ɩtɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Sʊlʊ́m kazɔ́ɔ ńbɩ gɛ báa weení wánɖaanáa ɩráa fáa bɔnyɔ́ɔ naanɩ́, na a ɩráa wɔɔnyɔ́ɔ bɩ́nɖɛɛzɩ́ wɛ nɛ́, bafa wɛ sʊlʊ́m bɩdɛ́ɛ kazɔ́ɔ tɔɖɔ́ɔ nɛ́. Amá, nyɔ́ɔ́ nyáázɩ́ɩ sʊlʊ́m kazɔ́ɔ ńbɩ hálɩ lɛlɛɛɖɔ́!»
2.11: Yeésu sɩ ɩɖáa ɩdɛ́ɛ maamááciwá tɩ́nwɩlɩ́ɩ weení ɩgɛ́ɛ nɛ́ lám nɛ́, maamááci kɩḿ gɛ waaɖaaná Kána tɛɛbiiyá-daá Galilée laadɔ́ɔ-rɔ. Waawɩ́lɩ ɩdɛ́ɛ ásícé, ngɛ ɩdɛ́ɛ wanbaaráa waava yɩ toovonúm.
2.12: Bɩlɛ́ bʊwɔ́rɔ́ nɛ́, ngɛ Yeésu weedí Kapɛrɩnawʊ́m tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá ɩ́na ɩgɔɔ na igoobíya na ɩwanbaaráa. Amá, wɛ́-bíya cʊ́kɔ gɛ baalá ńna. Yeésu woobó Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-daá (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 21.12-13; Mrk 11.15-17; Lúk 19.45-46 ɖʊɖɔ)
2.13: Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ Fɛlɛ nɖɛ́ɛ-dɛ́ɛ jíńgáárɩ́ wáńjʊ́ʊ́, ngɛ Yeésu waagba Yerusalɛ́ɛm.
2.14: Waana ɩráa bánÿám náánɩ, na fééni na avówa kʊ́fʊlʊmá Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-daá. Waadánáa wenbá bɛ́ngɛɛ́ ɩráa liideé nɛ́ bɔjɔɔ́ɔ.
2.15: Ńna gɛ waajáa nibé ɩlá kegbééziyɔ́ɔ ɩɖɔ́ɔ barɩ́ŋa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-daá, bɩ́na fééni na náánɩ; ɩyáázɩ liide-gɛɛráa-dɛ́ɛ liideé, ikulú tébiriwá.
2.16: Ngɛ weevééri avówa yamɖáa sɩsɩ: «Ɩlɩzɩ́ mɩ́gbɩná cé! Ɩ́kɔkpɔ́ɔ Majaa-dɛ́ɛ ɖaána ɩbɩsɩná fótóósi ɖaána!»
2.17: Ngɛ ɩwanbaaráa wɔɔdɔ́ɔ́zɩ sɩsɩ baaŋmáa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Tɔ́m Tákaraɖáwá-daá sɩsɩ: «Mádʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ, sɔɔlɩ́m máábá mɔzɔ́ɔ́lɩ nyáɖaána nɛ́-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m ɖɔ́kɩná méwenbiré páá.»
2.18: Ngɛ Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ nɩ́baadɛɛráa wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Maamááci wenkí gɛ nyánbɩɩzɩ́ nlá na nwɩ́lɩ ɖáa sɩsɩ nyɔ́wɛná yíko ńla ńŋɩnáa ɖɔ́.»
2.19: Ńna gɛ Yeésu woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ɩyɔ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga kana, mángʊsɩ́ kɛ wɛ́ náádoozo-daá.»
2.20: Ngɛ Yahúúɖuwá weevééri yɩ sɩsɩ: «Bɩ́ɩ́zɩ nɛɛ́lɛ na loɖo gɛ bɔɔgbɔ́ɔ bama ná Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga kana, ngɛ nyɔ́ɔ́ nyazɩ wɛ́ náádoozo gɛ sɩ ngbɔ́ɔ nma ná kɛ?»
2.21: Ngʊ́ Yeésu ɩlɛ́ waayáa sɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga nɛ́, ɩdɔnʊʊ́ gɛ waayáa bɩlɛ́.
2.22: Sáátɩ wenkí wɔɔgɔ́nɩ ifé ɩkálɩɩ ɩsɩɖáa-daá nɛ́, ngɛ ɩwanbaaráa wɔɔdɔ́ɔ́zɩ sɩsɩ waavʊ́ńŋmátɩ bɩlɛ́. Ngɛ baava Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m na tɔ́m tɩḿ Yeésu waavʊ́ńŋmátɩ tɩ nɛ́ toovonúm. Yeésu ɩbá ɩnyɩ ɩrʊ́ wenbiré-daá
2.23: Sáátɩ wenkí Yeésu fʊnwɛ Yerusalɛ́ɛm Fɛlɛ nɖɛ́ɛ-dɛ́ɛ jíńgáárɩ́ sáátɩ nɛ́, ɩráa ɖabata waana maamááciwá wánlám nɛ́, baava yɩ toovonúm.
2.24: Amá, Yeésu ɩlɛ́ ɩdalá wɛ yaraɖá, káma, ɩvʊnnyɩ wenbí barɩ́ŋa bɛgɛ́ɛ nɛ́.
2.25: Ɩdanvɛ́yɩ́na sɩsɩ befééri yɩ wenbí ɩrʊ́ kɛ́ɛ bɩ nɛ́, káma, ɩvʊnnyɩ wenbí bʊwɛ ɩrʊ́-daá nɛ́.

3.1: Faríizi ńba-daá abaalʊ́ naárʊ wɔɔjɔɔ ná, bánÿaá yɩ sɩsɩ Nikodɛ́ɛmɩ, ɩgɛ́ɛ Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnɩ́ naárʊ gɛ.
3.2: Wɩ́rɛ gɛ wɔɔgɔ́nɩ nuvoowú-daá ɩmɔɔná Yeésu, ngɛ weevééri yɩ sɩsɩ: «Kʊ́bɔnɩ́, ɖányɩ bɩlɛ́ sɩsɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ weegédíri ná nya sɩ ngɔ́nɩ nwɩ́lɩ ɖáa ɩdɛ́ɛ tɔ́m. Káma, naárʊ tánbɩɩzɩ ɩlá maamááciwá wentí nyɔ́ɔ́ nyánlám tɩ nɛ́ a Ɩsɔ́ɔ raazɩ́ŋɛ́ɛ bʊdʊ́ʊ wɔ́rɔ́.»
3.3: Ngɛ Yeésu woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Ménveerím nya toovonúm sɩsɩ weení badatásɩ balʊ́rʊ yɩ nɛ́, bʊdʊ́ʊ tánbɩɩzɩ ɩna Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ kowúrɔ́ɔ.»
3.4: Ngɛ Nikodɛ́ɛmɩ wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Nŋɩ́nɩ́ gɛ bɩ́nlám na batásɩ balʊ́rʊ ɩrʊ́ wánlám ábɔ́nɩ́ nɛ́. Bʊdʊ́ʊ wánbɩɩzɩ́ ɩtásɩ ɩsʊ́ʊ ɩgɔɔ lóódi-daá balʊ́rʊ yɩ?»
3.5: Ngɛ Yeésu woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Ménveerím nya toovonúm sɩsɩ a badatásɩ balʊrʊ ná ɩrʊ́ na lɩ́m na Kezeŋa Ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ ńga, bʊdʊ́ʊ tánbɩɩzɩ ɩsʊ́ʊ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ kowúrɔ́ɔ-daá.
3.6: Wenbí ɩrʊ́ wánlʊrʊ́ʊ nɛ́ kɛ́ɛ ɩrʊ́ gɛ, bɩka wenbí Kezeŋa Ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ ńga wánlʊrʊ́ʊ nɛ́ kɛ́ɛ Kezeŋa Ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ ńga-dɛ́ɛ ńbɩ gɛ.
3.7: Bɩ́kalá nya bítí mɔ́ɔ́dɔ́ nya sɩsɩ asée batásɩ balʊ́rʊ mɩ́ɩ nɛ́.
3.8: Fefelimá wɛ́nvɛtɩ́ nɛ́, lé bɩɩmɔ́ɔ yɛ nɛ́ gɛ ánvɛtɩ́; nyánnɩɩ́ ánvɛtɩ́ nɛ́, amá, nyáásɩ lé aagálɩ́ɩ́ná nɛ́, cáńfáná lénlé ánɖɛɛnáa nɛ́. Bɩlɛ́ ɖʊɖɔ gɛ bɩjɔɔ́ɔ weení baadásɩ balʊrʊ ná yɩ na Kezeŋa Ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ ńga nɛ́.»
3.9: Ngɛ Nikodɛ́ɛmɩ wɔɔdɔ́bɔɔzɩ Yeésu sɩsɩ: «Nŋɩ́nɩ́ gɛ bɩ́nbɩɩzɩ́ bɩlá bɩlɛ́.»
3.10: Ńna gɛ Yeésu woobúsi sɩsɩ: «A bɩlɛ́, nyɔ́ɔ́ weení nyɛ́gɛ́ɛ Israyɛ́ɛlɩ Mará wɩlɩɖʊ́ nɛ́, ńdánnɩɩ bugutoluú?
3.11: Ménveerím nya toovonúm sɩsɩ wentí ɖányɩ nɛ́ gɛ ɖánŋmatɩ́, bɩka wenbí ɖááná nɛ́-dɛ́ɛ seríya gɛ ɖánlɩzɩ́ɩ, amá, mɩ́dánjaa sɩ itísi ɖɛ́dɛ́ɛ seríya.
3.12: Mánŋmatɩ́ mɩ́ɩ adɛ laadɔ́ɔ-rɔ cé-dɛ́ɛ ńdɩ gɛ mɩ́dánjaa sɩ ɩfa toovonúm nɛ́, nŋɩ́nɩ́ gɛ bɩ́nbɩɩzɩ́ bɩlá na ɩfa ma toovonúm a bɩgɛ́ɛ mɔ́ɔ́gɔ́nɩ mánŋmatɩ́ wenbí bɩgɛ́ɛ ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá ńbɩ nɛ́ bɩdɔ́m.
3.13: Naárʊ takpa ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá kɛtɛngɛrɛ, asée Ɩrʊ́ Biyaalʊ́ weení waagálɩɩ ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá ikédi adɛ nɛ́ iriké.
3.14: Ńŋɩnáa tɛɛwʊ́lɔ́ɔ́-daá anɖébi Múúsá wɔɔgbɔ́ɔ ɖoḿ boolú nyɩɩrʊʊ́ balaná yɩ nɛ́ ɩtʊʊ ná ɖɛ́nɩ kɩ́bɩɩzʊ́ʊ isúu nɛ́, bɩlɛ́ ɖʊɖɔ gɛ sɩ balá Ɩrʊ́ Biyaalʊ́,
3.15: na weení ɩrɩ́ŋa waava yɩ toovonúm nɛ́ iyuú weezuú kɩ́dɛ́ndɛŋ́ nɛ́.
3.16: Káma, Ɩsɔ́ɔ wɔɔzɔ́ɔ́lɩ ɖúúlínya páá hálɩ ɩkpɔ́ɔ Ibiyaalʊ́ kʊ́ɖʊḿ weení ɩwɛná yɩ nɛ́ ɩfa, na weení ɩrɩ́ŋa waava yɩ toovonúm nɛ́ ɩ́kɛtɛlɛ́ŋ, amá, iyuú weezuú kɩ́dɛ́ndɛŋ́ nɛ́.
3.17: Káma, Ɩsɔ́ɔ tekédiri Ibiyaalʊ́ ɖúúlínya-daá sɩsɩ ɩkʊ ɩráa tɔ́m; amá, weegédíri yɩ gɛ sɩsɩ ɩ́kɔnɩ ɩlɛ́ɛ wɛ.
3.18: Weení waava yɩ toovonúm nɛ́, bádángʊ́ʊ ɩdɔ́m; amá, weení ɩdafa yɩ toovonúm nɛ́, ɩlɛ́ ɩdɔ́m wáńzɩ́ḿ nbɩlɛ́, káma, ɩdafa Ɩsɔ́ɔ Biyaalʊ́ kʊ́ɖʊḿ weení ɩwɛná yɩ nɛ́ toovonúm.
3.19: Wentí tɩrɔ sɩ bakʊ ɩráa-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m nɛ́ nɖɔ́: Ɖɛnyɛm wɔɔgɔ́nɩ ɖúúlínya nɛ́, beegízi kɩ bɩka bɔsɔ́ɔ́lɩ temenuú, káma, badɩmɛ́ taavé nɛ́-rɔɔzɩ́.
3.20: Wenbí bʊrɔ nɛ́, weení ɩrɩ́ŋa wánlám bɩdaavé nɛ́ tánjaa ɖɛnyɛm; bʊdʊ́ʊ tánjaa ɩkɔ́nɩ ɖɛnyɛm-daá, káma, wénzewɔ́ɔ sɩsɩ bɩ́kɔkɔ́nɩ bufulú ɩwɔ́rɔ́.
3.21: Amá, weení ivóo toovonúm nɛ́, wɔ́ngɔnɩ́ ɖɛnyɛm-daá gɛ, na ɩráa ɩna sɩsɩ wenbí bɩmɔɔ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ nɛ́ gɛ wánlám.» Wentí Yaayá wánŋmatɩ́ Yeésu-rɔ nɛ́
3.22: Bɩlɛ́ bʊwɔ́rɔ́ nɛ́, ngɛ Yeésu na ɩwanbaaráa bɛɛɖɛ́ɛ Yudée. Ngɛ ɩ́na wɛ bɔɔjɔ́ɔ ńna cʊ́kɔ bɩka wénliríi ɩráa lɩ́m-daá wɔ́nzɔ́ɔ wɛ túúbá lɩ́m.
3.23: Yaayá ɖʊɖɔ wánvʊnliríi ɩráa lɩ́m-daá fáráńdɩ́ bánÿaá kɩ Enɔ́ɔnɩ, bɩjʊ́ʊ́na Salíim tɛ́ɛ́dɩ nɛ́, káma, lɩ́m wɔɔɖɔ́ɔ ńnaamʊ́; ɩráa wónboɖé ńnaamʊ́ bénliríi wɛ lɩ́m-daá.
3.24: Bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ kɩḿ nɛ́, bɔdɔtɔ́ɔ ta Yaayá sáráka.
3.25: Ngɛ bɩɩgɔná ŋmatɩrɛ Yaayá-dɛ́ɛ wanbaaráa na Yahúúɖu naárʊ, ɩrʊ́-dɛ́ɛ ɩdɩ ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ lám Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɩzá-daá-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m-rɔ.
3.26: Ngɛ bɔɔgɔ́nɩ bana Yaayá befééri yɩ sɩsɩ: «Kʊ́bɔnɩ́, weení ɩvʊngɔwɛ nyɔ́jɔ́ Yɔrɔdáanɩ buwá-dɛ́ɛ fúu lí ńgɩ-rɔ, ngɛ nyáálɩ́zɩ́ yɩ seríya nɛ́, bɛɛ lɛlɛɛɖɔ́ wénliríi ɩráa lɩ́m-daá gɛ, bɩka ɩráa rɩ́ŋa wɛ́nɖɛɛ́ ɩjɔ́.»
3.27: Ngɛ Yaayá woobúsi sɩsɩ: «A ɖé Ɩsɔ́ɔ tafa ɩrʊ́ nabʊ́rʊ, ɩ́dánbɩɩzɩ iyuú bɩ.
3.28: Mɩ́dɩtɩŋa mɩ́ɩ́zá-daá gɛ mɔ́ɔ́dɔ́ sɩsɩ: “Bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ mɔ́ɔ́ gɛ Lɛɛrʊ́, amá, mɛ́ɛgɛ́dɛ́ yɩ nɩ́bááwʊ gɛ.”
3.29: Weení ɩdɩɩná alʊ́ nɛ́, ɩlɛ́ gɛ weetáhárʊ; bɩɩga cɛrɛ́ɛ ɩlɛ́ wánzɩŋ́ weetáhárʊ-jɔ́ gɛ wénwelesí yɩ; wánnɩɩ́ weetáhárʊ lowú nɛ́, bɩɩbá gɛ bɩjɔɔ́ɔ yɩ niíni. Cɛrɛ́ɛ-dɛ́ɛ niíni igoobire gɛ mɛ́dɛ́ɛ ńbɩ. Bʊrɔ gɛ máábá mɔ́wɛ wenbi‑niíni-daá.
3.30: Bɩmɔɔ́na ɩlɛ́ ɩdɛ́ɛ yɩ́ɖɛ ɩkpa bɩka mɔ́ɔ́ mɛ́dɛ́ɛ ńɖɛ ití.» Weení waagálɩ́ɩ́ná ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá nɛ́-dɛ́ɛ seríya
3.31: «Weení waagálɩ́ɩ́ná ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá nɛ́, waagɩ́lɩ ɩráa baaganáa rɩ́ŋa. Weení waalɩɩná adɛ laadɔ́ɔ-rɔ nɛ́, ɩlɛ́ ɩgɛ́ɛ adɛ laadɔ́ɔ-rɔ ńnɩ́ gɛ, bɩka adɛ laadɔ́ɔ-rɔ-dɛ́ɛ ńdɩ gɛ wánŋmatɩ́. Weení waagálɩ́ɩ́ná ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá nɛ́,
3.32: wenbí waana nɛ́, na wentí waanɩ́ɩ nɛ́-dɛ́ɛ seríya gɛ wánlɩzɩ́ɩ, amá, ɩráa téndisi ɩdɛ́ɛ seríya wánlɩzɩ́ɩ kɩ nɛ́.
3.33: Weení weedísi ɩdɛ́ɛ seríya nɛ́, wɔɔdɔ́ sɩsɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ kɛ́ɛ toovonúm-dʊ́ʊ nbɩlɛ́.
3.34: Káma, weení Ɩsɔ́ɔ weegédíri yɩ nɛ́, Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m gɛ wánŋmatɩ́. Wenbí nɛ́ gɛ sɩsɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ wánváa bʊdʊ́ʊ ɩdɛ́ɛ Kezeŋa rɩ́ŋa ɖetéḿ gɛ.
3.35: Caáwʊ sɔɔlɛ́ɛ Biyaalʊ́ʊ, ngɛ wɔɔgbɔ́ɔ bɩrɩ́ŋa ɩɖʊ wɛndɛ́.
3.36: Weení waava Biyaalʊ́ʊ toovonúm nɛ́, wooyuú weezuú kɩ́dɛ́ndɛŋ́ nɛ́; weení ɩdafa Biyaalʊ́ʊ toovonúm nɛ́, tónÿuú weezuú kɩḿ, amá, Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ baaná wɛná ɩrɔɔzɩ́.»

4.1: -3 Faríizi ńba waanɩ́ɩ ɩráa wánŋmatɩ́ sɩsɩ Yeésu wánbɩsɩnáa wenbá ɩdɛ́ɛ wanbaaráa nɛ́ na wenbá wénliríi lɩ́m-daá wɔ́nzɔ́ɔ wɛ túúbá lɩ́m nɛ́ wɔ́nɖɔɔ́ bángɩlɩ́ɩ Yaayá-dɛ́ɛ wanbaaráa. Ngʊ́ nbɛ́ɛ nɛ́, bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ Yeésu tɩtɩŋa wénliríi kʊ ɩráa lɩ́m-daá, ɩdɛ́ɛ wanbaaráa gɛ. Yeésu waanɩ́ɩ bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ waalɩ́ɩ Yudée laadɔ́ɔ-daá ɩbɩ́sɩ Galilée laadɔ́ɔ-daá.
4.4: Ngʊ́ naanɩ́ na ɩkádála Galilée nɛ́, asée wɔɔgbɔɔná Samarɩ́ya laadɔ́ɔ-rɔ.
4.5: Yeésu wɛ́nɖɛɛ́ nɛ́, waadála Samarɩ́ya laadɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ natɩ́rɩ-daá, bánÿaá tɩ sɩsɩ Sikáarɩ, fɔɔ́ Yaakúbu waava kɛ ibiyaalʊ́ Ísifu nɛ́ kɔjɔ́.
4.6: Ńnaamʊ́ gɛ Yaakúbu-dɛ́ɛ lɔkɔ fʊnwɛ. Bɩɩnɩ́ɩ Yeésu nɛ́, ngɛ weedí ɩcɔ́ɔ lɔkɔ-jɔ́. Bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ kɩḿ bɩ́ńláḿ ɩdaawʊ́ bɩlɛ́.
4.7: Samarɩ́ya alʊ́ naárʊ wɔɔgɔ́nɩ sɩ ilu lɩ́m; ngɛ Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Fa ma lɩ́m mɔnyɔ́ɔ.»
4.8: Bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ kɩḿ Yeésu-dɛ́ɛ wanbaaráa wɛ́ńɖɛ́ɛ́ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá sɩ bakámʊ́ kíɖíím.
4.9: Ngɛ Samarɩ́ya alʊ́ weevééri Yeésu sɩsɩ: «Bɩ́nlám nŋɩ́nɩ́ na nyɔ́ɔ́ weení nyɛ́gɛ́ɛ Yahúúɖu nɛ́ nyánzʊlʊ́ʊ mɔ́ɔ́ Samarɩ́ya alʊ́ sɩsɩ máva nya lɩ́m nnyɔ́ɔ.» Káma, Yahúúɖuwá na Samarɩ́ya ńba bádánjʊʊná ɖamá.
4.10: Ngɛ Yeésu woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «A nyáfʊ́nnyɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ kʊjɔɔwʊ, bɩka a nyáfʊ́nnyɩ weení wɔɔdɔ́ nya sɩsɩ ńva yɩ lɩ́m ɩnyɔ́ɔ nɛ́, nyɔ́ɔ́ nɖaazʊlʊ ná ɩlɛ́ lɩ́m, bɩka ɩfa nya lɩ́m bɩ́nváa weezuú nɛ́.»
4.11: Ngɛ alʊ́ woobúsi sɩsɩ: «Kʊ́bɔnɩ́, nyɛ́vɛ́yɩ́na kúlúúgu bɩka lɔkɔ ɖʊɖɔ weelíŋ. Nŋɩ́nɩ́ gɛ sɩ nlá na iyuú lɩ́m bɩḿ bɩ́nváa weezuú nɛ́.
4.12: A bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, nyɔ́ɔ́ nyáágɩ́lɩ ɖájaájaa Yaakúbu weení waava ɖáa lɔkɔ kɩna nɛ́? Ɩlɛ́ ɩdɩtɩŋa na ibíya na ɩdɛ́ɛ fʊ́ńdɩ kpɩná bɔɔnyɔ́ɔ kɩdɛ́ɛ lɩ́m.»
4.13: Ngɛ Yeésu woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Weení wɔɔnyɔ́ɔ lɩ́m bɩna nɛ́, ɖoolɔɔ́ wándasɩ́ kakʊ yɩ ɖʊɖɔ.
4.14: Amá, weení sɩ ɩnyɔ́ɔ lɩ́m wenbí sɩ mava yɩ nɛ́, ɖoolɔɔ́ tándakʊ́ʊ yɩ kɛtɛngɛrɛ, lɩ́m wenbí sɩ mava yɩ nɛ́ wánbɩsɩ́ ɩdaá gɛ nyazɩ buwá kʊjʊʊ́ lénlé weezuú kɩ́dɛ́ndɛŋ́ nɛ́ wángagám nyazɩ lɩ́m nɛ́.»
4.15: Ngɛ alʊ́ wɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Kʊ́bɔnɩ́, fa ma bɩdɛ́ɛ lɩ́m na ɖoolɔɔ́ ɩkátasɩ kakʊ ma bɩka mákákabɩ́sɩ cé molu lɩ́m.»
4.16: Ngɛ Yeésu weevééri yɩ sɩsɩ: «Bo ngáyáa nwaalʊ́ bɩka ngábɩsɩ cé.»
4.17: Ngɛ alʊ́ woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Mɛ́vɛ́yɩ́ na abaalʊ́.» Ńna gɛ Yeésu sɩsɩ: «Nyɔ́wɛná toovonúm ndɔ́ sɩsɩ nyɛ́vɛ́yɩ́na abaalʊ́.
4.18: Káma, abaaláa nyáázáa wɛ nɛ́ waalɩ́ɩ nɔɔ́nʊ́wá, bɩka weení nyána yɩ ɖɔ́ nɛ́ tɛkɛ́ɛ nwaalʊ́. Toovonúm gɛ nyááŋmátɩ.»
4.19: Ngɛ alʊ́ sɩsɩ: «Kʊ́bɔnɩ́, mɛ́bɛɛ́na sɩsɩ nyɛ́gɛ́ɛ anɖébi gɛ.
4.20: Ɖájaájaanáa Samarɩ́ya ńba woogúu Ɩsɔ́ɔ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ bʊ́ʊ kɩna kɩrɔ gɛ; amá, mɩ́nyɔ́ɔ́ Yahúúɖuwá mɩzɩ Yerusalɛ́ɛm gɛ bɩmɔɔ́na bokúu Ɩsɔ́ɔ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ.»
4.21: Ngɛ Yeésu weevééri yɩ sɩsɩ: «Ɖɔ́gɔɔ, toovonúm gɛ ménveerím nya, alɩwáátɩ kɛrɛŋɛ, bidokúti bɩgɛ́ɛ bʊ́ʊ kɩna kɩrɔ, cáńfáná Yerusalɛ́ɛm gɛ sɩ bokúu Caáwʊ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ.
4.22: Mɩ́nyɔ́ɔ́ Samarɩ́ya ńba, mɩ́ɩ́sɩ wenbí mínguú bɩ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ nɛ́; ɖɔ́ɔ́ Yahúúɖuwá ɖányɩ wenbí ɖónguú bɩ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ nɛ́, káma, Yahúúɖuwá gɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ sɩ ɩbaná ɩlɛ́ɛ ɩráa.
4.23: Káma, alɩwáátɩ kɛrɛŋɛ, hálɩ kɩ́ńdálɩ́ bɩtɛ́, kɩdaá, wenbá bónguú Ɩsɔ́ɔ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ na toovonúm nɛ́ wónguú Caáwʊ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ na ɩdɛ́ɛ Kezeŋa-dɛ́ɛ yíko-daá na toovonúm. Wenbá bónguú Ɩsɔ́ɔ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ ńŋɩnáa bɩlɛ́ nɛ́ gɛ Caáwʊ sɔɔlɛ́ɛ.
4.24: Ɩsɔ́ɔ kɛ́ɛ Kezeŋa gɛ, ngɛ bɩmɔɔ́na wenbá barɩ́ŋa bónguú yɩ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ nɛ́ bokúu yɩ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ na ɩdɛ́ɛ Kezeŋa-dɛ́ɛ yíko-daá na toovonúm.»
4.25: Ngɛ alʊ́ weevééri yɩ sɩsɩ: «Mányɩ sɩsɩ Krísto, (bugutoluú sɩsɩ: Lɛɛrʊ́ Gɩrɛ́ɛkɩ kʊnʊm-daá) wɔ́ngɔnɩ́. A wɔɔgɔ́nɩ wánwɩlɩ́ɩ ɖáa bɩrɩ́ŋa.»
4.26: Ngɛ Yeésu weevééri yɩ sɩsɩ: «Mɔ́ɔ́ weení mánŋmatɩnáa nya ɖɔ́ nɛ́, mánáábɩ́lɛ́.»
4.27: Ńna gɛ Yeésu-dɛ́ɛ wanbaaráa waagálɩ́ɩ́ná tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá batála. Ngɛ bɩɩlá wɛ bítí Yeésu wɛ wánŋmatɩnáa alʊ́ nɛ́. Amá, badaá naárʊ tabɩ́ɩ́zɩ ɩbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «We gɛ nyánjáádɩ» yáá «Wentí gɛ nyána yɩ mɩ́nŋmatɩ́.»
4.28: Ngɛ alʊ́ weeyéle ɩdɛ́ɛ báyɔ́ɔ ńnaamʊ́, ɩɖɛ́ɛ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá ikéveeri ɩráa sɩsɩ:
4.29: «Ɩgɔ́nɩ ɩbɛ́ɛ! Ɩrʊ́ naárʊ wɛ cé weevééri ma wenbí bɩrɩ́ŋa máálá nɛ́! Bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ Lɛɛrʊ́ nbɩlɛ́?»
4.30: Ngɛ ɩráa waagálɩɩ tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá bɔkɔ́nɩ Yeésu-jɔ́.
4.31: Bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ kɩḿ nɛ́, Yeésu-dɛ́ɛ wanbaaráa wɛ bánjaarɩ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Kʊ́bɔnɩ́, ɖi kíɖíím!»
4.32: Amá, Yeésu weevééri wɛ gɛ sɩsɩ: «Mɔ́ɔ́, mɔ́wɛná kíɖíím nabɩ́rɩ sɩ meɖi, mɩ́nyɔ́ɔ́ mɩ́ɩ́sɩ bɩ.»
4.33: Ngɛ wanbaaráa waabáázɩ ɖamá bɔɔzɩ́ sɩsɩ: «Naárʊ waagʊ́ ɩkɔná yɩ kíɖíím sɩ iɖi yáá wé.»
4.34: Ngɛ Yeésu weevééri wɛ sɩsɩ: «Mégíɖíím gɛ malá weení weegédíri ma nɛ́ ɩzɔɔlɩ́m, bɩka magʊ́ʊ́rɩ ɩdɩmɛ́rɛ wenɖé waaɖʊ ma ɖɛ nɛ́.
4.35: Mɩ́dɩtɩŋa mɩ́ndɔ́m kʊ sɩsɩ: “Bɩɩga irodunáa nɔɔ́náázá na kíɖíídi kʊ́m ɩtála.” Amá, mɔ́ɔ́ ménveerím mɩ́ɩ sɩsɩ ɩgʊ́sɩ mɩ́gʊ́jʊ́nɩ ɩbɛ́ɛ fásɩ kazɔ́ɔ: Kíɖíídi wáńbɩ́ɩ bɩɖamáa kʊ́m.
4.36: Kíɖíídi kʊmɖʊ́ wónÿuúu ɩdɛ́ɛ kɩvɛrɛwʊ bɩka wónduuzí kíɖíídi wángʊ́m nɛ́ wánzɩɩ́ weezuú kɩ́dɛ́ndɛŋ́ nɛ́. Na biyóózi bɩlá ɖuurú na kʊmɖʊ́ niíni.
4.37: Ńna gɛ ɖánnáa sɩsɩ ɖudúúre ɖɩna ɖɩgɛ́ɛ toovonúm; ɖudúúre ɖɩḿ gɛ sɩsɩ: “Naárʊ wónɖuú gɛ bɩka naárʊ ɩkʊ́.”
4.38: Méédíri mɩ́ɩ ɩkágʊ lénlé mɩ́dálá bɩnɩ́ɩ mɩ́ɩ nɛ́; nɛbɛ́rɛ waala ná tɩmɛ́rɛ, ngɛ mɩ́nyɔ́ɔ́ mɩ́ɩ́dála iɖi bɛlɛ́ bɛdɛ́ɛ tɩmɛ́rɛ-dɛ́ɛ alɩbáráka.»
4.39: Tɛ́ɛ́dɩ tɩḿ tɩdaá Samarɩ́ya ńba ɖabata waava Yeésu toovonúm alʊ́ ɩmʊ́ ɩdɛ́ɛ seríya waalɩzɩ́ kɩ nɛ́ kɩrɔɔzɩ́. Waalɩzɩ́ seríya sɩsɩ: «Weevééri ma wenbí bɩrɩ́ŋa máálá nɛ́.»
4.40: Biiyéle Samarɩ́ya ńba wɔɔgɔ́nɩ Yeésu-jɔ́ nɛ́, baavɩ́nɩ yɩ sɩsɩ ɩcɔ́ɔ bɛḿ bɔjɔ́; ngɛ wɔɔjɔ́ɔ bɔjɔ́ ńna wɛ́-bíya nɔɔ́lɛ.
4.41: Ngɛ baadásɩ bɔɖɔ́ɔ baava yɩ toovonúm baanɩ́ɩ ɩdɩtɩŋa ɩdɛ́ɛ faawɩ́ɩ nɛ́.
4.42: Ngɛ beevééri alʊ́ sɩsɩ: «Bidokúti bɩgɛ́ɛ wentí nyéévééri ɖáa nɛ́ tiriké tɩrɔ gɛ ɖáává toovonúm, amá, ɖádɩtɩŋa ɖáánɩ́ɩ ná ɖánɩgbamɩ́nɩ wánŋmatɩ́ nɛ́, ngɛ ɖáádɩ́lɩ́ sɩsɩ ɩnáábɩ́lɛ́ toovonúm ɖúúlínya-dɛ́ɛ Lɛɛrʊ́.» Yeésu waawáázɩ sɔ́ɔ́ja kʊ́bɔnɩ́ naárʊ biyaalʊ́
4.43: Yeésu wɔɔjɔ́ɔ ńna wɛ́-bíya nɔɔ́lɛ nɛ́, ngɛ waalɩ́ɩ ńna ɩɖɛ́ɛ Galilée laadɔ́ɔ-daá.
4.44: Káma, ɩdɩtɩŋa wɔɔdɔ́ sɩsɩ: «Anɖébi naárʊ fɛ́yɩ́ bánɖʊ́ʊ yɩ gírímá ɩdɩtɩŋa ɩdɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá nɛ́.»
4.45: Amá, waadála Galilée nɛ́, Galilée ńba waamʊ yɩ kazɔ́ɔ, káma, baagáná wenbí bɩrɩ́ŋa waagála Yerusalɛ́ɛm jíńgáárɩ́-dɛ́ɛ sáátɩ nɛ́. Káma, bɛḿ ɖʊɖɔ boobó jíńgáárɩ́ kɩḿ.
4.46: Yeésu waadásɩ ɩbɩ́sɩ Kána Galilée laadɔ́ɔ-daá, lénlé waabɩsɩná lɩ́m sʊlʊ́m nɛ́. Wúro-dɛ́ɛ sɔ́ɔ́ja kʊ́bɔnɩ́ naárʊ wɛ Kapɛrɩnawʊ́m tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá, ibiyaalʊ́ wánganyaadɩ́.
4.47: Ɩlɛ́ waanɩ́ɩ sɩsɩ Yeésu waagálɩɩ ná Yudée laadɔ́ɔ-daá ɩtála Galilée laadɔ́ɔ-daá nɛ́, ngɛ woobó ɩmɔɔná Yeésu ɩfɩ́nɩ yɩ sɩsɩ íti Kapɛrɩnawʊ́m tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá ɩkáwaazɩ ɩmʊ́ ibiyaalʊ́ wánnyaadɩ́ sɩ ɩsɩ́ nɛ́.
4.48: Ngɛ Yeésu weevééri yɩ sɩsɩ: «A bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, a mɩ́danáa ta maamááciwá na mááɖéwá, mɩ́dánváa toovonúm kɛtɛngɛrɛ?»
4.49: Ngɛ sɔ́ɔ́ja kʊ́bɔnɩ́ wɔɔdɔ́ Yeésu sɩsɩ: «Kʊ́bɔnɩ́, kɔnɩ mɛ́dɛ́ɛ naanɩ́ na móbú ɩsɩ́.»
4.50: Ngɛ Yeésu weevééri yɩ sɩsɩ: «Bɩsɩ nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ, nyóbú na ɩdɩ.» Abaalʊ́ ɩmʊ́ waava wentí Yeésu weevééri yɩ nɛ́ toovonúm, ngɛ wɛɛɖɛ́ɛ.
4.51: Ɩwɛ nɩ́bááwʊ-rɔ wánbɩsɩ́ gɛ ɩdɛ́ɛ bɔwʊtá-dɩnáa wɔɔgɔ́nɩ basɩ́ŋ yɩ nɩ́bááwʊ befééri yɩ sɩsɩ ibú na ɩdɩ.
4.52: Ngɛ wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ wɛ sɩsɩ sáátɩ wenkí gɛ bɩɩlá yɩ sóńcí. Ngɛ beevééri yɩ sɩsɩ: «Keɖee, ɩdaawʊ́ kéréfu kʊ́ɖʊmʊ́ʊ bɩlɛ́ gɛ suúle weeyéle yɩ.»
4.53: Ngɛ caáwʊ wooyuú ɩtɩlɩ́ sɩsɩ bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ kɩḿ nɔ́ɔ́ gɛ Yeésu weevééri yɩ sɩsɩ: «Nyóbú na ɩdɩ.» Ngɛ ɩ́na ɩdɛ́ɛ ɖaána rɩ́ŋa baava Yeésu toovonúm.
4.54: Yeésu waagálɩɩ Yudée ɩkɔ́nɩ Galilée wɔ́rɔ́ nɛ́, ngɛ waadásɩ ɩlá maamááci sɩɩlɛ ńgɩ kɩna.

5.1: Bɩlɛ́ bʊwɔ́rɔ́, Yahúúɖuwá wɛ bénɖíi bɛdɛ́ɛ jíńgáárɩ́ nakɩ́rɩ nɛ́, ngɛ Yeésu woobó Yerusalɛ́ɛm.
5.2: Yerusalɛ́ɛm tɛ́ɛ́dɩ-daá, fééni ɖaḿ wɔnɔɔ́-jɔ́ gɛ lɩmjokú nakɩ́rɩ wɛ. Lɩmjokú kɩḿ kɩjɔ́ gɛ boozúu kɛ́rɛ́ɛ́zɩ nasʊ́nʊ́wá balára bamɩlɩná kɩ bɔlɔ́ sɩ atáárɩ. Bánÿaá lɩmjokú kɩḿ Éburu ńba-dɛ́ɛ kʊnʊm-daá sɩsɩ Bɛtɩzatáa lɩmjokú (bugutoluú sɩsɩ kʊnyɔnnɩɩrɛ́ lɩmjokú).
5.3: Kɛ́rɛ́ɛ́zɩ sɩḿ sɩdɛɛzɩ́ gɛ kʊdɔndɩnáa tuutúúma fɩ́nɛ́ɛ. Badaá, nyánnáa njɛma, na nʊvɔ́-dɩnáa, na wenbá biilí wɛ nɛ́. [Kʊdɔndɩnáa bɛḿ baɖamáa sɩsɩ lɩ́m íyúúdi.
5.4: Káma, malááyɩ́ka wéńderégedím sáa-sáa lɩmjokú kɩḿ-daá wónÿuúdi lɩ́m. A wooyuúdi bɩ bɩlɛ́ gɛ kʊdɔndʊ́ʊ weení waajáŋ ɩɖáa tím bɩdaá nɛ́, báa ɩgʊdɔḿ kɛ́ɛ wenkí, asée waawáa.]
5.5: Kʊdɔndɩnáa bɛḿ badaá gɛ abaalʊ́ naárʊ wɛ, bɩ́ɩ́zɩ ákoosaaláa na lutoozo nbɩlɛ́ wánnyaadɩ́ nɛ́.
5.6: Yeésu waana yɩ ilewáa adɛ ngɛ waanɩ́ɩ sɩsɩ ɩgʊdɔḿ weelééri nɛ́, ngɛ wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Nyɔ́zɔɔlɛ́ɛ nwáa?»
5.7: Ngɛ kʊdɔndʊ́ʊ woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Kʊ́bɔnɩ́, mɛ́vɛ́yɩ́na naárʊ sɩ itísi ma lɩmjokú-daá sáátɩ wenkí lɩ́m wónÿuúdi nɛ́. Sáátɩ wenkí sɩ mamáázɩ sɩsɩ méndím nɛ́, naárʊ wɛ́ńlɛ́zɩ́ ma.»
5.8: Ńna gɛ Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Kʊrʊ́ ngbɔ́ɔ nyágɩgbáláwʊ bɩka nnʊ́ŋ.»
5.9: Sɩ ɩtɔ́ na isú nɛ́, ɩrʊ́ ɩlɛ́ waawáa. Ngɛ wɔɔgbɔ́ɔ ɩgɩgbáláwʊ ɩbáázɩ nʊŋɛ́. Fɛɛzɩrɛ wɩ́rɛ gɛ tɔ́m tɩna tɩ́nlám bɩlɛ́.
5.10: Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnáa waana ɩrʊ́ ɩlɛ́ waawáa bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ bɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Sinje Fɛɛzɩrɛ wɩ́rɛ gɛ, ɖɛ́dɛ́ɛ Mará tafa nɩ́bááwʊ sɩ nzʊ́ʊ nyágɩgbáláwʊ.»
5.11: Ńna gɛ ɩlɛ́ woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Weení waawáázɩ ma nɛ́ wɔɔdɔ́ ma gɛ sɩsɩ: “Kʊrʊ́ ngbɔ́ɔ nyágɩgbáláwʊ nnʊ́ŋ.”»
5.12: Ngɛ Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnáa bɛḿ bɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Weení wɔɔdɔ ná nya sɩsɩ ńgʊ́rʊ́ ngbɔ́ɔ nyágɩgbáláwʊ nnʊ́ŋ.»
5.13: Amá, weení waawáa bɩlɛ́ nɛ́ waasɩ weení waawáázɩ yɩ nɛ́, káma, Yeésu wɛɛdɛlɛ́ŋ zamɔ́ɔ kʊwɛ ɖɩdáarɛ ɖɩḿ ɖɩdaá nɛ́ kɩdaá.
5.14: Bʊwɔ́rɔ́ gɛ, Yeésu waana ɩrʊ́ weení waawáázɩ yɩ bɩlɛ́ nɛ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-daá, ngɛ wɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Lɛlɛɛɖɔ́ nyááwáa, amá, nkokúti nlá alaháácɩ́ na wenbí bɩɩgɩ́lɩ bɩna nɛ́ bʊ́kɔ́mɔɔná nya.»
5.15: Ɩrʊ́ ɩmʊ́ waalɩ́ɩ nɛ́, ngɛ woobó ifééri Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnáa sɩsɩ Yeésu waawaazɩ ná ɩmʊ́.
5.16: Ngɛ bɛlɛ́ baabáázɩ Yeésu fúkúḿsi fáa, káma, Fɛɛzɩrɛ wɩ́rɛ gɛ waawáázɩ yɩ nɛ́-rɔ.
5.17: Ńna gɛ Yeésu woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Majaa wɛ wánlám tɩmɛ́rɛ hálɩ na sinje. Ngɛ mɔ́ɔ́ ɖʊɖɔ mɔ́wɛ mánlám tɩmɛ́rɛ.»
5.18: Yeésu waaŋmátɩ bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnáa woogúti bacáa sɩ bakʊ yɩ, káma, waayɩsɩná Fɛɛzɩrɛ wɩ́rɛ-dɛ́ɛ mará baasí, woogúti ɩtɔ́ ɖʊɖɔ sɩsɩ ɩmʊ́ Ɩjaa gɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ; waabɩsɩná ɩlɛ́ ɩzáárá nbɩlɛ́. Yíko Ɩsɔ́ɔ Biyaalʊ́ wɛná kɩ nɛ́
5.19: Yeésu waadásɩ ɩŋmátɩ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ménveerím mɩ́ɩ toovonúm sɩsɩ Biyaalʊ́ʊ tánbɩɩzɩ ɩlá nabʊ́rʊ ɩdɩ‑ɩdɩ, amá, wenbí waana Caáwʊ wánlám nɛ́ biriké gɛ wánlám. Káma, wenbí bɩrɩ́ŋa Caáwʊ wánlám nɛ́, bɩlɛ́ nɔ́ɔ́ ɖʊɖɔ gɛ Biyaalʊ́ʊ wánlám.
5.20: Caáwʊ sɔɔlɛ́ɛ Biyaalʊ́ʊ, bɩka wánwɩlɩ́ɩ yɩ wenbí bɩrɩ́ŋa wánlám nɛ́. Wándasɩ́ ɩwɩ́lɩ yɩ tɩmɛ́ kʊ́bɔná aagɩ́lɩ ana nɛ́ ɩlá, na bɩbá bɩlá mɩ́ɩ bítí.
5.21: Wenbí ńŋɩnáa Caáwʊ wénveezí ɩsɩɖáa ɩɖʊ wɛ weezuú nɛ́, bɩlɛ́ ɖʊɖɔ gɛ Biyaalʊ́ʊ wánɖʊ́ʊ wenbá ɩzɔɔlɛ́ɛ wɛ nɛ́ weezuú.
5.22: Bɩka Caáwʊ tánvʊʊná naárʊ, amá, wɔɔgbɔ́ɔ yíko rɩ́ŋa gɛ ɩɖʊ Biyaalʊ́ʊ ndɛ́ sɩsɩ ɩ́fʊʊná ɩráa,
5.23: na barɩ́ŋa bɔɖɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ ńŋɩnáa bɔ́nɖɔɔzɩ́ Caáwʊ nɛ́. Weení ɩrɩ́ŋa ɩdɔɖɔ́ɔ́zɩ Biyaalʊ́ʊ nɛ́, ɩdɔɖɔ́ɔ́zɩ Caáwʊ weení weegédíri yɩ nɛ́ ɖʊɖɔ.
5.24: Ménveerím mɩ́ɩ toovonúm sɩsɩ weení ɩrɩ́ŋa waanɩ́ɩ mɛ́dɛ́ɛ ŋmatɩrɛ gɛ waava weení weegédíri ma nɛ́ toovonúm nɛ́, wooyuú weezuú kɩ́dɛ́ndɛŋ́ nɛ́. Bádanvʊʊná yɩ; bʊdʊ́ʊ waalɩ́ɩ sɩ́m-daá ɩsʊ́ʊ weezuú-daá.
5.25: Ménveerím mɩ́ɩ toovonúm sɩsɩ alɩwáátɩ kɛrɛŋɛ hálɩ kɩ́ńdálɩ́ bɩtɛ́, ɩsɩɖáa wánnɩɩ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ Biyaalʊ́ lowú, wenbá sɩ banɩ́ɩ lowú kɩḿ nɛ́, bónÿuú weezuú.
5.26: Káma, ńŋɩnáa Caáwʊ wɛná weezuú-dɛ́ɛ yíko nɛ́, bɩlɛ́ ɖʊɖɔ gɛ waava Biyaalʊ́ʊ weezuú-dɛ́ɛ yíko.
5.27: Ngɛ waava Biyaalʊ́ʊ yíko sɩsɩ ɩ́fʊʊná ɩráa, káma, ɩgɛ́ɛ na Ɩrʊ́ Biyaalʊ́.
5.28: Bɩ́kalá mɩ́ɩ bítí, alɩwáátɩ nakɩ́rɩ kɛrɛŋɛ wenbá barɩ́ŋa baazɩ́ bebí wɛ nɛ́ bánnɩɩ́ ilowú
5.29: bakálɩɩ bɔbɔɔláánɩ-daá. Wenbá baalá kazɔ́ɔ ńbɩ nɛ́ bángʊsɩ́ wɛ basʊ́ʊ weezuú-daá. Amá, wenbá baalá bɩdaavé nɛ́, bángʊsɩ́ wɛ bafʊʊná wɛ bakʊ bɔdɔ́m.
5.30: Mɔ́ɔ́ mádánbɩɩzɩ malá nabʊ́rʊ mádɩ‑mádɩ. Mánvʊʊnáa ɩráa tɔ́m bɩlɩɩná wentí Caáwʊ weevééri ma nɛ́ gɛ. Ngʊ́ nŋɩ́nɩ́ mánvʊʊnáa nɛ́ sɩɩzɛ́ɛ, káma, bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ mólowú fáa bɩ nɛ́ gɛ mánlám, amá, wenbí weení weegédíri ma nɛ́ sɔɔlɛ́ɛ nɛ́ gɛ mánlám.» Seríyawá baalɩzɩ́ tɩ Yeésu-rɔ nɛ́
5.31: «A mádɩtɩŋa máfʊ́nlɩzɩ́ɩ kʊ mádɩ seríya, bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, mɛ́dɛ́ɛ seríya lɩzɩ́ɩ kɩḿ kɩ́fʊnvɛ́yɩ́na fɔ́ɔ́zɩrɛ.
5.32: Amá, naárʊ wánlɩzɩ́ɩ kʊ ma seríya; bɩka mányɩ sɩsɩ ɩdɛ́ɛ seríya kɩḿ kɩgɛ́ɛ toovonúm.
5.33: Mɩ́ɩ́gʊ́sɩ tɩndɩnáa itíri Yaayá-jɔ́ nɛ́, toovonúm gɛ waagálɩ́zɩ́ seríya.
5.34: Mɔ́ɔ́ nɛ́, bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ ɩrʊ́-dɛ́ɛ seríya lɩzɩ́ɩ gɛ mánjáádɩ, amá, na mɩ́nyɔ́ɔ́ iyuú lɛ́ɛ́dɩ-rɔ gɛ mááŋmátɩ bɩlɛ́.
5.35: Yaayá fʊngɛ́ɛ gɛ nyazɩ fɩtɩ́la bɔɔzɔ́ kɩ kínlosí nɛ́; ngɛ míídísi ɩkɔ́nɩ ɩfáárɩ cʊ́kɔ kɩdɛ́ɛ ɖɛnyɛm-daá.
5.36: Ngʊ́ mɔ́wɛná seríya kɩɩgɩ́lɩ Yaayá-dɛ́ɛ ńgɩ nɛ́. Tɩmɛ́ Caáwʊ weegéjéle ma mánlám yɛ nɛ́, adɩtɩŋa ánlɩzɩ́ɩ kʊ ma seríya sɩsɩ toovonúm, weegédíri ná ma.
5.37: Bɩka Caáwʊ weení weegédíri ma nɛ́, ɩdɩtɩŋa waalɩzɩ́ ma seríya ɖʊɖɔ. Kɛtɛngɛrɛ mɩ́dánɩɩ tá ilowú, belenté ɩna waazá-daá.
5.38: Ngʊ́ bɩlɛ́ gɛ mɩ́dɔ́nɖɔkɩ ɩdɛ́ɛ tɔ́m, káma, mɩ́dáfá weení weegédíri yɩ nɛ́ toovonúm.
5.39: Mɩ́ɩ́bá mɩ́ngbɛlɛŋ́ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Tɔ́m Tákaraɖá-daá sɩsɩ na iyuú weezuú kɩ́dɛ́ndɛŋ́ nɛ́ kɩdaá. Ngʊ́ kɩlɛ́ kɩ́nlɩzɩ́ɩ kʊ ma seríya.
5.40: Amá, mɩ́dánjaa sɩ ɩkɔ́nɩ mɔ́jɔ́ na iyuú weezuú.
5.41: Mánŋmatɩ́ ɖɔ́ nɛ́, bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ ɩráa-dɛ́ɛ ma sám gɛ mánjáádɩ.
5.42: Amá, mányɩ mɩ́ɩ; mányɩ sɩsɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ sɔɔlɩ́m fɛ́yɩ́ míwenbé-daá.
5.43: Na Majaa-dɛ́ɛ yɩ́ɖɛ-daá gɛ mɔ́ɔ́gɔ́nɩ́ná, ngɛ mídéyí ma mʊ́ʊ; amá, a naárʊ wɔɔgɔnɩná ɩdɩtɩŋa ɩyɩ́ɖɛ-daá mɩ́nmʊ́ʊ ɩlɛ́.
5.44: Mɩ́zɔɔlɛ́ɛ ɖamá-dɛ́ɛ sám bɩka mɩ́dánjaa Ɩsɔ́ɔ weení ɩgɛ́ɛ kʊ́ɖʊḿ nɛ́-dɛ́ɛ ńbɩ; mɩ́nlám nŋɩ́nɩ́ na ɩbɩ́ɩ́zɩ ɩfa toovonúm.
5.45: Ɩ́kamáázɩ sɩsɩ mɔ́ɔ́ sɩ magágʊ́ ná mɩ́dɔ́m Caáwʊ ɩzá-daá. Múúsá mɩ́jɔɔ́na yɩ tamɔ́ɔ nɛ́ sɩ ɩkágʊ́ ná mɩ́dɔ́m.
5.46: A mɩraabá ɩfa Múúsá toovonúm, mɩraava mɔ́ɔ́ ɖʊɖɔ toovonúm. Káma, mɔ́dɔ́m gɛ Múúsá waaŋmáa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Tɔ́m Tákaraɖá-daá.
5.47: Amá, mɩ́dáfá wenbí waaŋmáa nɛ́ toovonúm nɛ́, mɩ́nlám nŋɩ́nɩ́ na ɩbɩ́ɩ́zɩ ɩfa tɔ́m mánŋmatɩ́ mɩ́ɩ ɖɔ́ nɛ́ toovonúm.»

6.1: Bɩlɛ́ bʊwɔ́rɔ́ nɛ́, Yeésu wɛɛdɛsɩná Galilée lɩɩrɛ́ kʊ́bɔńɖɛ bándayaá ɖɛ sɩsɩ Tiberíyáadɩ lɩɩrɛ́ nɛ́ ɖɩdɛ́ɛ fúu lí ńgɩ-rɔ.
6.2: Zamɔ́ɔ kʊ́bɔńgɩ fóo yɩ, káma, kɩɩna maamááciwá waalá ɩwáázɩ kʊdɔndɩnáa nɛ́.
6.3: Ngɛ Yeésu woobó ɩkpa bʊ́ʊ-daá ití ɩcɔ́ɔ ɩ́na ɩwanbaaráa.
6.4: Bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ, Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ jíńgáárɩ́ bánÿaá kɩ sɩsɩ Fɛlɛ nɖɛ́ɛ-dɛ́ɛ jíńgáárɩ́ nɛ́ kɩ́ńjʊ́ʊ́.
6.5: Yeésu waagʊ́sɩ ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ nɛ́, waana zamɔ́ɔ kʊ́bɔńgɩ wɛ́ngɛɖɛɛ́ ɩjɔ́. Ngɛ wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ Filíipu sɩsɩ: «Lé gɛ ɖánnáa kíɖíím ɖɩmʊ ɖicéle zamɔ́ɔ kɩna kɩrɩ́ŋa kiɖi.»
6.6: Yeésu waalá Filíipu bɩlɛ́ sɩ ɩɖáázɩ yɩ ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ gɛ, káma, ɩvʊnnyɩ wenbí sɩ ɩlá nɛ́.
6.7: Filíipu woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Sɔɔlɩ bɔkpɔ́ɔ ɩrʊ́ kʊ́ɖʊḿ-dɛ́ɛ wɛ́ kákpáŋa (200) tɩmɛ́rɛ-dɛ́ɛ fɛrɩ́tɩ bakámʊ ná kíɖíím, bɩ́dándalɩ́ na batára báa weení ɩtáńÿuú cʊ́kɔ.»
6.8: Ngɛ Andirée, ɩwanbaaráa-daá naárʊ, Simɔ́ɔnɩ Pétro igoobú, wɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ:
6.9: «Bú afobú naárʊ wɛ ɖɔ́lɔ́wʊ́táá cé ɩɖɔ́kɩná kpɔ́nɔ́wá natʊ́nʊ́wá na tiiná náálɛ. Amá, we gɛ sɩ bɩbɩ́ɩ́zɩ bɩlá zamɔ́ɔ ńŋɩnáa kɩna.»
6.10: Ńna gɛ Yeésu sɩsɩ: «Ɩdɔ́ ɩráa rɩ́ŋa bɔcɔ́ɔ adɛ.» Nyɩ́ɩ́dɩ ɖabata ɩbá tɩwɛ ɖɩdáarɛ ɖɩḿ ɖɩdaá. Ngɛ bɔɔdɔ́ ɩráa bɔcɔ́ɔ. Ɩráa bɛḿ badaá, abaaláa riké kɛ́ɛ nyazɩ mííli nɔɔ́nʊ́wá (5.000) bɩlɛ́.
6.11: Ngɛ Yeésu wɔɔgbɔ́ɔ kpɔ́nɔ́wá ɩsá Ɩsɔ́ɔ tɩrɔ, ngɛ waadára ɩráa bɔjɔɔ́ɔ ńna nɛ́. Ngɛ wɛɛdɛ́sɛlɩ́ tiiná, ɩsá Ɩsɔ́ɔ arɔ ɖʊɖɔ. Ngɛ waadátárɩ́ báa weení wenbí bʊdʊ́ʊ sɔɔlɛ́ɛ nɛ́.
6.12: Beeɖi bɔfɔ́ɔ nɛ́, ngɛ Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ ɩwanbaaráa sɩsɩ: «Ɩdɔ́ɔ́zɩ buḿsi ɩráa wɔɔdɔ́ɔ bɩka nɛ́, na bɩdaá nabʊ́rʊ ɩ́kalá ásáráwʊ́.»
6.13: Kpɔ́nɔ́wá natʊ́nʊ́wá bɔɔdɔ́ɔ nɛ́-dɛ́ɛ fɔɔlásɩ wanbaaráa wɔɔdɔ́ɔ́zɩ bɩɩga nɛ́ woozu ɖɔkɩ́nɩ fuú na natɩ́lɛ.
6.14: Ɩráa waana maamááci wenkí Yeésu waalá nɛ́, ngɛ sɩsɩ: «Toovonúm, ceení gɛ anɖébi weení sɩ ɩkɔ́nɩ ɖúúlínya-daá nɛ́.»
6.15: Yeésu waadɩlɩ́ sɩsɩ bɛgɛgɛrɛŋɛ sɩ bɔkpɔ́ɔ yɩ na ɖóni basɩ́ɩ kowúrátɩ. Waana bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ wɛɛɖɛ́ɛ ɩkpa bʊ́ʊyɔ́ɔ kʊjʊʊ́-daá ɩgɔjɔɔ́ɔ iriké. Yeésu wánnʊŋɛ́ lɩ́m-rɔ (Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ Mat 14.22-33 na Mrk 6.45-52 ɖʊɖɔ)
6.16: Kɩɩɖáánɩ nɛ́, ngɛ ɩwanbaaráa weedí lɩɩrɛ́ kʊ́bɔńɖɛ nɔɔ́-jɔ́.
6.17: Ngɛ baagba kpɩ́ɩ́rʊʊ́-daá bɛ́ndɛsɩ́ bɛ́nɖɛɛ́ Kapɛrɩnawʊ́m fáráńdɩ́. Kíńÿúu ngʊ́ Yeésu tɔkɔnɩ tá ɩmɔɔná wɛ.
6.18: Fefelimá kʊ́bɔná wɛ́nvɛtɩ́ bɩka lɩ́m wángʊrʊ́ʊ bɩ́nzalɩ́ɩ.
6.19: Bɛ́ńɖɛɛzɩ batála nyazɩ kilomɛ́ɛ́tawá natʊ́nʊ́wá bɩlɛ́ gɛ baajáŋ bana Yeésu wánganʊŋ́ lɩ́m-rɔ ɩgɛrɛŋɛ sɩ ɩcʊʊná kpɩ́ɩ́rʊʊ́. Ngɛ bɩɩlá wɛ nɩdáárɛ.
6.20: Ńna gɛ Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Mɔ́ɔ́ gɛ, bɩ́kalá mɩ́ɩ nɩdáárɛ!»
6.21: Bɔɔzɔ́ɔ́lɩ sɩ bɔkpɔ́ɔ yɩ kpɩ́ɩ́rʊʊ́-daá. Amá, sɩ bacáŋ bɛbɛ́ɛ́ŋ nɛ́, kpɩ́ɩ́rʊʊ́ wáńdálɩ́ baɖaaboɖé kɩsɩ́ŋ. Zamɔ́ɔ wánjáádɩ Yeésu
6.22: Kiivé nɛ́, zamɔ́ɔ kɩɩgáwalɩ́ lɩɩrɛ́ kʊ́bɔńɖɛ-dɛ́ɛ fúu lí ńgɩ nɛ́ kɩɩna sɩsɩ kpɩ́ɩ́rʊʊ́ kʊ́ɖʊmʊ́ʊ kóŋ́ wáńgáná kɩzɩ́ŋɛ́ɛ; bɩka banyɩ bɩlɛ́ ɖʊɖɔ sɩsɩ Yeésu tasʊ́ʊ kpɩ́ɩ́rʊʊ́ kɩḿ ɩ́na ɩwanbaaráa; bɛlɛ́ beriké bɛɛɖɛɛ ná.
6.23: Ngʊ́ kpɩ́ɩ́rɩ́nɩ tɩɩgálɩ́ɩ́ná Tiberíyáadɩ nɛ́ tɩɩdála ɖɩdáarɛ wenɖé ɖɩdaá ɩráa wɔɔjɔ́ɔ bɔtɔ́ɔ kpɔ́nɔ́ Ɖádʊ́ʊ waazá Ɩsɔ́ɔ kɩrɔ nɛ́.
6.24: Zamɔ́ɔ waana sɩsɩ Yeésu na ɩwanbaaráa bɛvɛ́yɩ́ ńna nɛ́, ngɛ ɩráa waagba kpɩ́ɩ́rɩ́nɩ tɩḿ tɩdaá bɛɖɛ́ɛ Kapɛrɩnawʊ́m Yeésu cáádɩ. Yeésu kɛ́ɛ na kíɖíím bɩ́nváa weezuú nɛ́
6.25: Bɔɔmɔɔná Yeésu lɩɩrɛ́ kʊ́bɔńɖɛ-dɛ́ɛ fúu lí ńgɩ nɛ́, ngɛ bɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Kʊ́bɔnɩ́, sáátɩ wenkí gɛ nyáádála cé.»
6.26: Ngɛ Yeésu woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ménveerím mɩ́ɩ toovonúm sɩsɩ kpɔ́nɔ́wá mɩ́ɩ́dɔ́ɔ ɩfɔ́ɔ nɛ́-rɔɔzɩ́ gɛ mɩ́njáádɩ ma, bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ sɩsɩ mɩ́ɩ́nɩ́ɩ maamááciwá máálá tɩ nɛ́ tugutoluú nɛ́-rɔ.
6.27: Ɩ́kalá tɩmɛ́rɛ kíɖíím bɩ́nvɔrɔ́sɩ nɛ́ bʊrɔ. Amá, ɩlá tɩmɛ́rɛ kíɖíím bɩ́dɔ́nvɔrɔ́sɩ kɛtɛngɛrɛ, bɩka bɩ́nváa weezuú kɩ́dɛ́ndɛŋ́ nɛ́ bʊrɔ. Ɩrʊ́ Biyaalʊ́ sɩ ɩfa ná mɩ́ɩ kíɖíím bɩḿ, káma, ɩrɔɔzɩ́ gɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ Caáwʊ waaɖʊ ɩdɛ́ɛ yíko-dɛ́ɛ ɖaazɩ́tɩ.»
6.28: Ńna gɛ ɩráa wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ Yeésu sɩsɩ: «We gɛ bɩ́nbɔɔzɩ́ ɖɩlá na ɖɩlá tɩmɛ́ weená Ɩsɔ́ɔ sɔɔlɛ́ɛ yɛ nɛ́.»
6.29: Ngɛ Yeésu woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Tɩmɛ́rɛ wenɖé Ɩsɔ́ɔ sɔɔlɛ́ɛ na mɩ́ɩ nɛ́ gɛ sɩsɩ ɩ́fá weení weegédíri yɩ nɛ́ toovonúm.»
6.30: Ńna gɛ bɛlɛ́ bɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Maamááci wenkí gɛ sɩ nlá ɖɩna na ɖɩfa nya toovonúm. Tɩmɛ́rɛ wenɖé gɛ sɩ nlá.
6.31: Ɖájaájaanáa wɔɔjɔ́ɔ tɛɛwʊ́lɔ́ɔ́-daá nɛ́, kíɖíím bánÿaá bɩ sɩsɩ máánɩnɛ́ gɛ beeɖi ńŋɩnáa wenbí baaŋmáa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Tɔ́m Tákaraɖá-daá nɛ́. Baaŋmáa gɛ sɩsɩ: “Waava wɛ kíɖíím bɩɩgálɩ́ɩ́ná ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá nɛ́ beɖi.”»
6.32: Ngɛ Yeésu woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ménveerím mɩ́ɩ toovonúm sɩsɩ bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ Múúsá waava ná mɩ́ɩ kíɖíím bɩɩgálɩ́ɩ́ná ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá bikédi nɛ́, amá, Majaa wánváa kʊ mɩ́ɩ kíɖíím toovonúm ńbɩ bɩ́ngalɩɩ́ ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá nɛ́.
6.33: Káma, kíɖíím Ɩsɔ́ɔ wánváa bɩ nɛ́ gɛ weení wángalɩɩnáa ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá bɩka wánváa ɖúúlínya weezuú nɛ́.»
6.34: Ngɛ bɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «A bɩlɛ́, kʊ́bɔnɩ́, kʊ nlɔɔná ɖáa kíɖíím bɩḿ fáa!»
6.35: Ngɛ Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Mɔ́ɔ́ gɛ kíɖíím bɩ́nváa weezuú nɛ́. Weení ɩrɩ́ŋa wɔɔgɔ́nɩ mɔ́jɔ́ nɛ́, ɩlɛ́ ɩmʊ́ nyɔɔ́sɩ tángʊ́ʊ yɩ kɛtɛngɛrɛ, bɩka weení ɩrɩ́ŋa waava ma toovonúm nɛ́, ɖoolɔɔ́ tánlaḿ yɩ kɛtɛngɛrɛ.
6.36: Méévééri mɩ́ɩ bɩlɛ́ amá, na bɩrɩ́ŋa mɩ́ɩ́ná ma nɛ́, mɩ́dáfá ma toovonúm.
6.37: Wenbá barɩ́ŋa Caáwʊ waava ma nɛ́, bɔ́ngɔnɩ́ mɔ́jɔ́. Ngʊ́ bɩlɛ́ gɛ médéngizí weení ɩrɩ́ŋa sɩ ɩkɔ́nɩ mɔ́jɔ́ nɛ́.
6.38: Máagálɩɩ ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá megédi adɛ laadɔ́ɔ-rɔɔzɩ́ gɛ sɩ malá weení weegédíri ma nɛ́ ɩdɛ́ɛ sɔɔlɩ́m; mɔ́dɔkɔ́nɩ sɩ malá wenbí mɔ́zɔɔlɛ́ɛ nɛ́.
6.39: Weení weegédíri ma nɛ́ ɩdɛ́ɛ sɔɔlɩ́m gɛ sɩsɩ mékeyéle wenbá waaɖʊ wɛ mɛ́ńdɛ́ nɛ́ badaá naárʊ ɩtɛlɛ́ŋ. Amá, kɛdɛɛzɩya wɩ́rɛ, magʊ́sɩ wɛ befé balɩ́ɩ ɩsɩɖáa-daá.
6.40: Ɩɩ́n, wenbí Majaa sɔɔlɛ́ɛ bɩ nɛ́ gɛ sɩsɩ wenbá barɩ́ŋa baana Biyaalʊ́ʊ ngɛ baava yɩ toovonúm nɛ́, boyuú weezuú kɩ́dɛ́ndɛŋ́ nɛ́, bɩka kɛdɛɛzɩya wɩ́rɛ nɛ́, magʊ́sɩ wɛ befé balɩ́ɩ ɩsɩɖáa-daá.»
6.41: Yahúúɖuwá waanɩ́ɩ Yeésu-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́mwá tɩna nɛ́, ngɛ baabáázɩ ŋmɩɩdɩ́, káma, wɔɔdɔ́ sɩsɩ: «Mɔ́ɔ́ gɛ kíɖíím bɩɩgálɩ́ɩ́ná ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá nɛ́.»
6.42: Ngɛ bɔɔdɔ́tɔḿ sɩsɩ: «Mányɩ sɩsɩ ɩmʊ́ gɛ Ísifu biyaalʊ́ Yeésu gɛ? Ɖányɩ ɩgɔɔ na ɩjaa! Bɩ́nlám nŋɩ́nɩ́ na ɩtɔ́ lɛlɛɛɖɔ́ sɩsɩ: “Máagálɩ́ɩ́ná ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá megédi adɛ.”»
6.43: Ńna gɛ Yeésu woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Iyéle ɖamá ŋmɩɩdɩnáa.
6.44: Naárʊ tánbɩɩzɩ ɩkɔ́nɩ mɔ́jɔ́ a Caáwʊ weení weegédíri ma nɛ́ takánára yɩ ɩkɔná bɩka kɛdɛɛzɩya wɩ́rɛ nɛ́, mɔ́ɔ́ magʊ́sɩ yɩ ifé ɩlɩ́ɩ ɩsɩɖáa-daá.
6.45: Anɖébiwá waaŋmáa sɩsɩ: “Ɩsɔ́ɔ wánwɩlɩ́ɩ ɩráa rɩ́ŋa ɩdɛ́ɛ tɔ́m.” Weení ɩrɩ́ŋa wánnɩɩ́ Caáwʊ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m, ngɛ weedísi wentí waawɩ́lɩ nɛ́, ɩlɛ́ ɩmʊ́ wɔ́ngɔnɩ́ mɔ́jɔ́.
6.46: Bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ sɩ naárʊ wáńnáa Caáwʊ, asée weení waagálɩ́ɩ́ná Ɩsɔ́ɔ-jɔ́ nɛ́ iriké; ɩlɛ́ waana ná Caáwʊ.
6.47: Ménveerím mɩ́ɩ toovonúm sɩsɩ weení ɩrɩ́ŋa waava toovonúm nɛ́, wooyuú weezuú kɩ́dɛ́ndɛŋ́ nɛ́.
6.48: Mɔ́ɔ́ gɛ kíɖíím bɩ́nváa weezuú nɛ́.
6.49: Tɛɛwʊ́lɔ́ɔ́-daá, mɩ́jaájaanáa weeɖi kíɖíím baayáa bɩ sɩsɩ máánɩ nɛ́, amá, baazɩ́.
6.50: Amá, kíɖíím bɩɩgálɩ́ɩ́ná ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá nɛ́ bɩlɛ́ gɛ a ɩrʊ́ weeɖi ɩ́dánzɩḿ.
6.51: Mɛ́gɛ́ɛ na kʊ kíɖíím weezuú ńbɩ bɩɩgálɩ́ɩ́ná ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá nɛ́. Weení weeɖi bɩ nɛ́, wɔ́njɔwʊ́ʊ weezuú lɛlɛɛɖɔ́ hálɩ bɩvɛ́yɩ́na tɛ́m. Mɔ́dɔ́nʊʊ́ gɛ kíɖíím sɩ mava nɛ́, mánváa bɩ na ɖúúlínya iyuú weezuú.»
6.52: Ńna gɛ Yahúúɖuwá waabáázɩ ɖamá cɔɔlɩ́ bɔ́nbɔɔzɩ́ sɩsɩ: «Bɩ́nlám nŋɩ́nɩ́ ná ɩrʊ́ ceení ɩtɔ́ sɩsɩ wánváa ɖáa ɩdɔnʊʊ́ ɖɩtɔ́ɔ.»
6.53: Ngɛ Yeésu wɔɔdɔ́ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Ménveerím mɩ́ɩ toovonúm sɩsɩ a mɩ́dɔtɔ́ɔ Ɩrʊ́ Biyaalʊ́ dɛ́ɛ tɔnʊʊ́ bɩka ɩnyɔ́ɔ ɩdɛ́ɛ azimá, mídónÿuú weezuú.
6.54: Weení wɔɔdɔ́ɔ mɔ́dɔ́nʊʊ́ bɩka ɩnyɔ́ɔ mɛ́dɛ́ɛ azimá nɛ́, wónÿuúu weezuú kɩ́dɛ́ndɛŋ́ nɛ́, bɩka kɛdɛɛzɩya wɩ́rɛ ménveezí yɩ ɩlɩ́ɩ ɩsɩɖáa-daá.
6.55: Mɔ́dɔ́nʊʊ́ kɛ́ɛ kíɖíím toovonúm ńbɩ gɛ, bɩka mɛ́dɛ́ɛ azimá kɛ́ɛ sʊlʊ́m toovonúm ńbɩ.
6.56: Weení wɔɔdɔ́ɔ mɔ́dɔ́nʊʊ́ bɩka ɩnyɔ́ɔ mɛ́dɛ́ɛ azimá nɛ́, wánŋmaranáa ma bɩka mɔ́ɔ́ ɖʊɖɔ maŋmaraná yɩ.
6.57: Ńŋɩnáa Caáwʊ weení weegédíri ma nɛ́ wánváa weezuú nɛ́, ngɛ ɩrɔ gɛ mɔ́wɛ weezuú-daá nɛ́, bɩlɛ́ ɖʊɖɔ gɛ weení sɩ ɩtɔ́ɔ mɔ́dɔ́nʊʊ́ nɛ́, mɔ́rɔ́, bʊdʊ́ʊ wɔ́njɔwʊ́ʊ weezuú-daá.
6.58: Ɩbɛ́ɛ́ŋ kíɖíím bɩɩgálɩ́ɩ ɩsɔ́ɔ́dáá nɛ́, bɩvɛ́yɩ́ nyazɩ wenbí mɩ́jaájaanáa weeɖi nɛ́. Bɛlɛ́ baazɩ́. Weení weeɖi kíɖíím bɩna nɛ́, wónÿuúu weezuú kɩ́dɛ́ndɛŋ́ nɛ́.»
6.59: Sáátɩ wenkí Yeésu wɛ Kapɛrɩnawʊ́m Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ Ɩsɔ́ɔ ɖaazɛɛɖɛ́ na ɩwɩ́lɩ tɔ́m wentí nɛ́ nbɩlɛ́. Tɔ́m tɩ́nváa weezuú kɩ́dɛ́ndɛŋ́ nɛ́
6.60: Yeésu-dɛ́ɛ wanbaaráa waanɩ́ɩ wentí waaŋmátɩ nɛ́, ngɛ badaá ɖabata sɩsɩ: «Tɔ́m tɩna tɩjɔɔ́ɔ káálɛ nɩɩ́. Weení wéndisi kʊ tɩ.»
6.61: Yeésu wooyuú ɩtɩlɩ́ sɩsɩ ɩwanbaaráa wánŋmɩɩdɩ́ tɔ́m wentí waaŋmátɩ wɛ tɩ nɛ́ tɩrɔ. Bʊrɔɔzɩ́ gɛ wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ wɛ sɩsɩ: «Mɛ́dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m tɩḿ tɩ́ngʊsɩ́ mɩ́laakáarɩ gɛ?
6.62: Bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, nŋɩ́nɩ́ gɛ mɩ́nlám a mɩ́ɩ́gɔ́nɩ ɩna Ɩrʊ́ Biyaalʊ́ wángbáa lénlé ɩvʊngɔwɛ nɛ́.
6.63: Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Kezeŋa wánváa kʊ weezuú. Ɩrʊ́ riké tɔ́nvɔɔzɩ nabʊ́rʊ. Tɔ́mwá mááŋmátɩ mɩ́ɩ ɖɔ́ nɛ́ tɩɩgálɩ́ɩ́ná Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Kezeŋa-jɔ́ gɛ, bɩka tɩ́nváa kʊ weezuú.
6.64: Amá, mɩ́dáá nɛbɛ́rɛ tafa tɩ toovonúm.» Ɖoo bɩgaɖaa gɛ Yeésu fʊnnyɩ wenbá badafa yɩ toovonúm nɛ́, bɩka ɩvʊnnyɩ weení sɩ ɩkɔ́nɩ ɩyá yɩ nɛ́.
6.65: Ngɛ Yeésu waadásɩ ɩtɔ́ sɩsɩ: «Bʊrɔɔzɩ́ gɛ mɔ́ɔ́dɔ́ mɩ́ɩ sɩsɩ naárʊ tánbɩɩzɩ ɩkɔ́nɩ mɔ́jɔ́ a Caáwʊ tafa yɩ nɩ́bááwʊ.»
6.66: Bɩdɩ́ŋa-rɔ gɛ ɩwanbaaráa ɖabata waabáázɩ yɩ cɛ́m bándalɩ́, bodokúti bónvúu yɩ.
6.67: Ńna gɛ Yeésu wɔɔbɔ́ɔ́zɩ ɩwanbaaráa fuú na nɔɔ́lɛ sɩsɩ: «Mɩ́nyɔ́ɔ́ ɖʊdɔ mɩ́zɔɔlɛ́ɛ ɩɖɛ́ɛ yáá wé.»
6.68: Ngɛ Simɔ́ɔnɩ Pétro woobúsi yɩ sɩsɩ: «Ɖádʊ́ʊ, weení-jɔ́ gɛ sɩ ɖibó. Nyɔ́jɔ́ gɛ tɔ́m tɩ́nváa weezuú kɩ́dɛ́ndɛŋ́ nɛ́ wɛ.
6.69: Ɖɔ́ɔ́ ɖáává toovonúm, bɩka ɖɩtɩlɩ́ bɩlɛ́ sɩsɩ nyɔ́ɔ́ gɛ Ɖacɩrɩ‑cɩrɩ-dʊ́ʊ weení waagálɩ́ɩ́ná Ɩsɔ́ɔ-jɔ́ nɛ́.»
6.70: Ngɛ Yeésu woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Mányɩ sɩsɩ mɔ́ɔ́ máádá ná máálɩ́zɩ́ mɩ́nyɔ́ɔ́ wanbaaráa fuú na nɔɔ́lɛ ya. Amá, na bɩrɩ́ŋa mɩ́dáá kʊ́ɖʊḿ kɛ́ɛ zííni gɛ.»
6.71: Wánŋmatɩ́ bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, Simɔ́ɔnɩ Isikariyóo biyaalʊ́ Yudásɩ gɛ wánŋmatɩ́. Káma, na bɩrɩ́ŋa ɩlɛ́ ɩwɛ wanbaaráa fuú na nɔɔ́lɛ-daá nɛ́, sɩ ɩkɔnɩ ná ɩyá Yeésu.

7.1: Bɩlɛ́ bʊwɔ́rɔ́ nɛ́, Galilée laadɔ́ɔ-daá gɛ Yeésu wéngilím, wenbí bʊrɔɔzɩ́ nɛ́ ɩ́dándacaa wéngilím Yudée laadɔ́ɔ-daá; káma, Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnáa wánvʊnjáádɩ sɩ bakʊ yɩ.
7.2: Bɩdɛ́ɛ sáátɩ kɩḿ Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ jíńgáárɩ́ bánÿaá kɩ sɩsɩ bɩsaagɛ́rɛ́ɛ́zɩ-dɛ́ɛ jíńgáárɩ́ nɛ́ wáńjʊ́ʊ́.
7.3: Ngɛ Yeésu igoobíya wɔɔdɔ́ yɩ sɩsɩ: «Lɩɩ cé, bo nɖɛ́ɛ Yudée, na nyɛ́dɛ́ɛ wanbaaráa ɖʊɖɔ ɩkáná tɩmɛ́ nyánlám yɛ nɛ́.
7.4: Naárʊ fɛ́yɩ́ a ɩzɔɔlɛ́ɛ ɩráa ɩtɩlɩ́ yɩ, wánmʊsɩ́ wenbí wánlám nɛ́. Káma, nyánlám tɩmɛ́ ana nɛ́, la báa weení ɩna nya.»
7.5: Yeésu igoobíya tɩtɩŋa tafʊ́nváa yɩ toovonúm, biiyele ná gɛ bánŋmatɩ́ bɩlɛ́.
7.6: Ngɛ Yeésu weevééri wɛ sɩsɩ: «Mɛ́dɛ́ɛ alɩwáátɩ tatala tá; mɩ́nyɔ́ɔ́ mɩ́jɔ́ alɩwáátɩ báa wenkí cɔɔ́ɔ kazɔ́ɔ gɛ.
7.7: Ɖúúlínya tánbɩɩzɩ kɩlɩzɩ́ mɩ́nyɔ́ɔ́ báɖáárɛ; bɩɩga mɔ́ɔ́ nɛ́, kɩ́dánjaa mɔ́ɔ́, káma, ménveerím kɩ sɩsɩ kɩdɛ́ɛ tɩmɛ́ fɛ́yɩ́ kazɔ́ɔ.
7.8: Mɩ́nyɔ́ɔ́ ibó ɩɖɛ́ɛ jíńgáárɩ́. Mɔ́ɔ́ mɛ́dɛ́ɖɛɛ tá naanɩ́, káma, mɛ́dɛ́ɛ alɩwáátɩ tatala tá.»
7.9: Waaŋmátɩ bɩlɛ́ bɩtɛ́ nɛ́, ngɛ waawalɩ́ Galilée. Yeésu woobó bɩsaagɛ́rɛ́ɛ́zɩ jíńgáárɩ́
7.10: Igoobíya wɛɛɖɛ́ɛ jíńgáárɩ́ nɛ́, ngɛ Yeésu ɖʊɖɔ waagʊrʊ́ ɩɖɛ́ɛ ńna, ideyéle ɩráa ɩna yɩ, amá, biigúti bɩjɔɔ́ɔ nyazɩ wánmʊsɩ́ bɩlɛ́.
7.11: Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnáa wɛ bánjáádɩ yɩ jíńgáárɩ́-daá ńna bɔ́ndɔ́m sɩsɩ: «Ɩrʊ́ ɩmʊ́ iwelé.»
7.12: Ɩráa ɩbá bɔwɛ bánŋmatɩ́ ɩdɛ́ɛ tɔ́m zamɔ́ɔ-daá. Nɛbɛ́rɛ sɩsɩ: «Ɩgɛ́ɛ ɩrʊ́ kazɔ́ɔ ńnɩ́ gɛ.» Baaganáa sɩsɩ: «Lé-dɛ́ɛ ɩrʊ́ kazɔ́ɔ ńnɩ́, wɛ́ndɛlɛ́sɩ ɩráa gɛ.»
7.13: Naárʊ tánŋmatɩ ɩdɔ́m ɖɔ́ ɩtálɩ ɩdɩ, káma, barɩ́ŋa bénzewɔ́ɔ Yahúúɖuwá-dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnáa.
7.14: Jíńgáárɩ́ wáńzʊ́ʊ́ lɔwʊtáá gɛ Yeésu waagʊrʊ́ ɩkpa Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-daá, ngɛ waabáázɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ tɔ́m wɩlɩ́ɩ.
7.15: Ngɛ Yahúúɖuwá wɛ bánlám bítí bɔ́nbɔɔzɩ́ badɩ sɩsɩ: «Ɩrʊ́ ceení tɛkpɛ́lɛ́ŋ Mará wɩlɩɖʊ́ naárʊ-jɔ́, bɩɩlá nŋɩ́nɩ́ gɛ ɩbá ɩnyɩ bɩlɛ́.»
7.16: Ngɛ Yeésu woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Wentí mánwɩlɩ́ɩ nɛ́ talɩɩná mɔ́jɔ́, amá, Ɩsɔ́ɔ weení weegédíri ma nɛ́ ɩjɔ́ gɛ bɩɩlɩɩná.
7.17: A naárʊ sɔɔlɛ́ɛ ɩlá Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ sɔɔlɩ́m, bʊdʊ́ʊ wándɩlɩ́ɩ sɩsɩ wentí mánwɩlɩ́ɩ nɛ́ waalɩɩná Ɩsɔ́ɔ-jɔ́ yáá mɔ́ɔ́ mádɩtɩŋa mɔ́jɔ́ gɛ bɩɩlɩɩná.
7.18: Weení wánŋmatɩ́ ɩdɩtɩŋa ɩdɛ́ɛ ńdɩ nɛ́, wánjáádɩ ɩdɩ ɩdɛ́ɛ ɖɔɔzɩ́tɩ gɛ. Amá, weení wánjáádɩ weení weegédíri yɩ nɛ́ ɩdɛ́ɛ ɖɔɔzɩ́tɩ nɛ́, kɛ́ɛ toovonúm-dʊ́ʊ gɛ, bʊdʊ́ʊ tɛkɛ́ɛ bʊbɔtʊ́ʊ.
7.19: Múúsá weejéle mɩ́ɩ Mará, yáá wé. Amá, mɩ́dáá naárʊ tónvúu yɛ. Bɩlɛ́ nɛ́, we-rɔ gɛ mɩ́njáádɩ sɩ ɩkʊ ma.»
7.20: Ńna gɛ zamɔ́ɔ sɩsɩ: «Nyɔ́wɛná zííniwá. Weení wánjáádɩ kʊ sɩ ɩkʊ nya.»
7.21: Ngɛ Yeésu woobúsi wɛ sɩsɩ: «Tɩmɛ́rɛ kʊ́ɖʊńɖɛ gɛ máálá ngɛ bɩjɔɔ́ɔ mɩ́rɩ́ŋa bítí ɖɔ́?
7.22: Múúsá waazɩ́ɩ́zɩ mɩ́ɩ sɩsɩ ɩ́bɛ́lɩ́ bíya abaaláa, ngʊ́ bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ Múúsá-jɔ́ gɛ bíya abaaláa-dɛ́ɛ bɛlɩ́ɩ waalɩɩná, ɖoo ɖájaájaanáa-jɔ́ gɛ. Bʊrɔ gɛ míídísi mɩ́nbɛlɩ́ɩ ɩráa Fɛɛzɩrɛ wɩ́rɛ.
7.23: A mɩ́nbɛlɩ́ɩ ɩráa Fɛɛzɩrɛ wɩ́rɛ, na bɩ́keyéle ɩyɩsɩ ná Múúsá-dɛ́ɛ Mará, we-rɔ gɛ mɩ́nÿɛɛnáa mɔ́ɔ́ weení mááwáázɩ ɩrʊ́ ɖebilibili Fɛɛzɩrɛ wɩ́rɛ nɛ́ baaná.
7.24: Iyéle ɩrʊ́ bɛɛŋnáa na iɖéézi, a sɩ iɖéézi, ivu toovonúm.» Ɩráa wɔ́nbɔɔzɩ́ badɩ sɩsɩ Yeésu náábɩ́lɛ́ Lɛɛrʊ́?
7.25: Yerusalɛ́ɛm ńba nɛbɛ́rɛ wɛ bánŋmatɩ́ sɩsɩ: «Mányɩ sɩsɩ weení bánjáádɩ sɩ bakʊ yɩ nɛ́ nbɩlɛ́ gɛ.
7.26: Bɛɛ ɩlɛ́ ɩwɛ wánŋmatɩ́ zamɔ́ɔ-daá bɩka bozumáa bɛbɛɛ́na yɩ nɛ́! Ɖɛ́dɛ́ɛ kʊ́bɔnáa wɛɛdɛ́ bána sɩsɩ ɩgɛ́ɛ na kʊ Lɛɛrʊ́ yáá wé.
7.27: Ngʊ́ Lɛɛrʊ́ sɩ ɩkɔ́nɩ nɛ́, bádándɩlɩ́ lé sɩ ɩkálɩɩ ná nɛ́. Amá, ɩrʊ́ ceení ɖányɩ lé ɩlɛ́ waagálɩ́ɩ́ná nɛ́.»
7.28: Ńna gɛ Yeésu ɩlɛ́ ɩwɛ wánwɩlɩ́ɩ Ɩsɔ́ɔ-dɛ́ɛ Ɖaána kʊ́bɔńga-daá nɛ́ waaŋmátɩ bɩcáárɩ sɩsɩ: «Toovonúm mɩ́nyɩ weení mɛ́gɛ́ɛ nɛ́, na lé máagálɩ́ɩ́ná nɛ́? Mɔ́ɔ́gɔ́nɩ nɛ́, bɩdɛkɛ́ɛ mádɩtɩŋa mɔ́ɔ́gɔ́ná ná mádɩ. Weení weegédíri ma nɛ́ kɛ́ɛ toovonúm-dʊ́ʊ gɛ. Mɩ́nyɔ́ɔ́ mɩ́ɩ́sɩ yɩ.
